title: : GrantOfficeAccessToFormGroup
text:
[API Reference](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/forms/formgroups/grantofficeaccesstoformgroup/)[API Explorer](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/forms/formgroups/grantofficeaccesstoformgroup/?explorer=true)

[FormGroups](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/forms/formgroups/)

title: : GrantOfficeAccessToFormGroup
text: Grants the office `officeId` access to the form group `formGroupId`.

title: : GrantOfficeAccessToFormGroup
text: You must have a role for which the `canManageFormGroups` permission is set to **true.**

title: : GrantOfficeAccessToFormGroup
text: - [How to grant office access to a form group](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/access-form-group/)

title: : GrantOfficeAccessToFormGroup
text:
POST

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/form_groups/{formGroupId}/grant_office_access/{officeId}
```

title: : GrantOfficeAccessToFormGroup
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| formGroupId \* | string | The ID of the form group.  Example: `7b879c89-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-819d6a85e0a1` |
| officeId \* | integer | The ID of the office. This is the ID that the system generated when you created the office. |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

\* Required

title: : GetFormLibraries
text:
[API Reference](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/forms/formlibraries/getformlibraries/)[API Explorer](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/forms/formlibraries/getformlibraries/?explorer=true)

[FormLibraries](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/forms/formlibraries/)

title: : GetFormLibraries
text: Returns a list of form libraries to which the current user has access.

title: : GetFormLibraries
text: All users can use this method, but the results will differ based on whether the company has asked Docusign to enable **RequireOfficeLibraryAssignments** functionality. If this functionality is enabled for the account, then the list is filtered based on the offices that the user is in and the libraries that are assigned to those offices. When **RequireOfficeLibraryAssignments** is not enabled, the API returns all results.

title: : GetFormLibraries
text:
- [How to add forms to a room](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/add-form-to-room/)
- [How to create an external form fillable session](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/external-form-fill/)
- [How to assign a form to a form group](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/assign-form-group/)

title: : GetFormLibraries
text:
GET

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/form_libraries
```

title: : GetFormLibraries
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

| Query Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| count | integer | The number of results to return. This value must be a number between `1` and `100` (default). |
| startPosition | integer | The starting zero-based index position of the results set. The default value is `0`. |

\* Required

title: : GetFormLibraryForms
text: Returns a list of forms to which the current user has access in the specified form library.

title: : GetFormLibraryForms
text:
- [How to add forms to a room](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/add-form-to-room/)
- [How to create an external form fillable session](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/external-form-fill/)
- [How to assign a form to a form group](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/assign-form-group/)

title: : GetFormLibraryForms
text:
GET

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/form_libraries/{formLibraryId}/forms
```

title: : GetFormLibraryForms
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| formLibraryId \* | string | The ID of the form library.  Example: `402c6e2f-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-ff3f249f6da9` |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

| Query Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| count | integer | The number of results to return. This value must be a number between `1` and `100` (default). |
| startPosition | integer | (Optional) The starting zero-based index position of the results set. The default value is `0`. |

\* Required

title: : GetFormProviderAssociations
text:
[API Reference](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/forms/formproviders/getformproviderassociations/)[API Explorer](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/forms/formproviders/getformproviderassociations/?explorer=true)

[FormProviders](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/forms/formproviders/)

title: : GetFormProviderAssociations
text: Gets all associations by provider.

title: : GetFormProviderAssociations
text:
GET

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/form_providers/{providerId}/associations
```

title: : GetFormProviderAssociations
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| providerId \* | string | The provider ID. |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

| Query Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| count | integer | The total number of associations to be returned. |
| startPosition | integer | The starting position on the list. |

\* Required

title: GlobalResources Category
text:
This section shows you how to retrieve the following Global Resources:

- Activity Types
- Closing Statuses
- Contact Sides
- Countries
- Currencies
- Financing Types
- Origins of Leads
- Property Types
- Room Contact Types
- Seller Decision Types
- Special Circumstances Types
- States
- Task Date Types
- Task Responsibility Types
- Time Zones
- Transaction Sides

Description

This resource provides a method that enables you retrieve a list of closing statuses, or valid reasons for closing a room.

title: : GetClosingStatuses
text:
Returns a list of closing statuses, or valid reasons for closing a room.

You do not specify an `accountId` or any other parameters with this method.

title: : GetClosingStatuses
text: Any user with a valid access token can use this method.

title: : GetClosingStatuses
text:
GET

```
/restapi/v2/closing_statuses
```

title: : GetCountries
text:
Returns a list of countries that the API supports. This is a list of countries in which you can create an office.

You do not specify an `accountId` or any other parameters with this method.

title: : GetCountries
text: Any user with a valid access token can use this method.

title: : GetCountries
text:
GET

```
/restapi/v2/countries
```

title: : GetSellerDecisionTypes
text: Returns a list of possible seller decision types regarding offers, such as `Countered` or `Rejected`.

title: : GetSellerDecisionTypes
text: Any user with a valid access token can use this method.

title: : GetSellerDecisionTypes
text:
GET

```
/restapi/v2/seller_decision_types
```

title: : GetSpecialCircumstanceTypes
text: Returns a list of special circumstance types, such as `Short Sale` and `Foreclosure`. These are the values that you can select for the **Special circumstances** field that appears on the **Room Details** page.

title: : GetSpecialCircumstanceTypes
text: Anyone with a valid access token can call this method.

text:

```
/restapi/v2/special_circumstance_types
```

[TaskDateTypes](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/globalresources/taskdatetypes/)

title: : GetTaskDateTypes
text:
Returns a list of date types that you can use with tasks, such as `Actual Close Date` and `Task Due Date`. These are the options that appear in the **Due Date** drop-down list when you create a task by using the console.

**Note:** You do not enter an `accountId` with this method.

title: : GetTaskDateTypes
text: Any user with a valid access token can use this method.

title: : GetTaskDateTypes
text:
GET

```
/restapi/v2/task_date_types
```

text:

[TaskResponsibilityTypes](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/globalresources/taskresponsibilitytypes/)

title: : GetTaskResponsibilityTypes
text:
Returns a list of responsibility types that you can assign to users when you add them to a task.

**Note:** You do not specify an `accountId` with this method.

title: : GetTaskResponsibilityTypes
text: Any user with a valid access token can call this method.

title: : GetTaskResponsibilityTypes
text:
GET

```
/restapi/v2/task_responsibility_types
```

title: : GetTimeZones
text:
Gets a list of time zones that you can assign to an office.

**Note:** You do not specify an `accountId` with this method.

title: : GetTimeZones
text: Anyone with a valid access token can call this method.

title: : GetTimeZones
text:
GET

```
/restapi/v2/time_zones
```

text: The `Offices` resource enables you to create and manage offices for your company. You can also retrieve the number and type of objects that reference an office.

text:
| Method | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [CreateOffice](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/offices/offices/createoffice/) | POST  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/offices ```  Creates an office. |

| [GetOffice](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/offices/offices/getoffice/) | GET  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/offices/{officeId} ```  Gets information about an office. |
| [GetOffices](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/offices/offices/getoffices/) | GET  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/offices ```  Gets offices. |
| [GetReferenceCounts](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/offices/offices/getreferencecounts/) | GET  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/offices/{officeId}/reference_counts ```  Retrieves the number and type of objects that reference an office. |

title: : CreateOffice
text:

[Offices](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/offices/offices/)

title: : CreateOffice
text:
This method creates an office in a Rooms account. You can configure the following information for the new office:

- Office name
- Region
- Address
- Country ID and time zone
- Phone number

When you create an office, the Rooms API service assigns it an ID (`officeId`) and timestamp (`createdDate`), which are returned in the response along with the above data elements you specified. See the `Offices` object for descriptions of these data elements.

Use the [Users: AddUserToOffice](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/users/users/addusertooffice/)
method to add users to the office.

title: : CreateOffice
text:
POST

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/offices
```

title: : CreateOffice
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

\* Required

text:

[Offices](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/offices/offices/)

title: : GetOffices
text: This method returns a list of offices associated with an account.

title: : GetOffices
text:
- [How to create a room with data](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/create-room-with-data/)
- [How to create a room with a template](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/create-room-with-template/)
- [How to grant office access to a form group](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/access-form-group/)

title: : GetOffices
text:
GET

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/offices
```

title: : GetOffices
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

| Query Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| count | integer | The number of results to return. This value must be a number between `1` and `100` (default). |
| startPosition | integer | The starting zero-based index position of the results set from which to begin returning values. The default value is `0`. |
| onlyAccessible | boolean | When **true,** the response only includes the offices that are accessible to the current user. |
| search | string | Filters returned records by the specified string. The response only includes records containing this string in the office `name` field. |

\* Required

title: : GetReferenceCounts
text:
[API Reference](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/offices/offices/getreferencecounts/)[API Explorer](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/offices/offices/getreferencecounts/?explorer=true)

[Offices](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/offices/offices/)

title: : GetReferenceCounts
text: This method returns a list of each type of object and the number of objects of that type referencing the specified office. Note that an office cannot be deleted while existing objects reference it.

title: : GetReferenceCounts
text:
GET

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/offices/{officeId}/reference_counts
```

title: : GetReferenceCounts
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| officeId \* | integer | The ID of the office. |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

\* Required

title: Regions Resource
text:
| Method | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [CreateRegion](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/regions/regions/createregion/) | POST  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/regions ```  Creates a region. |
| [DeleteRegion](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/regions/regions/deleteregion/) | DEL  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/regions/{regionId} ```  Deletes a region. |
| [GetRegion](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/regions/regions/getregion/) | GET  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/regions/{regionId} ```  Gets information about a region. |
| [GetRegionReferenceCounts](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/regions/regions/getregionreferencecounts/) | GET  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/regions/{regionId}/reference_counts ```  Retrieves the number and type of objects that reference a region. |
| [GetRegions](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/regions/regions/getregions/) | GET  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/regions ```  Gets regions. |

title: : CreateRegion
text: This method creates a new region. When you create a region, you specify only the name. The service will assign and return a region ID (`regionId`) and a creation timestamp (`createdDate`).

title: : CreateRegion
text:
POST

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/regions
```

title: : CreateRegion
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

\* Required

title: : GetRegionReferenceCounts
text:
This method returns a list of each type of object and the number of objects of that type referencing the specified region.

**Note:** A region cannot be deleted while existing objects reference it.

title: : GetRegionReferenceCounts
text:
GET

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/regions/{regionId}/reference_counts
```

title: : GetRegionReferenceCounts
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| regionId \* | integer | The ID of the region. |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

\* Required

title: : GetRegions
text: This method returns a list of regions that are associated with a Rooms account.

title: : GetRegions
text:
GET

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/regions
```

title: : GetRegions
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

| Query Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| count | integer | The number of results to return. This value must be a number between `1` and `100` (default). |
| startPosition | integer | The starting zero-based index position of the results set from which to begin returning values. The default value is `0`. |
| managedOnly | boolean | When **true,** only the regions that the current user manages are returned. The default value is **false.** |

\* Required

title: Roles Category
text:
Each role is associated with specific permissions. Each new member is assigned a role when you create them, automatically granting them the permissions associated with that role.

Roles use the following permission types to control the actions that users can perform:

- Room
- Room Details
- Documents
- Envelopes
- Member Management
- Company Settings

Rooms enables you to configure custom roles containing permissions that make sense for your company. Because each new member is assigned a role, you must set up these roles before you can invite members to join your account.

Permissions for roles are tied to the `roleId` property and not yet exposed. You can learn more about these permission types and configure them in the web application.

title: Roles Category
text:
In Rooms, a role can be either internal or external. You assign internal roles to people inside your company. You assign external roles to people outside your company when you invite them to a room.

Each member inside your company has a default company role. However, they can also be assigned additional roles with different permissions on a per-room basis. Regardless of the member's default company role, what they can do in a room is entirely controlled by their role in that particular room.

[Roles](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/roles/roles/)

Description

This object contains information about a role.

\* Required

[Roles](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/roles/roles/)

title: : GetRoles
text: Returns a list of roles associated with a company account.

title: : GetRoles
text: Any user with a valid access token can call this method.

title: : GetRoles
text:
- [How to create a room with data](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/create-room-with-data/)
- [How to create a room with a template](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/create-room-with-template/)

title: : GetRoles
text:
GET

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/roles
```

title: : GetRoles
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

| Query Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| onlyAssignable | boolean | This parameter is deprecated. Use `filterContext` instead. Note that `filterContext=AssignableRolesBasedOnCompanyPermissions` is equivalent to `onlyAssignable=true`. |
| filterContext | string | Filters the roles by the calling user's permissions. Valid values are:   - `AllRoles` (default): All roles are returned. - `AssignableRolesBasedOnAllPermissions`: Only roles that the current user can assign to someone else are returned. In other words, given the permission set of the current user, only roles with a subset of those permissions (including the same exact permissions) will be returned. - `AssignableRolesBasedOnCompanyPermissions`: Only roles that the current user can assign to someone else based on company permissions are returned. Other permissions are not taken into account. In other words, given the company permissions of the current user, only roles with a subset of those company permissions (including the same exact company permissions) will be returned. |
| filter | string | A search filter that returns roles by the beginning of the role name. You can enter the beginning of the role name only to return all of the roles that begin with the text that you entered.  For example, if your company has set up roles such as Manager Beginner, Manager Pro, Agent Expert, and Agent Superstar, you could enter `Manager` to return all of the Manager roles (Manager Beginner and Manager Pro).  **Note:** You do not enter a wildcard (\*) at the end of the name fragment. |
| startPosition | integer | The starting zero-based index position of the result set. The default value is 0. |
| count | integer | The number of results to return. This value must be a number between `1` and `100` (default). |

\* Required

title: : UpdateRole
text: Modifies the specified company role.

title: : UpdateRole
text: To use this method, you must have the `canManageAccount` permission set to **true.**

title: : UpdateRole
text:
PUT

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/roles/{roleId}
```

title: : UpdateRole
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| roleId \* | integer | The ID of the role. |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

\* Required

title: Rooms Category
text:
A room can hold documents, envelopes, a list of tasks comprising a workflow, and other related information. You can invite others to this space and assign them permissions on a per-room basis. The documentation in this section shows you how to perform these and other tasks.

[RoomFolders](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/roomfolders/)

[Rooms](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/)

Description

The Rooms resource provides methods that enable you to create and manage rooms. In Rooms for Real Estate, a room is a collaborative digital space corresponding to a specific property. In Rooms for Mortgages, a room corresponds to a specific loan.

title: : GetRoomFolders
text:
[API Reference](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/roomfolders/getroomfolders/)[API Explorer](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/roomfolders/getroomfolders/?explorer=true)

[RoomFolders](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/roomfolders/)

title: : GetRoomFolders
text: Gets a list of room folders in the specified room that are accessible to the current user.

title: : GetRoomFolders
text:
GET

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms/{roomId}/room_folders
```

title: : GetRoomFolders
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| roomId \* | integer | The ID of the room from which to retrieve folders. |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

| Query Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| startPosition | integer | The starting zero-based index position of the results set. When this property is used as a query parameter, the default value is `0`. |
| count | integer | The number of results. When this property is used as a request parameter specifying the number of results to return, the value must be a number between `1` and `100` (default). |

\* Required

title: Rooms Resource
text: A room can hold documents, envelopes, a list of tasks comprising a workflow, and other related information. You can invite others to this space and assign them permissions on a per-room basis.

title: Rooms Resource
text:
| Method | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [AddDocumentToRoom](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/adddocumenttoroom/) | POST  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms/{roomId}/documents ```  Adds a document to a room. |
| [AddDocumentToRoomViaFileUpload](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/adddocumenttoroomviafileupload/) | POST  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms/{roomId}/documents/contents ```  Uploads the contents of a file as a document to a room. |
| [AddFormToRoom](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/addformtoroom/) | POST  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms/{roomId}/forms ```  Adds a form to a room. |
| [CreateRoom](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/createroom/) | POST  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms ```  Creates a room. |
| [CreateRoomEnvelope](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/createroomenvelope/) | POST  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms/{roomId}/envelopes ```  Creates an envelope with the given documents. |
| [DeleteRoom](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/deleteroom/) | DEL  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms/{roomId} ```  Deletes a room. |
| [GetAssignableRoles](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/getassignableroles/) | GET  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms/{roomId}/assignable_roles ```  Gets assignable room-level roles in v6. |
| [GetDocuments](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/getdocuments/) | GET  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms/{roomId}/documents ```  Gets a list of documents in a room. |
| [GetRoom](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/getroom/) | GET  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms/{roomId} ```  Gets a room. |
| [GetRoomFieldData](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/getroomfielddata/) | GET  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms/{roomId}/field_data ```  Gets a room's field data. |
| [GetRoomFieldSet](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/getroomfieldset/) | GET  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms/{roomId}/field_set ```  Gets the field set for a room. |
| [GetRooms](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/getrooms/) | GET  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms ```  Returns a list of rooms. |
| [GetRoomUsers](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/getroomusers/) | GET  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms/{roomId}/users ```  Gets a room's users. |
| [InviteUser](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/inviteuser/) | POST  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms/{roomId}/users ```  Invites a user to a room. |
| [PutRoomUser](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/putroomuser/) | PUT  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms/{roomId}/users/{userId} ```  Updates a room user. |
| [RestoreRoomUserAccess](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/restoreroomuseraccess/) | POST  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms/{roomId}/users/{userId}/restore_access ```  Restores the specified user's access to the room. |
| [RevokeRoomUserAccess](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/revokeroomuseraccess/) | POST  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms/{roomId}/users/{userId}/revoke_access ```  Revokes the specified user's access to the room. |
| [UpdatePicture](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/updatepicture/) | PUT  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms/{roomId}/picture ```  Updates the picture for a room. |
| [UpdateRoomFieldData](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/updateroomfielddata/) | PUT  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms/{roomId}/field_data ```  Updates a room's field data. |

title: : AddDocumentToRoom
text:
[API Reference](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/adddocumenttoroom/)[API Explorer](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/adddocumenttoroom/?explorer=true)

[Rooms](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/)

title: : AddDocumentToRoom
text:
Adds a document to a room.

The following properties in the request body are required. The `folderId` property is optional. All other properties are ignored.

- `name`
- `base64Contents`

If a document with the specified name already exists, a counter is added to the name to make it unique.

For example, to create a document named **hello.txt** that contains the text `hello, world`, the body of your request would look like this:

```
{
  "name": "hello.txt",
  "base64Contents": "aGVsbG8sIHdvcmxkCg=="
}
```

title: : AddDocumentToRoom
text:
POST

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms/{roomId}/documents
```

title: : AddDocumentToRoom
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| roomId \* | integer | The ID of the room. |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

\* Required

text:

[Rooms](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/)

title: : AddDocumentToRoomViaFileUpload
text:
This method uploads the contents of file as a room document for the room that you specify.

This is a multipart form request. You must include the following headers:

- `Content-Type: multipart/form-data` (with a `boundary`)
- `Content-Disposition: form-data`
- `Content-Disposition: file` (with the `filename`)

title: : AddDocumentToRoomViaFileUpload
text:

title: : AddFormToRoom
text:
Adds a form to a room.

You specify the form that you want to add in the `formForAdd` request body.
To find the ID of the form that you want to add,
use the [FormsLibraries: GetFormLibraryForms](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/forms/formlibraries/getformlibraryforms/) method.

title: : AddFormToRoom
text: You must have a role for which the `canAddDocumentsFromFormLibraries` permission is set to **true.**

title: : AddFormToRoom
text: - [How to add forms to a room](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/add-form-to-room/)

title: : AddFormToRoom
text:
POST

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms/{roomId}/forms
```

title: : AddFormToRoom
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| roomId \* | integer | The ID of the room. |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

\* Required

title: : DeleteRoom
text:
This method deletes a room.

**Note:** To use this method, you must be assigned a role that has the **Delete Owned Rooms** permission set to **true** in the console. If you manage other members, this permission also enables you to delete rooms that are owned by the users that you manage.

title: : DeleteRoom
text:

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms/{roomId}
```

\* Required

text:

[Rooms](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/)

title: : GetAssignableRoles
text:
This method returns the room-level roles that the current user can assign to the members that they invite to a room.

**Note:** This method works only for Rooms v6 and only returns roles that have `isExternal` set to **true.**

title: : GetAssignableRoles
text:
GET

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms/{roomId}/assignable_roles
```

title: : GetAssignableRoles
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| roomId \* | integer | The ID of the room. |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

| Query Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| assigneeEmail | string | The email address of a specific member. Using this parameter returns only the roles that the current user can assign to the member with that email address. |
| filter | string | A search filter that returns assignable roles by the beginning of the role name.  **Note:** You do not enter a wildcard (\*) at the end of the name fragment. |
| startPosition | integer | The index position within the total result set from which to start returning values. The default value is `0`. |
| count | integer | The number of results to return. This value must be a number between `1` and `100` (default). |

\* Required

text:

[Rooms](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/)

title: : GetDocuments
text: This method returns a list of documents that the current user can access for a specific room.

title: : GetDocuments
text:
GET

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms/{roomId}/documents
```

title: : GetDocuments
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| roomId \* | integer | The ID of the room. |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

| Query Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| count | integer | The number of results to return. This value must be a number between `1` and `100` (default). |
| startPosition | integer | The index position within the total result set from which to start returning values. The default value is `0`. |
| requireContentForDynamicDocuments | boolean | When **true,** dynamic documents without content will not be returned. The default value is **false.** |
| roomFolderId | integer | Filters results by `folderId`. If this property is not set, no filtering is applied. |
| nameFilter | string | Filters results by `name`. If this property is not set, no filtering is applied. |
| includeArchived | boolean | Filters results by `isArchived`. For example, when **true,** only documents with the property `isArchived=true` will be returned. If this property is not set, no filtering is applied. |

\* Required

title: : GetRoom
text:


title: : GetRoom
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |

| roomId \* | integer | The ID of the room. |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

| Query Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| includeFieldData | boolean | When **true,** the response includes the field data from the room. This is the information that appears on the room's **Details** tab. |

\* Required

title: : GetRoomFieldData
text:
Returns the field data associated with a room. This is the information that appears on the room's **Details** tab.

To better understand the room's field data, use
the [Rooms: GetRoomFieldSet](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/getroomfieldset/) method to retrieve the set of fields that the room uses.

title: : GetRoomFieldData
text: - [How to export data from a room](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/export-room-data/)

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms/{roomId}/field_data
```

\* Required

[Rooms](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/)

title: : GetRoomFieldSet
text:
Returns the field set that a room uses. This is the set of fields that appears on the room's **Details** tab in the console, such as `contactName` and `phone`.

You can use this method to gain a better understanding of the room field data retrieved with
the [Rooms: GetRoomFieldData](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/getroomfielddata/) method, and to determine the fields for which you can provide data when you create a new room.

title: : GetRoomFieldSet
text: Anyone in the room can call this method.

title: : GetRoomFieldSet
text:
GET

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms/{roomId}/field_set
```

title: : GetRoomFieldSet
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| roomId \* | integer | The ID of the room. |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

\* Required

title: : GetRooms
text:
[API Reference](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/getrooms/)[API Explorer](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/getrooms/?explorer=true)

[Rooms](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/)

title: : GetRooms
text:
This method returns details about the rooms that the current user has permissions to view.

The `fieldDataChangedStartDate` and `fieldDataChangedEndDate`
query parameters let you limit the results to rooms
whose [field data](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/getroomfielddata/) has changed within a range of dates.

The `roomClosedStartDate` and `roomClosedEndDate` query parameters let you limit the results to rooms that were closed within a range of dates.

**Note:** By default, this method only returns open rooms. To return other rooms, use the `roomStatus` query parameter.

title: : GetRooms
text: - [How to get a room with filters](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/get-room-with-filters/)

title: : GetRooms
text:
GET

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms
```

title: : GetRooms
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

| Query Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| count | integer | The number of results. When this property is used as a request parameter specifying the number of results to return, the value must be a number between 1 and 100 (default). |
| startPosition | integer | The index position within the total result set from which to start returning values. The default value is `0`. |
| roomStatus | string | The status of the room. Valid values are:   - `active`: This is the default value. - `pending` - `open`: Includes both `active` and `pending` statuses. - `closed`   To return rooms with multiple statuses, enter a comma-separated list of statuses.  Example:  `closed,open` |
| officeId | integer | The ID of the office. |
| fieldDataChangedStartDate | string | Starting date and time to filter rooms whose field data has changed after this date. Date and time is always given as UTC. If the time (`hh:mm:ss`) is omitted, it defaults to `00:00:00`.  Valid formats:   - `yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm:ss` - `yyyy/mm/dd hh:mm:ss`   The default start date is the beginning of time. |
| fieldDataChangedEndDate | string | Ending date and time to filter rooms whose field data has changed before this date. Date and time is always given as UTC. If the time (`hh:mm:ss`) is omitted, it defaults to `00:00:00`.  Valid formats:   - `yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm:ss` - `yyyy/mm/dd hh:mm:ss`   If this query parameter is omitted, the default end date is now. |
| roomClosedStartDate | string | Starting date and time to filter rooms that were closed this date. Date and time is always given as UTC. If the time (`hh:mm:ss`) is omitted, it defaults to `00:00:00`.  Valid formats:   - `yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm:ss` - `yyyy/mm/dd hh:mm:ss`   The default start date is the beginning of time. |
| roomClosedEndDate | string | Ending date and time to filter rooms that were closed before this date. Date and time is always given as UTC. If the time (`hh:mm:ss`) is omitted, it defaults to `00:00:00`.  Valid formats:   - `yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm:ss` - `yyyy/mm/dd hh:mm:ss`   If this query parameter is omitted, the default end date is now. |

\* Required

text:

[Rooms](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/)

title: : GetRoomUsers
text: This method returns a list of users associated with a room.

title: : GetRoomUsers
text:
GET

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms/{roomId}/users
```

title: : GetRoomUsers
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| roomId \* | integer | The ID of the room. |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

| Query Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| count | integer | The number of results to return. This value must be a number between `1` and `100` (default). |
| startPosition | integer | The index position within the total result set from which to start returning values. The default value is `0`. |
| filter | string | A search filter that returns users by the beginning of the user's first name, last name, or email address. You can enter the beginning of the name or email only to return all of the users whose names or email addresses begin with the text that you entered.  **Note:** You do not enter a wildcard (\*) at the end of the name or email fragment. |
| sort | string | The order in which to return results. Valid values are:   - `firstNameAsc`: Sort on first name in ascending order. - `firstNameDesc`: Sort on first name in descending order. - `lastNameAsc`: Sort on last name in ascending order. - `lastNameDesc`: Sort on last name in descending order. This is the default value. |

\* Required

title: : InviteUser
text:

You can invite anyone to join a room by specifying their email address.

text:


text:

| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

\* Required

text:

title: : PutRoomUser
text:
You can use this method to update the following information for a room user:

- `roleId`
- `transactionSideId`

In the console, this is the **Side and role** information that appears in the room's **People** tab. You specify the information that you want to update in the `roomUserForUpdate` request body.

title: : PutRoomUser
text: Only the person who invited the room user to the room can update the room user.

title: : PutRoomUser
text:
PUT

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms/{roomId}/users/{userId}
```

title: : PutRoomUser
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| roomId \* | integer | The ID of the room. |
| userId \* | integer | The ID of the user to update. |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

\* Required

title: : RevokeRoomUserAccess
text:
[API Reference](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/revokeroomuseraccess/)[API Explorer](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/revokeroomuseraccess/?explorer=true)

[Rooms](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/)

title: : RevokeRoomUserAccess
text:
Revokes the specified user's access to the room. If successful, the HTTP result is 204 (No content), and the response is empty.

To revoke access immediately, leave the request body empty.

To revoke access on a specific date, use the request body to specify a date.

**Note** If a user doesn't have access to a room, and you revoke their access at a future date, the user will be granted access until the revocation date.

title: : RevokeRoomUserAccess
text:
POST

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms/{roomId}/users/{userId}/revoke_access
```

title: : RevokeRoomUserAccess
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| roomId \* | integer | The ID of the room. |
| userId \* | integer | The ID of the user whose access you want to revoke. |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

\* Required

title: : UpdatePicture
text:
[API Reference](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/updatepicture/)[API Explorer](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/updatepicture/?explorer=true)

[Rooms](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/)

title: : UpdatePicture
text:
Updates the photo for a room.
The image file size limit is approximately 40 MB,
and you can use the following image formats:

- jpg/jpeg
- png
- tiff
- gif

In the request body of this endpoint,
you can specify the image as:

- a JSON object
- multipart form data
- stream data

To upload an image as a JSON object,
use an object with two string properties:

- `fileName`: the name of the file
- `base64Contents`: the base64 representation of the image.
  For example a cURL request might look like this:

```
curl --request PUT '/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms/{roomId}/picture' \
     --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
     --data-raw '{
                   "fileName":"name-of-file.jpg",
                   "base64Contents":"iVBOR...RK3IAK5CYII="
                 }'
```

Using multipart form data removes the need to encode images in base64 format.
See *Multipart form requests* in [Formatting API requests](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/esign-rest-api/esign101/rules-and-limits/requests/)
for details and an example.

To use other other streamed binary content types,
use the `Content-Disposition` request header.

```
Content-Disposition: file; filename="hello.jpg"
```

title: : UpdatePicture
text:
PUT

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms/{roomId}/picture
```

text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| roomId \* | integer | The ID of the room. |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

\* Required

title: RoomTemplates Resource
text: You can use a room template to set the transaction side and task lists for rooms. For example, a broker can create a room template for agents to use. You can enable the room template for all regions and offices, or just for specific ones. You create room templates and the task templates that room templates use in the console.

title: : GetRoomTemplates
text:
[API Reference](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/roomtemplates/roomtemplates/getroomtemplates/)[API Explorer](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/roomtemplates/roomtemplates/getroomtemplates/?explorer=true)

[RoomTemplates](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/roomtemplates/roomtemplates/)

title: : GetRoomTemplates
text: This method returns a list of room templates that the user can use to create a new room. The response includes company and region-level templates.

title: : GetRoomTemplates
text: - [How to create a room with a template](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/create-room-with-template/)

title: : GetRoomTemplates
text:
GET

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/room_templates
```

title: : GetRoomTemplates
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

| Query Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| officeId | integer | The ID of the office for which the user wants to create a room. When you pass in a value for this parameter, only room templates that are valid for that office appear in the results. For users who are not Admins, the default is the ID of the user's default office. However, you can specify a value if the user belongs to multiple offices.  If the user is an Admin, set the `forAdmin` search parameter to **true** instead and omit the `officeId` parameter. |
| onlyAssignable | boolean | When **true,** returns only the roles that the current user can assign to someone else. The default value is **false.** |
| onlyEnabled | boolean | When true, only returns room templates that are not disabled. |
| count | integer | The number of results. When this property is used as a request parameter specifying the number of results to return, the value must be a number between `1` and `100` (default). |
| startPosition | integer | The index position within the total result set from which to start returning values. The default value is `0`. |

\* Required

title: TaskLists Category
text:
Your administrator may also have created custom task list templates that can be added to rooms. If your administrator created room templates, those room templates may include task lists for you to use.

[TaskLists](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/tasklists/tasklists/)

Description

The `TaskLists` resource helps you keep track of the documents and activities you must complete before you can close a room.

title: : CreateTaskList
text:

[TaskLists](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/tasklists/tasklists/)

title: : CreateTaskList
text:
Applies a task list to a room, based on the `taskTemplateId` that you specify in the `taskList` request body.

**Note:** You must first create a task list template in the console. You cannot create a task list template by using the API at this time. To get the `taskListTemplateId`, use the TaskListTemplates: GetTaskListTemplates method.

title: : CreateTaskList
text: You must have the `canApplyTaskList` permission set to **true.**

title: : CreateTaskList
text:
POST

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms/{roomId}/task_lists
```

title: : CreateTaskList
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| roomId \* | integer | The ID of the room. |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

\* Required

title: : GetTaskLists
text:
[API Reference](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/tasklists/tasklists/gettasklists/)[API Explorer](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/tasklists/tasklists/gettasklists/?explorer=true)

[TaskLists](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/tasklists/tasklists/)

title: : GetTaskLists
text: Returns the task lists associated with a room.

title: : GetTaskLists
text:
You must either be a member of the room who has been added to one or more tasks, or have one of the following permissions set to **true:**

- `canAddTasksToAnyTaskLists`
- `canApplyTaskList`
- `canRemoveAnyTaskList`
- `canSubmitTaskList`
- `canReviewTaskList`

**Note:** If a room has multiple tasks lists, you only see the task lists that contain tasks to which you have been added.

title: : GetTaskLists
text:
GET

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/rooms/{roomId}/task_lists
```

title: : GetTaskLists
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| roomId \* | integer | The ID of the room. |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

\* Required

title: : GetTaskListTemplates
text: Returns all task list templates associated with the active user's company.

title: : GetTaskListTemplates
text: Anyone with a valid access token can call this method.

title: : GetTaskListTemplates
text:
GET

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/task_list_templates
```

title: : GetTaskListTemplates
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

| Query Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| startPosition | integer | The starting zero-based index position from which to start returning values. The default is `0`. |
| count | integer | The number of results to return. This value must be a number between `1` and `100` (default). |

\* Required

title: Users Category
text:
A user is a person who is either added to a room (as a participant), or who is a member of a company. This section shows you how to manage users, including how to update and delete National Association of REALTORS® member numbers.

[Users](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/users/users/)

Description

The Users resource provides methods that enable you to add, update, delete, and manage users. A user is a person who is either added to a room (as a participant), or who is a member of a company.

title: Users Resource
text: A new user is created when an account administrator or another authorized user sends an invitation to an email address. After the invitation is sent, the user's status is `pending`. When the recipient accepts the invitation, their user status switches to `active`.

title: Users Resource
heading_path: Inviting a user to a room
text:
To invite a user to a room,
use the [Rooms: InviteUser](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/inviteuser/) method.
You can invite anyone to join a room by specifying their email address.

The `canAddUsersToRooms` permission must be **true** to invite a user to a room.

title: Users Resource
heading_path: Adding a user to a company Rooms account
text:
To invite a user to a company account, use the [Users: InviteUser](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/users/users/inviteuser/) method.

You must be either an account administrator (Default Admin)
or another authorized user who is assigned
a company role that has one of the following `userPermissions` set to **true:**

- `canAddMemberAndSetRoleLowerAccessLevel`: Users can add other users who have a lower access level than their own and set those users' roles (in offices or regions that they oversee).
- `canAddMemberAndSetRoleSameAccessLevel`: Users can add other users who have the same access level as their own and set those users' roles (in offices or regions that they oversee or belong to).

**Note:** Before you invite users, Docusign strongly recommends that you set up custom roles for your company. For more information, see [Roles](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/roles/roles/).

title: Users Resource
text:
| Method | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [AddUserToOffice](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/users/users/addusertooffice/) | POST  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/users/{userId}/add_to_office ```  Adds a user to an office. |
| [AddUserToRegion](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/users/users/addusertoregion/) | POST  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/users/{userId}/add_to_region ```  Adds a user to a region. |
| [GetUser](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/users/users/getuser/) | GET  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/users/{userId} ```  Gets a user. |
| [GetUsers](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/users/users/getusers/) | GET  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/users ```  Gets a list of users. |
| [InviteUser](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/users/users/inviteuser/) | POST  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/users/invite_user ```  Invites a user to a company account. |
| [LockUser](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/users/users/lockuser/) | POST  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/users/{userId}/lock ```  Locks a user's account. |
| [ReinviteUser](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/users/users/reinviteuser/) | POST  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/users/{userId}/reinvite ```  Reinvites a user to join a company account. |
| [RemoveUser](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/users/users/removeuser/) | DEL  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/users/{userId} ```  Removes a user from a company account. |
| [RemoveUserFromOffice](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/users/users/removeuserfromoffice/) | POST  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/users/{userId}/remove_from_office ```  Removes a user from an office. |
| [RemoveUserFromRegion](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/users/users/removeuserfromregion/) | POST  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/users/{userId}/remove_from_region ```  Removes a user from a region. |
| [UnlockUser](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/users/users/unlockuser/) | POST  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/users/{userId}/unlock ```  Unlocks a user's account. |
| [UpdateUser](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/users/users/updateuser/) | PUT  ```  /restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/users/{userId} ```  Updates a user's default office. |

title: : AddUserToOffice
text:
[API Reference](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/users/users/addusertooffice/)[API Explorer](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/users/users/addusertooffice/?explorer=true)

[Users](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/users/users/)

title: : AddUserToOffice
text:
Adds an existing user to a single office. You specify the office to which you want to add the user in the `designatedOffice` request body.

To add a user to multiple offices, you must make this call separately for each office.

**Note:** The `accessLevel` of the user that you are adding must be `contributor` or `office`.

title: : AddUserToOffice
text:
You must have at least one of the following permissions set to **true,** depending on the level of the user that you want to add or remove:

- `canManageMemberLowerAccessLevel`: Users can add and remove other users who have a lower access level than their own (in offices or regions that they oversee) from a region or office. They can also modify those users.
- `canManageMemberSameAccessLevel`: Users can add and remove other users who have the same access level as their own (in offices or regions that they oversee or belong to) from a region or office. They can also modify those users.

title: : AddUserToOffice
text:
POST

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/users/{userId}/add_to_office
```

title: : AddUserToOffice
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| userId \* | integer | The ID of the user to add. |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

\* Required

title: : GetUsers
text:
[API Reference](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/users/users/getusers/)[API Explorer](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/users/users/getusers/?explorer=true)

[Users](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/users/users/)

title: : GetUsers
text: Returns a list of users associated with an account based on the criteria that you specify.

title: : GetUsers
text:
GET

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/users
```

title: : GetUsers
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

| Query Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| filter | string | Filters results by name and email address. This is a "starts with" filter, which means that you can enter only the beginning of a name or email address.  **Note:** You do not use a wildcard with this filter. |
| sort | string | Specifies how to sort the results. Valid values are:   - `FirstNameAsc` - `LastNameAsc` - `EmailAsc` - `FirstNameDesc` - `LastNameDesc` - `EmailDesc` |
| defaultOfficeId | integer | Filters for users who have this office ID as their default office ID. |
| accessLevel | string | Filters for users who have the specified access level. A user's access level and role determine the types of resources and actions that are available to them.  Valid values are:   - Company: Users with this access level can administer resources across the company. - Region: Users with this access level can administer offices and other resources within their regions. - Office: Users with this access level can administer resources within their offices. - Contributor: Users with this access level can only administer their own resources.   **Note:** In requests, the values that you may use for this property depend on your permissions and whether you can add users at your access level or lower. |
| titleId | integer | This field is deprecated in Rooms Version 6. |
| roleId | integer | Filters for users who have the specified `roleId`. |
| status | string | Filters for users who have the specified `status`.  Valid values are:   - `Active`: The user is active. - `Pending`: The user has been invited but has not yet accepted the invitation. |
| lockedOnly | boolean | When **true,** filters for users whose accounts are locked. |
| startPosition | integer | The starting zero-based index position within the result set from which to begin the response. The default is `0`. |
| count | integer | The maximum number of users to return in the response. This value must be a number between `1` and `100` (default). |

\* Required

title: : InviteUser
text:
[API Reference](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/users/users/inviteuser/)[API Explorer](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/users/users/inviteuser/?explorer=true)

[Users](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/users/users/)

title: : InviteUser
text: Invites a new user to join a company account. You specify the custom role and access level that you want to give to the user in the `invitee` request body.

title: : InviteUser
text:
To invite users to a company, you must be either a Default Admin or another authorized user who has access to all of the locations to which the new user is being invited and one of the following `userPermissions` set to **true:**

- `canAddMemberAndSetRoleLowerAccessLevel`: Users can add other users who have a lower access level than their own and set those users' roles (in offices or regions that they oversee).
- `canAddMemberAndSetRoleSameAccessLevel`: Users can add other users who have the same access level as their own or lower and set those users' roles (in offices or regions that they oversee or belong to).

**Important:** Docusign strongly recommends that you set up custom roles for your company before inviting users. If you do not, all new users will be added as administrators. For more information, see [Roles](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/roles/roles/).

title: : InviteUser
text:
POST

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/users/invite_user
```

title: : InviteUser
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

\* Required

[Users](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/users/users/)

title: : LockUser
text: Locks the account of the specified user. Use the `reason` property in the request body to specify why the account was locked.

title: : LockUser
text:
To lock a user who has a lower access level than you, you must have the `canManageMemberLowerAccessLevel` permission set to **true.**
To lock a user who has the same access level as you, you must have the `canManageMemberSameAccessLevel` permission set to **true**

title: : LockUser
text:
POST

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/users/{userId}/lock
```

title: : LockUser
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| userId \* | integer | ID of the user to lock. |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

\* Required

title: : ReinviteUser
text:
Reinvites an unactivated user to join a company account.

Invitations expire after 30 days and can no longer be accepted. Use this method to send a new copy of an invitation to a pending user.

title: : ReinviteUser
text:
POST

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/users/{userId}/reinvite
```

title: : ReinviteUser
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| userId \* | integer | The ID of the user to reinvite. |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

\* Required

title: : RemoveUserFromOffice
text:
[API Reference](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/users/users/removeuserfromoffice/)[API Explorer](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/users/users/removeuserfromoffice/?explorer=true)

[Users](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/users/users/)

title: : RemoveUserFromOffice
text:
Removes a user from a single office. You specify the office from which you want to remove the user in the `designatedOffice` request body.

The user still maintains their other office, region, company, and account associations.

**Note:** You cannot remove a user from their default office. You must first assign the user a different default office by using the [Users: updateUser](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/users/users/updateuser/) method.

title: : RemoveUserFromOffice
text:
You must have at least one of the following permissions set to **true,** depending on the level of the user that you want to add or remove:

- `canManageMemberLowerAccessLevel`: Users can add or remove other users who have a lower access level than their own (in offices or regions that they oversee) from a region or office.
- `canManageMemberSameAccessLevel`: Users can modify other users who have the same access level as their own (in offices or regions that they oversee or belong to) from a region or office.

title: : RemoveUserFromOffice
text:
POST

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/users/{userId}/remove_from_office
```

title: : RemoveUserFromOffice
text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| userId \* | integer | The ID of the user to remove. |
| accountId \* | string | The globally unique identifier (GUID) for the account. |

\* Required

title: : RemoveUserFromRegion
text:
Removes a user from a single region. You specify the region from which you want to remove the user in the `designatedRegion` request body.

The user still maintains their other region, company, and account associations.

title: : RemoveUserFromRegion
text:
You must have at least one of the following permissions set to **true,** depending on the level of the user that you want to add or remove:

- `canManageMemberLowerAccessLevel`: Users can add or remove other users who have a lower access level than their own (in offices or regions that they oversee) from a region or office.
- `canManageMemberSameAccessLevel`: Users can modify other users who have the same access level as their own (in offices or regions that they oversee or belong to) from a region or office.

**Note:** You cannot remove a user from the region that contains their default office. You must first change the user's default office by using the Users: UpdateUser method.

title: : RemoveUserFromRegion
text:
POST

```
/restapi/v2/accounts/{accountId}/users/{userId}/remove_from_region
```

text:
| Path Parameters |  |  |

You must have at least one of the following permissions set to **true,** depending on the level of the user that you want to update:

- `canManageMemberLowerAccessLevel`: Users can modify other users who have a lower access level than their own (in offices or regions that they oversee).
- `canManageMemberSameAccessLevel`: Users can modify other users who have the same access level as their own (in offices or regions that they oversee or belong to).

title: Rooms API 101
text:
*Docusign Rooms* simplifies complex agreements by bringing together each person involved with a transaction in a digital space called a *room* where every detail, task, and transaction document is centrally located and managed.

In Docusign Rooms, you set the requirements for each party by assigning *roles* to the people involved in the transaction. Roles can be assigned tasks to complete (typically viewing, uploading, or signing documents) and can have different levels of access to the room’s data and functionality; for example, a seller or agent would typically have greater visibility and access than a buyer. The room records the complete history of each action taken within the room and, when the transaction is complete, archives this information for your records.

Each room is integrated with [Docusign eSignature functionality](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/esign-rest-api/esign101/) and can be created easily and simply using  [templated task information](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/rooms101/templates/). Different templates, task lists, and roles can be created for different regions and offices within your company, enabling you to comply easily with different regional transaction processes and requirements.

title: Rooms API 101
text:
Docusign Rooms for Real Estate is built on the Rooms API, which enables you to perform some actions programmatically within your own apps, such as importing data to create a room. See [How to create a room with data](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/create-room-with-data/) for details.

**Note:** A given Docusign account may be linked with a Rooms for Real Estate account.

The advantages of using Rooms to manage real estate transactions include:

- Standardizing your procedures by creating templates and task lists that you can use over and over.
- Defining simple, clear responsibilities for each room participant by assigning lists of specific tasks.
- Integrating with Docusign eSignature functionality.
- Controlling company standards and real estate procedures across many different regions and offices.
- Manage your user permissions and responsibilities with custom roles and permission sets.

title: Rooms API 101
text:
The Rooms API enables you to perform most Rooms actions programmatically, rather than manually through the UI. This is useful for automating and integrating Rooms functionality within your own apps and reducing data entry.

- Use the Rooms API for automated tasks and data entry (such as importing or exporting data to or from a room).
- Use the UI for management tasks, administration scenarios, and to perform actions that are not yet supported by the Rooms API.

**Note:** The Rooms API will be expanded in upcoming releases to support additional functionality, including management and administration tasks.

title: Authentication
text:
Before your application can make calls to the Rooms API, it must authenticate and obtain an access token. You must submit this access token, which proves your app’s identity and authorization, with each request.

You can use any supported OAuth2 authentication workflows to obtain an access token and make calls to the Rooms API: [Authorization Code Grant](https://developers.docusign.com/platform/auth/confidential-authcode-get-token/), [Implicit Grant](https://developers.docusign.com/platform/auth/implicit/implicit-get-token/), or [JSON Web Token (JWT) Grant](https://developers.docusign.com/platform/auth/jwt/jwt-get-token/). Service integrations may use Authorization Code Grant or JWT grant, while mobile apps may use Implicit Grant. See [platform authentication](https://developers.docusign.com/platform/auth/) for an overview of these grants and how to choose which grant to use for your app.

title: Authentication
text:
Before you can use the Docusign Rooms API, you need the following:

1. A Docusign eSignature developer account and a Docusign Rooms account.
   - [Create an eSignature developer account](https://www.docusign.com/developers/sandbox?postActivateUrl=https://developers.docusign.com/&_gl=1*1d3gman*_gcl_au*ODczOTUxNTUwLjE3MjcyOTgwNDc.).
   - [Create a Rooms developer account](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/rooms101/create-account/).
2. An [integration key](https://developers.docusign.com/platform/configure-app/#integration-key) that identifies your app.
3. A defined [redirect URI](https://developers.docusign.com/platform/configure-app/#redirect-uri) for your integration key. This is the URL the user's internet browser will be sent to the redirect URI after authentication is complete.
4. You must also have configured your app correctly for the OAuth type you want to use. For details, see [configure your app](https://developers.docusign.com/platform/configure-app/).

title: Authentication
text:
The only difference between authenticating with the Rooms API and the eSignature API is that when you request an access token for your OAuth2 scenario, you must request a special Rooms API [scope](https://developers.docusign.com/platform/auth/reference/scopes/) during the authentication process. You can combine Rooms scopes with eSignature API scopes.

You can choose from the following Rooms scopes:

| **Scope** | **Description** |
| --- | --- |
| `dtr.rooms.read` | Read rooms data. |
| `dtr.rooms.write` | Update the data of a room. |
| `dtr.documents.read` | Read documents from Docusign Rooms. |
| `dtr.documents.write` | Write documents to Docusign Rooms. |
| `dtr.profile.read` | Read profile data for accounts or signers associated with your company. |
| `dtr.profile.write` | Write profile data to accounts or signers associated with your company. |
| `dtr.company.read` | Read information from all rooms and profiles associated with your company. |
| `dtr.company.write` | Write information to all rooms and profiles associated with your company. |
| `room_forms` | Use endpoints related to the forms feature. |
| `signature` | The eSignature API `signature` scope is required to call the [GetESignPermissionProfiles](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/esignpermissionprofiles/esignpermissionprofiles/getesignpermissionprofiles/) method. |

- Using Authorization Code Grant, you request scopes when you make the authorization code request.
- Using Implicit Grant, you request scopes when you make the access token request.
- Using JWT Grant, you request scopes in the body of the JWT token.

title: Authentication
text:
- See [authentication](https://developers.docusign.com/platform/auth/) in the Platform 101 documentation for an overview of each OAuth grant and how to choose which grant to use for your app.
- Learn how to implement each authentication flow by viewing these guides:
  - How to [obtain an access token with Confidential Authorization Code Grant](https://developers.docusign.com/platform/auth/confidential-authcode-get-token/).
  - How to [obtain an access token with Implicit Grant](https://developers.docusign.com/platform/auth/implicit-get-token/).
  - How to [obtain an access token with JWT Grant](https://developers.docusign.com/platform/auth/jwt-get-token/).
