title: Rooms concepts
text:
The Docusign Rooms API is based around these objects:

- [Companies](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/rooms101/concepts/#companies): A company may contain regions and offices, and be associated with rooms, roles, and users. Docusign sets up your company in Rooms as part of the account activation process. Similar to eSignature, the first user on the account automatically has the Default Admin role for the company's Rooms account. This user's role can be changed at a later time.
- [Roles](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/rooms101/concepts/#roles): Roles define user permissions. When users are invited to join the company, they are assigned a role. Roles can be added, edited, and deleted by a user who has permission to do so.
- [Users](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/rooms101/concepts/#users): Individuals who are associated with your company or with a specific room.
- [Rooms](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/rooms101/concepts/#rooms): A room is a digital workspace that holds all of the documents, users, data, and other information associated with a transaction.
- [Transaction sides](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/rooms101/concepts/#transaction-sides): In Rooms for Real Estate, this is the part your company plays in the transaction, such as **buy** or **sell**.
- [Fieldsets](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/rooms101/concepts/#fieldsets): Preconfigured sets of data fields that appear on a room’s **Details** tab.
- [Documents](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/rooms101/concepts/#documents): A document in Rooms is similar to a document in eSignature. Rooms can hold documents that room users or other parties must sign.
- [Forms](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/rooms101/concepts/#forms): Common forms from relevant industry associations that Docusign makes available through integrated form libraries, or your own custom forms.
- [Room templates](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/rooms101/concepts/#room-templates): Creating a room from a room template enables users with the correct permissions to standardize rooms for common transactions. Room templates can be made available to the whole company or specific regions or offices.
- [Room task lists](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/rooms101/concepts/#room-task-lists): Importing a standardized task list into a new room enables users with the correct permissions to assign common tasks and make sure they’re completed before a transaction is closed out. Users with the correct permissions can create task list templates to standardize tasks, and make them available to the whole company or specific regions or offices.

title: Rooms concepts
text: Docusign sets up your *company* in Rooms for you and assigns a Default Admin. That user can then add other admins, regions, offices, roles, and users who will use Rooms.

title: Rooms concepts
text:
A *role* defines a set of permissions. Roles are either internal or external. You assign external roles to people from outside your company when you invite them into a room. You can configure custom roles with permissions that make sense for your company.

Docusign also offers preconfigured roles. For example, real estate companies can use the Default Admin, Agent, and Transaction Coordinator roles. You can use them as they are, customize them, or create your own roles from scratch.

People inside your company can have different roles based on the rooms to which they are added. Each person has a default company role, but you can assign them lower or external room roles as necessary. Regardless of the person's default company role, what they can do in a room is entirely controlled by their role in that particular room.

An admin user must configure roles for your company by using either the [Roles:CreateRole](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/roles/roles/createrole/) method or the UI before you can add users. To learn more about working with roles and the types of roles you can configure, see the [Roles category](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/roles/) in the API reference and the [permissions reference](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/roles/roles/createrole/#schema__roleforcreate_permissions).

title: Rooms concepts
text:
*Users* are individuals who are invited to your company, or to a room. There are two types of users:

- **Company users:** Your organization’s internal staff. Company users can be added to specific regions and offices.
- **Room users:** Users who have been invited to a specific room, as well as the creator of the room. They can either be external or internal users. For example, you might invite an external real estate agent or buyer to a room.

title: Rooms concepts
text:
A *room* is a secure workspace in the Docusign Agreement Cloud that's associated with a specific transaction. Rooms enable you to streamline complex agreements that include multiple parties, documents, and stages. To learn more about working with rooms, see:

- [How to create a room with data](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/create-room-with-data/)
- [How to create a room with a template](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/create-room-with-template/)
- [How to export data from a room](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/export-room-data/)
- [How to add forms to a room](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/add-form-to-room/)
- [How to get a room with filters](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/get-room-with-filters/)

title: Rooms concepts
text: A *transaction side* indicates a side of a real estate transaction, such as buy, sell, refinance, or both buy and sell. You need to specify a transaction side when you create a new room in Rooms for Real Estate.

title: Rooms concepts
text: A *fieldset* is a preconfigured set of fields that display on a room’s **Details** tab, such as **Contact Name** and **Phone**. You can even populate values for the fields at the time that you create a new room. You specify the fields and corresponding values in the `fieldData` object when you create the room. For more information, see [How to create a room with data](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/create-room-with-data/).

title: Rooms concepts
text: Documents in Rooms are similar to documents in eSignature. Users with the appropriate permissions can add documents to a room. You can share documents with others in the room. Sharing is explicit, except in the case of certain permissions, such as when the **Automatically share documents in the room with other users from the same office** permission is set.

title: Rooms concepts
text:
If your organization uses Docusign forms, you can add standard association forms to a room. Docusign Rooms provides access to forms from industry associations, such as the Mainstreet Organization of Realtors, via integrated form libraries. These libraries enable you to add these forms to your rooms directly by using the Rooms API. For example, if you have the appropriate permissions, you can use the [Rooms:AddFormToRoom](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/addformtoroom/) method to add the form **Short Sale Supplement to Marketing Agreement.pdf** to a new room or room template for short sale transactions.

With the appropriate permissions, form administrators at your company can create form groups, or curated sets of forms gathered from the association form libraries to which Docusign provides access. Form groups enable agents to know which forms to add to rooms based on the type of transaction they are working on. When creating groups, administrators can make certain forms required to ensure compliance.

To learn more about working with forms, see:

- [Forms](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/rooms101/forms/)
- [Using forms in a room](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/rooms101/forms/using-forms-in-a-room/)
- [Managing forms](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/rooms101/forms/managing-forms-rooms/)
- [How to add forms to a room](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/add-form-to-room/)
- The [Forms category](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/forms/) in the API reference

title: Rooms concepts
text: A *room template* holds room information and tasks for room participants. By specifying a template when you create a room, you can automatically import this data. You create room templates in the UI. To learn more, see [How to create a room with a template](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/create-room-with-template/).

title: Rooms concepts
text: A *room task list* holds a checklist of steps for a common transaction type. By specifying a task list when you create a room, you standardize the tasks that must be completed for the transaction. The assignees must check the items off the list before a room can be closed.

title: Rooms concepts
text:
- See the [How-to guides](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/) for code examples for common Rooms API scenarios.
- See the MyAPICalls sample app [Create a Room](https://myapicalls.sampleapps.docusign.com/scenario/8) scenario, which walks you through a sequence of API calls that define a role and then define a room associated with that role.

title: Creating a Rooms developer account
text:
To use Docusign Rooms functionality, you need to create a company Rooms account. This account will contain all of your member (employee) accounts, any rooms you create, and all of the metadata associated with those members and rooms. As with the eSignature REST API, Rooms accounts can be created in either the *developer account* (demo) or *production* environment.

You can create a Rooms developer account for free, which you can use to see, experiment with, and develop for the Rooms API functionality. You can create a Rooms production account (which can use your Rooms developer account data) by purchasing one of the Rooms API Docusign products. Once you’re ready, you can promote your app from your Rooms developer account to your production account by completing the [Go-Live](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/go-live/) process.

You can create a new company Rooms API developer account using the following steps:

1. [Create an eSignature developer account](https://www.docusign.com/developers/sandbox?postActivateUrl=https://developers.docusign.com/&_gl=1*1d3gman*_gcl_au*ODczOTUxNTUwLjE3MjcyOTgwNDc.). Because Rooms integrates eSignature functionality, you must have an existing eSignature account before you can create a Rooms account.
2. Contact Docusign to request a Rooms account via support-re@docusign.com. Include the following information:
   - Your company’s name and address.
   - Your developer account ID. To find your **Account ID**, log in to your eSignature developer account, then select your account portrait to access your profile. Copy the **Account ID** value that appears directly below your name in the displayed drop-down menu.
   - Your API Account ID. To find your **API Account ID**, log in to your eSignature developer account and select **Admin**, then click [Apps and Keys](https://admindemo.docusign.com/authenticate?goTo=appsAndKeys). Copy your **API Account ID** value
3. After you have provided this information, Docusign will send you a confirmation email. When you receive it, go on to step 4.
4. [Log in to your eSignature developer account](https://apps-d.docusign.com) from an incognito browser window, select your portrait at the top right of the window, then select **Switch to Rooms**.
   Re-enter your developer credentials if prompted. On the **Link your Docusign eSignature and Rooms accounts** page, select **Sign up for a Rooms Account** at the bottom of the page, then select **Sign Up** to open the dashboard of your new Rooms account.

   ![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg height='383' width='600' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' version='1.1'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

   ![Link your Docusign eSignature and Rooms accounts](https://images.ctfassets.net/aj9z008chlq0/3z3RsAvhCymwaUUlHjQRvY/590dc8f7527aae07b21bff1e89444c74/Link_page.png?w=600&h=383&q=50&fm=png)

   ![](data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,%3Csvg height='341' width='600' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' version='1.1'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

   ![Sign up with your Docusign account](https://images.ctfassets.net/aj9z008chlq0/57UUI47ox5y75KeCfdWQnI/b7d08a785911053d88ba7480205d9f61/Sign_Up.png?w=600&h=341&q=50&fm=png)
5. Select **Accept Agreement** to accept the agreement.

You are now an administrator of the new account with access to both eSignature and Rooms functionality. Go to the [Rooms sign-in page](https://demo.rooms.docusign.com/?_gl=1*18k5ei6*_gcl_au*MTI0OTM5NDAwMi4xNzU4NzUwNzU4LjUyODkwODgzLjE3NjYwODM2MTMuMTc2NjA4MzYxMw..*FPAU*MTI0OTM5NDAwMi4xNzU4NzUwNzU4) to sign in to your new rooms account.

title: Forms
text:
*Forms* are standard preset documents imported to your company’s Rooms account for easy reuse. These documents, typically association forms or other documents required for legal compliance in real estate transactions, can be compiled into *form groups* by forms administrators (users in your account who have been granted permission to manage forms). A form group should contain all of the forms required for a specific type of transaction in a specific area.

When a room is created, a user, typically an agent, can add forms to the room from a form library or a form group depending on their permissions and company setup.

Docusign Forms is partnered with and automatically supports forms from many real estate associations, and you can contact the Account Manager to add your own custom forms. Your agents can add their National Realtor Database System (NRDS) ID, either when prompted or manually via the **Rooms Settings** menu, to unlock additional supported forms.

**Note:** Forms is a Rooms for Real Estate feature. There is no comparable feature in Rooms for Mortgage.

title: Forms
text:
Docusign Forms is not enabled by default. To enable this feature, contact your Account Manager or Business Development representative.

**Note**: To call the forms endpoints in the Rooms API, you must have the `room_forms` scope. See [Rooms API authentication](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/rooms101/auth/) for details.

title: Forms
text: The Rooms API forms endpoints provide the same functionality as the UI for forms, with the exception that some form providers are not available: only the National Association of Realtors (NAR) and the Georgia Association of Realtors (GAR) can be used as providers.

title: Managing forms
text:
*Forms* are standard preset documents imported to your company’s Rooms account for easy reuse.

**Note:** Forms is a Rooms for Real Estate feature. There is no comparable feature in Rooms for Mortgage.

title: Managing forms
text:
Forms access policies and Forms Groups are created and managed by forms administrators. A user must have the **rooms\_forms** permission assigned to their user to become a forms administrator; this gives them access to the **FORMS** tab in the Rooms admin panel.

**Note:** Form access is office-specific. If a member has access only to specific offices, they can only administer form groups for those offices. During the process of setting up the Forms feature, you can set a different permission, "Manage form libraries," that enables you to make individual libraries visible to specific offices.

title: Managing forms
text:
Expanded by Rooms API v2

The *Form groups* feature enables you to connect any number of your forms into a group that you can share to specific roles and offices. This is useful to:

- Help your agents easily find and choose the forms they need to work with, rather than having to look through large libraries to find them. Form groups only contain the forms from your libraries that you choose.
- Create groups of forms used in specific tasks that your agents perform frequently. You can share your form groups with specific offices to ensure that your agents they have exactly what they need for their work.
- Share forms from multiple libraries to agents without sharing the full contents of each library. You (or any users who you authorize to manage the form group) can take any form from any libraries that you can access and add it to a form group.

To work with form groups in v2 of the Rooms API, you need to add the `manage form groups` scope to your [OAuth request](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/rooms101/auth/) in addition to the existing Rooms API scopes.

See [How to create a form group](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/create-form-group/) for an example of how to define a new form group using the API.

title: Managing forms
text:
- See [How to add forms to a room](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/add-form-to-room/) for a full code example demonstrating how to add a form to a room.
- See [Using forms in a room](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/rooms101/forms/using-forms-in-a-room/) for details on how forms work within a room.
- For more code examples demonstrating how to work with form groups, see [How to create a form group](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/create-form-group/), [How to assign a form to a form group](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/assign-form-group/), and [How to grant office access to a form group](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/access-form-group/).

title: Using forms in a room
text:
Forms are standard preset documents imported to your company’s Rooms account for easy reuse. These documents, typically association forms or other documents required for legal compliance in real estate transactions, can be compiled into form groups by forms administrators (users in your account who have been granted permission to manage forms). A form group should contain all of the forms required for a specific type of transaction in a specific area.

When a room is created, a user, typically an agent, can add forms to the room from a form library or a form group depending on their permissions and company setup.

Docusign Forms is partnered with and automatically supports forms from many real estate associations, and you can contact the Account Manager to add your own custom forms. Your agents can add their National Realtor Database System (NRDS) ID, either when prompted or manually via the **Rooms Settings** menu, to unlock additional supported forms.

See [how to add forms to a room](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/add-form-to-room/) for a full code example demonstrating how to add a form to a room.

**Note:** Forms is a Rooms for Real Estate feature. There is no comparable feature in Rooms for Mortgage.

title: Using forms in a room
text: Data between all forms in a room is shared. When you update a field in one form, such as the seller’s name, all other forms that contain that field will also be updated. The room’s **Details** tab will also be updated with this data, reducing data entry and ensuring consistency across multiple forms.

title: Using forms in a room
text:
You can integrate forms from a room into your app, enabling your users to fill out those forms using your own app’s UI and workflow via the embedded form fill feature.

To embed a form to fill out in your app, you need the ID of the room containing the form and the ID of the form to be filled out.

**Note:** Embedded form fill is only available in v2 of the Rooms API.

title: API rules and resource limits
text: This page lists the limits on file sizes, requests per hour and minute, and other restrictions on using the Rooms API.

title: API rules and resource limits
text:
Docusign Rooms has the following limitations on files:

- 35 MB per upload
- 25 MB per upload to an envelope within a room

title: API rules and resource limits
text: The maximum request size for an incoming HTTP request is 40 MB.

title: API rules and resource limits
text:
Hourly API usage is tracked from the time of the first call. For example, if your first call is made at 10:15, the limit would refresh at 11:15.

If you exceed the API rate limit, you will receive an error: ‘The maximum number of hourly API invocations has been exceeded.’

title: Using room templates and task lists
heading_path: Using room templates and task lists
text:
You can save time and simplify your company’s processes by using a *room template* and one or more *task lists* when you create a new room. For example, if your company has a common set of steps and requirements for each mortgage loan transaction, you could create a room template containing that common task list data and use it to pre-populate each new mortgage loan room. This would ensure that every time someone creates a mortgage loan transaction room, it would also include all of the required tasks.
Templates are created for one side of a transaction (if in [Rooms for Real Estate](https://www.docusign.com/products/rooms-for-real-estate?_gl=1*av7kpr*_gcl_au*MTk3ODAwMTU2NC4xNzY2MTc1ODQ3/)), are locked to a region/office, and may contain one or more task lists. The tasks defined in a task list hold the bulk of template data and can include:

- Due dates
- Required assignee actions and permissions associated with the task
- Descriptions of the documents associated with the task
- The roles which have actions associated with the task
- Reminders, and when they will be delivered

  **Note:** A single task list may be part of multiple templates, so long as they are set to the same region/office.

title: Using room templates and task lists
heading_path: Using room templates and task lists
Create a room from a template
text:
Before creating a room from a template, you should first:

1. **Add a Task list**. Task lists contain one or more tasks that room members can complete. See [Create Task List Templates to Group Common Transaction Activities﻿](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?language=en_US&bundleId=clr1643042075783&topicId=lkn1572968392044.html&*LANG=enus&_gl=1*sy1ig8*_gcl_au*MTI0OTM5NDAwMi4xNzU4NzUwNzU4LjUyODkwODgzLjE3NjYwODM2MTMuMTc2NjA4MzYxMw..*FPAU*MTI0OTM5NDAwMi4xNzU4NzUwNzU4) for details on how to create a task list.
2. **Define a room template**, which contains your task list. See [Create Room Templates to Auto-Populate New Rooms With Task Lists](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?language=en_US&bundleId=hyt1643056100211&topicId=bir1572968393341.html&_LANG=enus&_gl=1*u4uc6o*_gcl_au*MTI0OTM5NDAwMi4xNzU4NzUwNzU4LjUyODkwODgzLjE3NjYwODM2MTMuMTc2NjA4MzYxMw..*FPAU*MTI0OTM5NDAwMi4xNzU4NzUwNzU4) for details on how to create a room template.

Once you have a template, you can use it to create a new room with the Rooms UI or the [Rooms:CreateRoom](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/createroom/) method. See [Create Room Templates to Auto-Populate New Rooms With Task List](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?language=en_US&_gl=1*2dduy3*_gcl_au*MTI0OTM5NDAwMi4xNzU4NzUwNzU4LjUyODkwODgzLjE3NjYwODM2MTMuMTc2NjA4MzYxMw..*FPAU*MTI0OTM5NDAwMi4xNzU4NzUwNzU4&bundleId=clr1643042075783&topicId=bir1572968393341.html&_LANG=enus) for details on how to create a room with a template using the UI.

To create a room from your template with the API [Rooms:CreateRoom](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/rooms/rooms/createroom/) method, you must provide the ID of the template to be used in the body of the request.
> **Note:** To find your API Account ID, log in to [eSignature Admin](https://admindemo.docusign.com/) and select **Apps and Keys** in the **Integrations** section of the left nav bar to open the **API and Integration Key Information** page. Your API Account ID is shown in the **My Account Information** section.

The following example API call demonstrates how to create a room from a previously defined template:
> **Note:** You can get the IDs of your templates by using the [RoomTemplates:GetRoomTemplates](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/roomtemplates/roomtemplates/getroomtemplates/) method, which will return data about all of the room templates you can access.

These examples require the following data:

| Requirement | Description |
| --- | --- |
| {ACCESS\_TOKEN} | An access token with the Docusign `dtr.rooms.write` scope. See [Authentication](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/rooms101/auth/) for details on obtaining an access token. |
| `roleId` | The ID of the role assigned to the room owner. You can get the list of roles for your account using the [Roles:GetRoles](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/roles/roles/getroles/) method. |
| `templateId` | The ID of a template belonging to your account. You can get the list of templates defined for your account using the [RoomTemplates:GetRoomTemplates](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/roomtemplates/roomtemplates/getroomtemplates/) method. |
| `officeId` | The ID of an office belonging to your account. You can get the list of offices for your account using the [Offices:GetOffices](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/reference/offices/offices/getoffices/) method. |

See [how to create a Room with a template](https://developers.docusign.com/docs/rooms-api/how-to/create-room-with-template/) for a more detailed, in-depth code example demonstrating how to create a new room using a template in a variety of languages.

title: Upgrading from Docusign Rooms API v1.0 to v2.0
heading_path: Upgrading from Docusign Rooms API v1.0 to v2.0
text:
The release of Docusign Rooms API 2.0 brings a host of new features to enhance and expand your Docusign integration.
**Important:** The Docusign Developer Center only contains documentation for the latest version of the Rooms API (v2.0). The information on this page pertains to you only if you created your Docusign Rooms integration prior to September 16, 2019.

title: Upgrading from Docusign Rooms API v1.0 to v2.0
heading_path: Upgrading from Docusign Rooms API v1.0 to v2.0
Why upgrade to Rooms API v2.0?
text:
There are several benefits to upgrading your existing integrations from Rooms API v1.0 to v2.0 but please note that incompatible changes in v2.0 will require you to update your code.

- All new features and functionality will be made available only in Rooms API v2.0.
- The following Rooms API v1.0 endpoints do not support Version 6 of the Rooms platform:
- POST /v1/rooms
- POST /v1/members
- PUT /v1/members/{userId}
- GET /v1/meta/roles

title: Upgrading from Docusign Rooms API v1.0 to v2.0
heading_path: Upgrading from Docusign Rooms API v1.0 to v2.0
What is the difference between Rooms API v1.0 and v2.0?
text:
Here’s an overview of the differences between Docusign Rooms API versions:

- **Tip**: Some endpoints, such as user endpoints, clearly state which version of the Rooms platform they support.
- The API Account ID is required in the URL in Rooms API v2.0. As a reminder, the API Account ID is a GUID that you can find in your eSignature account. From the top menu, select **Admin**, then select **Apps and Keys**.
- v1.0 **Meta** endpoints are under the **Global Resources** category in Rooms API v2.0.
- v1.0 **Members** endpoints are under the **Users** category in Rooms API v2.0.
- In Rooms API v2.0, **Roles** is a separate category, and is not included in the **Global Resources** category. In Version 6 of Rooms, Roles are configurable per account. As a result, we created a new category with endpoints that enable you to manage roles, including but not limited to getting a list of roles, getting the details about a specific role, and creating and deleting roles.
- Room details are handled differently in v2.0 to support the advanced configurability of Version 6. There is a new `fieldSet` object that contains a preconfigured list of fields that appear on a room's **Details** tab. Each fieldset is identified by a `fieldSetId`. A fieldset helps you make sense of the field data that you can include when creating a room, updating a room, or pulling data from a room.

title: Task Components in Docusign Rooms
text:
On the task DETAILS tab, add the task name, due date, description,
and choose settings.

![rooms-task-details](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstaskdetails.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0NDQsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.CNmSTSqK6eV33VXKDqnNdO_k-sVL83n6adjNDDbbtXo&_LANG=enus)

| Field | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Task name | Enter a task name. |
| Due date | Optionally select a due date. The dates in the drop-down list are specific dates configured in the room's Details tab. For example, if you choose the transaction close date from the list, the task looks to the room's close date on the Details tab to determine the due date.  If you select a due date, a numerical field displays. This sets the number of days from the due date that the task must be completed. For example, if the due date is closing day on 1/15 and the date offset is -2 days, the task is due on 1/13. |
| Description | Enter a task description. If the task doesn't require a document, use the description to communicate what needs to be done. |
| Required Task | Select if the task must be completed to submit the task list and close the room. Required tasks must be reviewed. If you select Required Task, the Requires Review check box is selected and disabled. |
| Requires Review | Select if the reviewer(s) must approve the task. If selected, you need to choose at least one reviewer on the PEOPLE tab. Note: Optional tasks can require review. For example, a task to upload a document might require review, but if the document doesn't apply to the transaction, the member can skip it. |
| Task can be edited | Select to allow edits to the task. To edit the task, members must be on the task (as a watcher, assignee, or reviewer) and have a room role with permission to edit tasks. |
| Task can be deleted | Select to allow members to delete the task. To delete the task, members must be on the task (as a watcher, assignee, or reviewer) and have a room role with permission to delete tasks. |

title: Task Components in Docusign Rooms
text:
If the task requires someone to complete a document, type the document name in the
DOCUMENTS tab.

![rooms-task-document](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstaskdocument.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0NDQsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.CNmSTSqK6eV33VXKDqnNdO_k-sVL83n6adjNDDbbtXo&_LANG=enus)

Adding a document name creates a placeholder on the DOCUMENTS tab,
so users know which document to provide.

![rooms-task-placeholder-appraisal](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstaskplaceholderappraisal.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0NDQsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.CNmSTSqK6eV33VXKDqnNdO_k-sVL83n6adjNDDbbtXo&_LANG=enus)

Users can apply more than one document to a placeholder. Therefore, you can create one task
to upload multiple related documents.

title: Task Components in Docusign Rooms
text:
Designate the roles involved with the task on the PEOPLE tab.

![rooms-task-people](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstaskpeople.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0NDQsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.CNmSTSqK6eV33VXKDqnNdO_k-sVL83n6adjNDDbbtXo&_LANG=enus)

title: Task Components in Docusign Rooms
text:
Task responsibilities are: assignee, reviewer, and watcher. Assign role(s) to each of these
responsibilities. You can add multiple roles with the same responsibility if members with
any of those roles own that responsibility.

Select ADD under each responsibility (ADD ASSIGNEE/ADD REVIEWER/ADD
WATCHER) to assign roles. See the table below for an overview of task responsibilities.

Note: The person's room role also determines what they can do
with tasks. For example, a member with any of these responsibilities can edit the task if
their room role has Edit tasks permission (for editable tasks) or
Edit any task permission (for all tasks).

| Responsibility | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Assignee | Responsible for completing the task.  The assignee receives notifications when they are initially added to a task, task reminders, due dates, and action is taken on the task. |
| Reviewer | Responsible for approving or declining the task.  If you designate a reviewer, the task is set to Requires Review. Reviewers in the first review level receive a notification when the assignee completes the task.  Only the reviewer roles you specify on the task can review it. If some roles in your company should review any task, give those roles the Review any task permission.  To create an approval chain, where one level must approve the task before it moves to the next level, add review levels. |
| Watcher | Receives notifications when the task is completed or approved. |

Tip: You can assign a role as both the assignee and
the reviewer. For example, you might want a transaction coordinator to complete a task on
behalf of an agent, and be the reviewer on the task.

title: Task Components in Docusign Rooms
text:
You can add review levels to a task. Review levels are beneficial if your company needs to
approve tasks or documents through an approval chain. For example, when a member uploads a
document, you might want an office manager to approve the document first, then send it to
legal.

![rooms-task-review-levels](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstaskreviewlevels.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0NDQsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.CNmSTSqK6eV33VXKDqnNdO_k-sVL83n6adjNDDbbtXo&_LANG=enus)

In the Reviewer(s) section, select ADD REVIEW LEVEL to add up to
five review levels. At each level, someone with that room role must approve the task. Adding
multiple roles allows people with any of those roles to approve. A reviewer in level 1 must
approve the task before it can move to level 2, and so on.

When a task has multiple review levels, the current review level displays in the status
label (for example, In Review (level 2 of 2)).

![tasks-review-levels-2](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/tasksreviewlevels2.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0NDQsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.CNmSTSqK6eV33VXKDqnNdO_k-sVL83n6adjNDDbbtXo&_LANG=enus)

Reviewers see the current review level of the task in the Status
section.

![rooms-task-review-full-pane-status](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstaskreviewfullpanestatus.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0NDQsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.CNmSTSqK6eV33VXKDqnNdO_k-sVL83n6adjNDDbbtXo&_LANG=enus)

When a reviewer declines the task, they choose whether to send it back to the assignee or a
previous review level. When a reviewer approves the task, the task is sent to the next
review level, or it is marked Approved if it is the last review level.

title: Task Components in Docusign Rooms
text:
Select ADD REMINDER  in the task REMINDERS
tab to add email reminders for the assignee(s).

![rooms-task-reminders](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstaskreminders.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0NDQsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.CNmSTSqK6eV33VXKDqnNdO_k-sVL83n6adjNDDbbtXo&_LANG=enus)

For each reminder, select the date the reminder is associated with. The Actual
Due Date is the due date that is set up on the task. Other dates in the
drop-down list are transaction milestone dates in the room Details tab.

A numerical field displays next to each reminder date. Leave this value at
0 to send the reminder on that date. Otherwise, use the arrows to
set the number of days from the due date that the reminder should be sent. For example,
-3  sends a reminder three days before the date, and
+3 sends a reminder three days after the date.

title: Create Templates for Room Invitation Email Messages
heading_path: Create Templates for Room Invitation Email Messages
text:
Learn how to create templates for the email messages people receive when they are
invited to a room. Templates are unique to the invitee's role, allowing administrators to
customize the message and subject line for different audiences.

title: Create Templates for Room Invitation Email Messages
heading_path: Create Templates for Room Invitation Email Messages
text:
Before you begin, you need a company role with
Manage email invite templates permission.

You can create templates for room invitation email messages. Templates are unique to
the invitee's role, which allows you to customize the email message and subject line
for different audiences. For example, you might want to create different email
content for internal and external agents. For mortgage transactions, you can create
a template for borrowers with a custom message.

You can customize the area of the email message highlighted below.

![rooms-email-invite](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsemailinvite.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0NjMsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.j3qKi2juRR3XZvFIW_WgMD77KVMkibLf7eTUr98UPYU&_LANG=enus "rooms-email-invite")

1. Log in to your Rooms account.
2. Go to Settings >  COMPANY >  Email Invite Templates.
3. Select ADD TEMPLATE.

   ![rooms-email-invite-template](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsemailinvitetemplate.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0NjMsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.j3qKi2juRR3XZvFIW_WgMD77KVMkibLf7eTUr98UPYU&_LANG=enus "rooms-email-invite-template")
4. In the Template Name field, name the template (example:
   Borrower Invite).
5. Click SELECT ROLES to apply the template to invitee
   role(s).

   Rooms will use this template when inviting someone to a room with any of these
   roles. Although you can apply the same template to multiple roles, a role can
   only be applied to one template.

   Note: Rooms doesn't require
   you to select a role when you save the template. You will see No
   roles assigned next to templates without roles. Select
   EDIT to modify the template later to add
   roles.

   ![rooms-email-invite-template-no-role](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsemailinvitetemplatenorole.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0NjMsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.j3qKi2juRR3XZvFIW_WgMD77KVMkibLf7eTUr98UPYU&_LANG=enus "rooms-email-invite-template-no-role")
6. In the Email Subject field, type a subject for the email
   message.
7. In the Email Message field, type the body of the email
   message.

   Select INSERT FIELD to insert fields within the message body. Once
   added, fields display inside brackets. The values from the room will populate
   these fields when Rooms sends the invite.

   ![rooms-invite-template-fields](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsinvitetemplatefields.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0NjMsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.j3qKi2juRR3XZvFIW_WgMD77KVMkibLf7eTUr98UPYU&_LANG=enus "rooms-invite-template-fields")
8. Select SAVE.

title: Take Action on All Documents in a Folder
heading_path: Take Action on All Documents in a Folder
text:
Learn how to select all documents in a Docusign Rooms folder to take action on all
documents at once.

Select all documents in a room folder to take action on all of
them at once.

1. Locate the folder in the room DOCUMENTS tab.
2. Click ACTIONS >  Select all.

   ![rooms-documents-select-all](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsdocumentsselectall.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3MDYsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.gwViKjRq2DoS4NtPf2fWqOQNs8kxMAZEwHK7vUx7ms0&_LANG=enus "rooms-documents-select-all")

   The document thumbnails display ![rooms-documents-selected](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsdocumentsselected.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3MDYsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.gwViKjRq2DoS4NtPf2fWqOQNs8kxMAZEwHK7vUx7ms0&_LANG=enus "rooms-documents-selected") after you select them.
3. Use the toolbar or right-click menu to take action on the documents.

   For example, to add all the selected documents to a new envelope, right-click
   and choose Create envelope.

title: Get Started With Docusign Rooms for Real Estate
heading_path: Get Started With Docusign Rooms for Real Estate
text:
Read about getting started with Docusign Rooms for Real Estate and how to begin managing
transactions.

title: Create Room Templates to Auto-Populate New Rooms With Task Lists
heading_path: Create Room Templates to Auto-Populate New Rooms With Task Lists
text:
You need the Manage room templates
permission enabled on your company role.

Room templates simplify the room creation process for your company. When you create a room
template, you select all the task list templates associated with that type of room. This
ensures that every time someone creates a room, the correct task lists are associated with
it.

If you want to create room templates for specific offices or regions, make sure you select
them so members at those locations can see them.

Note: Members need the Apply room templates
permission enabled on their company role to apply a room template when creating a
room.

1. In Docusign Rooms, go to Settings > COMPANY > Room templates.
2. Select NEW TEMPLATE.

   Tip: If a template already exists that is similar to the
   template you are creating, select EDIT >  Copy to copy the template.
3. Name the template so it clearly communicates its purpose. Examples: Home Purchase, Refinance, HELOC.
   Examples: Commercial, Residential, Land Only.
4. Choose which side of the transaction this template applies to: List, Buy, List &
   Buy, or Refinance.
5. The new template is enabled in all locations by default. Optionally associate the
   template with specific regions or offices to make it only available to people in those
   locations.
6. Select TASK LIST TEMPLATES to add task list templates to the
   room template.
7. Select Save.

title: Add a Task to a Room
heading_path: Add a Task to a Room
text:
If your room role has permission to add tasks, you can add new tasks to a room.

1. Open the room.
2. Click the TASKS tab.
3. Click ADD.
4. Choose which list you'd like to add the task to, then click
   NEXT.

   If you don't have permission to add tasks to lists, or there are no task lists in the
   room, you won't see this step and the task will be added to the
   General list after you save it.
5. Complete the detail, document, people, and reminder information for the
   task.
6. Click SAVE.

title: Update Task Roles in the CSV File
heading_path: Update Task Roles in the CSV File
text:
Next, open the CSV file and update the task role names as needed. One row displays for each
unique role and responsibility combination on a task. For example, if a task has one
assignee and two reviewers, then three rows display for that task.

1. Open the CSV file you just downloaded.
2. In each row, update values in the CompanyRoleName and
   TaskResponsibilityType columns to change the roles
   and responsibilities on your tasks.

   Note: The bulk update feature only updates values in the
   CompanyRoleName,
   TaskResponsibilityType, and
   ReviewLevel columns. The CSV file contains
   additional columns with editable values, but edits you make in those columns
   are not populated back to Rooms upon upload.

   ![rooms-bulk-upload-export-highlight](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsbulkuploadexporthighlight.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0NTQsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.BeaecUlywyIz-nmdM4Ynr-lr7ic4KVEcrZ6f19CQZzw&_LANG=enus "rooms-bulk-upload-export-highlight")

   Here are a few examples of updates you can make in this file:
   - To change the task reviewer from the Broker role to the Transaction
     Coordinator role, type Transaction Coordinator in
     the CompanyRoleName column to replace
     Broker.
   - To remove a task role/responsibility, delete the role name in the
     CompanyRoleName column. This removes the
     role/responsibility from the task.
   - To add the Transaction Coordinator role as a watcher to the Earnest
     Money Due task:
     1. Copy an existing row from the Earnest Money Due task and paste
        it into a new row.
     2. In the new row, remove the ID in the
        TaskTemplateRoleId column, so it's
        blank. (Rooms will create a unique ID for this
        role/responsibility upon upload.)
     3. Type Transaction Coordinator in the
        CompanyRoleName column.
     4. Type watcher in the
        TaskResponsibilityType column.
3. Save the file.

title: Task reminders
text:
Select ADD REMINDER  in the task REMINDERS
tab to add email reminders for the assignee(s).

![rooms-task-reminders](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstaskreminders.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE4NjgsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.NI-pSVR-WPwFxHuQWvqJmJWWjW8lK9-8-Q9v7jd_AHo&_LANG=enus "rooms-task-reminders")

For each reminder, select the date the reminder is associated with. The Actual
Due Date is the due date that is set up on the task. Other dates in the
drop-down list are transaction milestone dates in the room Details tab.

A numerical field displays next to each reminder date. Leave this value at
0 to send the reminder on that date. Otherwise, use the arrows to
set the number of days from the due date that the reminder should be sent. For example,
-3  sends a reminder three days before the date, and
+3 sends a reminder three days after the date.

title: Task Details, Documents, People, and Reminders
heading_path: Task Details, Documents, People, and Reminders
text:
When creating or editing a task, complete the information in the Task
Details, Documents,
People, and Reminders sections.

title: Task Details, Documents, People, and Reminders
heading_path: Task Details, Documents, People, and Reminders
text:
Add the general task information and settings in the Task Details
section.

![rooms-task-details-W2](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstaskdetailsW2.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE4MzAsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.pYhLXYoJOQ4c2zOZ_0VbTnkmpB66GzVM46U4WOt3lb0&_LANG=enus)

The table below describes the fields and options in this section.

| Task Field | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Task Name | Enter a task name. |
| Description | Optionally add a description. If the task doesn't require a document, use the description to communicate what needs to be done. |
| Due Date | Optionally select a due date. The dates in the drop-down list are specific dates configured in the room's Details tab. For example, if you select the transaction close date from the list, the task looks to the room's close date specified on the Details tab to determine the due date.  If you select a due date, a numerical field displays. This sets the number of days from the due date that the task must be completed. For example, if the due date is closing day on 1/15 and the date offset is -2 days, the task is due on 1/13. |
| Required Task | Select if the task must be completed to close the room. If the task is on a task list, the task must be completed before submitting the task list for review. Required tasks must be reviewed. If you select Required Task, the Requires Review option is selected and disabled. |
| Requires Review | The task requires review. If enabled, you are required to choose a reviewer in the People section. |
| Assignee Can Edit | Select to allow edits to the task. To edit the task, members must be on the task (as a watcher, assignee, or reviewer) and have a room role with permission to edit tasks. |
| Assignee Can Delete | Select to allow members to delete the task. To delete the task, members must be on the task (as a watcher, assignee, or reviewer) and have a room role with permission to delete tasks. |

title: Task Details, Documents, People, and Reminders
heading_path: Task Details, Documents, People, and Reminders
text:
If the task requires someone to complete a document, click ADD in the
Documents area to add the document name to the task. Type the document name and
click SAVE.

Adding a document creates a placeholder so users know which document should be attached to the
task. If the task is required, the document displays
(Required) under the name.

![rooms-task-documents-W2](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstaskdocumentsW2.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE4MzAsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.pYhLXYoJOQ4c2zOZ_0VbTnkmpB66GzVM46U4WOt3lb0&_LANG=enus)

Users can apply more than one document to a placeholder. Therefore, you can create one
task to upload multiple related documents.

title: Task Details, Documents, People, and Reminders
heading_path: Task Details, Documents, People, and Reminders
text:
The room members involved with the task are listed in the People section.

![rooms-task-people-two-levels](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstaskpeopletwolevels.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE4MzAsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.pYhLXYoJOQ4c2zOZ_0VbTnkmpB66GzVM46U4WOt3lb0&_LANG=enus)

Click ADD to add room members to the task.

![rooms-task-add-people](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstaskaddpeople.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE4MzAsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.pYhLXYoJOQ4c2zOZ_0VbTnkmpB66GzVM46U4WOt3lb0&_LANG=enus)

Under each responsibility, use the add link (Add
assignee/Add reviewer/Add
watcher) to add the members with that responsibility.

Note: If you are editing a task with multiple review levels, you can add and remove
reviewers from each level. Each level requires at least one reviewer. You can't add
or remove review levels (these are set on the template).

See descriptions of the task responsibilities below.

| Responsibility | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Assignee | Responsible for completing the task.  The assignee receives notifications when they are initially added to a task, task reminders, due dates, and action is taken on the task. |
| Reviewer | Responsible for approving or declining the task.  If you designate at least one reviewer, the task is set to Requires Review. Reviewers receive a notification when the assignee completes the task. |
| Watcher | Receives notifications when the task is completed or approved. |

title: Task Details, Documents, People, and Reminders
heading_path: Task Details, Documents, People, and Reminders
text:
To add a reminder, click ADD in the Reminders section.

For each reminder, select the calendar or room date you'd like the reminder to be associated
with. For example, if the reminder should be sent near the transaction closing date,
choose the closing date. Use the Date offset days (+/-)  to
set the number of days from the due date that the reminder should be sent (or leave
blank to send the reminder on that day).

title: Access a Room Using Two-Step Verification
heading_path: Access a Room Using Two-Step Verification
text:
If your room role requires two-step verification, you are prompted to verify a security code
before you can access the room.

1. Click the link in the room invitation email to sign in.

   You can also use your browser to go to the Rooms login page.
2. If you have a Rooms account, type your email address and password to log
   in.

   If you used a room invitation email link to access Rooms and don't have an
   account, follow the on-screen steps to create a password, activate your account,
   and accept the agreement.
3. Select how to receive your verification code (for example
   Email).

   ![rooms-disable-role](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstwostepmethod.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0MDUsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.Lf3_WhkNhS1y6uaR1PHk04iezPLx3umLuydMOZDCTmk&_LANG=enus "rooms-disable-role")

   Likely, you will only have one option here for email since email is the
   default notification option. If you updated your notification preferences to use
   different methods, you'd see those options here.
4. Once you receive the code, enter it in the space provided and select
   CONFIRM.

   ![rooms-disable-role](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstostepcode.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0MDUsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.Lf3_WhkNhS1y6uaR1PHk04iezPLx3umLuydMOZDCTmk&_LANG=enus "rooms-disable-role")

   You are taken to the room.

title: Troubleshoot Your NRDS Information
text:
Learn how to troubleshoot issues you might experience when validating your National
Association of REALTORS® (NAR) membership in Docusign Rooms for Real
Estate.

As a member of the National Association of REALTORS® (NAR), you can
access pre-tagged association forms within Docusign. You need to validate your
association memberships when accessing forms.

You'll need to provide:

- Your NRDS ID. This is a 9-digit number provided by NAR to
  verify your association memberships.
- Your Last Name, which is pre-filled with the last name on your
  Docusign profile. If you have a different last name on your real estate license,
  change this field to display the name on your license.
- An Association you belong to. If you belong to multiple
  associations, choose any association for validation purposes.

![A pop-up modal prompting for your NRDS ID and association.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsnrdsinfo.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3ODQsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.uyWWeKGt6SfcX56zOinXicpIpj2c3OjeWZ21mToq2s0&_LANG=enus "A pop-up modal prompting for your NRDS ID and association.")

If the information you provided here doesn't match NAR records, you'll see an error message
after clicking VALIDATE.

![Error message stating the information you provided does not match NAR records.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsnrdserror.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3ODQsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.uyWWeKGt6SfcX56zOinXicpIpj2c3OjeWZ21mToq2s0&_LANG=enus "Error message stating the information you provided does not match NAR records.")

The information in this topic will help you troubleshoot this issue.

title: Troubleshoot Your NRDS Information
heading_path: Possible Cause: You aren’t a member of the selected Association.
text:
- Contact your local association to confirm your REALTOR® association
  membership information.
- Your brokerage might also be able to confirm your REALTOR® association
  membership information.
- If you aren't a member of the selected association but should have access to the
  association's forms, contact the local association and request they email [REForms@docusign.com](mailto:REForms@docusign.com) to resolve the issue on your behalf.

title: Troubleshoot Your NRDS Information
heading_path: Possible cause: The NRDS ID is incorrect, or there’s a mismatch on your last name.
text:
- Click the Find your NRDS ID link to find your ID if you
  don't know your ID number. You can also click [here](https://login.connect.realtor/#!/forgotmember).
- Verify that the last name you are using to validate your association membership in Docusign is the same name on your real estate license. If the names don't match, we won't
  be able to validate your membership.

title: Create Envelopes To Obtain Signatures on Your Transaction Documents
heading_path: Create Envelopes To Obtain Signatures on Your Transaction Documents
text:
Learn how to create envelopes in Docusign Rooms to send transaction documents for
signature.

After you've added documents and people to a room, you can create envelopes to send documents
for signature. Your eSignature permissions determine what you can do with envelopes
(you must have at least DS Sender permission).

1. Open the room.
2. Select the ENVELOPES tab.
3. Select NEW.
4. Add documents to the envelope.

   - Select ADD ROOM DOCUMENTS to add documents from
     the room.
   - Select USE A TEMPLATE to use an eSignature
     template.
   - Select UPLOAD to upload documents from your
     computer or cloud storage.

   ![Add documents to the envelope.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsenvelopeadddocument.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2MzcsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.nsQCjn5SzU4UXIac0UlUOPNSscYkyZp07quItTz8aus&_LANG=enus "Add documents to the envelope.")
5. Drag your documents in the order you'd like the recipient to sign or view them.
6. Add recipients. If you added Docusign form(s) to
   the envelope, fields are provided for you to add recipient information for
   each tagged role (such as buyer, seller, etc.).

   Select ADD FROM CONTACTS or the contact icon to browse
   contacts within room participants, your address book, or the company
   directory.

   ![rooms-envelope-add-recipients](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsenvelopeaddrecipients.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2MzcsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.nsQCjn5SzU4UXIac0UlUOPNSscYkyZp07quItTz8aus&_LANG=enus "rooms-envelope-add-recipients")

   ![rooms-envelope-add-recipients-RE](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsenvelopeaddrecipientsRE.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2MzcsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.nsQCjn5SzU4UXIac0UlUOPNSscYkyZp07quItTz8aus&_LANG=enus "rooms-envelope-add-recipients-RE")
7. Once all documents are recipients are added to the envelope, select
   NEXT.
8. Add fields to the document.

   If you selected an eSignature template or form document, fields should already
   be placed for your recipients.
9. Select SEND to send the envelope.

title: Add a Region
text:
Learn how to add an office region in Docusign Rooms. Regions give administrators more
granular control over groups of offices so people can belong to or oversee entire
regions.

title: Add a Region
text:
You need the Manage company regions
permission enabled on your company role to complete these steps.

Regions are not required, but they add another layer
to your company hierarchy. Regions give administrators more granular control over groups of
offices so people can belong to or oversee entire regions.

1. Select Settings in the Rooms header.
2. Select the COMPANY tab.
3. Select Regions.
4. Select ADD REGION.
5. Type a name for the new region.
6. Select SAVE.

title: Add or Remove Someone From a Message
heading_path: Add or Remove Someone From a Message
text:
If you created a topic in a room, you can add and remove room members as participants. For
example, you might want to remove someone from the conversation if their participation
is no longer needed.

title: Add or Remove Someone From a Message
heading_path: Add or Remove Someone From a Message
text:
When you add someone to a topic, they see it as an unread topic in the New
Messages section of their Rooms dashboard. They also have access to
the topic through the room MESSAGES tab and will receive a notification (if they
have notifications enabled for messages).

New topic participants can read all previous messages within a topic as well as send
new messages.

1. In the room MESSAGES tab, select VIEW for a topic to open it.
2. Select ADD PARTICIPANT.
   ![A list of participants within a topic with the ADD PARTICIPANT button highlighted.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsmessagesaddparticipanthighlight.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2NTksInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.LU8_s5dqO76i9PyGcYKsh9NQvZb4FH0i2zd-Lwit8RM&_LANG=enus "A list of participants within a topic with the ADD PARTICIPANT button highlighted.")
3. From the list of room members, select the people to add to the topic.
4. Select ADD.

title: Add or Remove Someone From a Message
heading_path: Add or Remove Someone From a Message
text:
Topic creators can remove a participant from a topic. If you remove a participant, the topic
is completely removed from their view. They won't see the topic in the room MESSAGES
tab or receive notifications.

1. In the room MESSAGES tab, select VIEW for a topic to open it.
2. In the Participants list, select the "x" icon next to the person to remove.
   ![A list of room participants with an "x" icon next to a participant that can be removed](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsmessagesremoveparticipant.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2NTksInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.LU8_s5dqO76i9PyGcYKsh9NQvZb4FH0i2zd-Lwit8RM&_LANG=enus "A list of room participants with an \"x\" icon next to a participant that can be removed")
3. Select REMOVE.

title: Download Documents
text:
Learn how to download documents from Docusign Rooms. After you download a document, it's
no longer linked to the original document in your Rooms account.

In Docusign Rooms, you can download documents from a room.
In Docusign Rooms, you can download documents from a
room, your Rooms Inbox, or your My Docs folder. After you download a
document, it's no longer linked to the original document in your Rooms account. Any
changes you make to the downloaded document outside of Rooms is not reflected in
your document in the Rooms application.

If you download multiple documents, Rooms creates a ZIP file.

Note:

Pre-tagged real estate association forms within Docusign Rooms are protected and
can't be downloaded when they are blank. You will see a “Sample” watermark when
viewing these forms in certain areas of the application. This watermark doesn't
display on in-progress or completed forms.

1. In Docusign Rooms, navigate to the document(s) to download.

   - If the document is in a room, open the room and select the
     DOCUMENTS tab.
   - If the document is in your Inbox or My Docs
     folder, select either of those options in the Rooms header.
2. Move your mouse over the document(s), then select the circle icon to select
   them. A check mark displays when the document is selected.

   ![rooms-download-documents](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsdownloaddocuments.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3NDMsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.L4cQ48QlPNKoEp8xmpbj_0LQcijRC1Y2pj6C_jUEmcE&_LANG=enus "rooms-download-documents")

   Tip: Click Select All to select all documents (within all
   folders).
3. Select ![rooms-download-icon](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsdownloadicon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3NDMsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.L4cQ48QlPNKoEp8xmpbj_0LQcijRC1Y2pj6C_jUEmcE&_LANG=enus "rooms-download-icon") in the toolbar.
4. Select DOWNLOAD.

title: Split or Combine PDF Documents in Docusign Rooms
heading_path: Split or Combine PDF Documents in Docusign Rooms
text:
Read about how you can combine two or more PDF files into one, or split one PDF into
multiple documents. Docusign Rooms will save your original document(s) and newly created
files.

In Docusign Rooms, you can combine two or more PDFs into one, or split one PDF into
multiple documents. Rooms will save your original document(s) and newly created
files.

title: Use Room Templates to Auto-Populate New Rooms With Task Lists
heading_path: Use Room Templates to Auto-Populate New Rooms With Task Lists
text:
Room templates simplify the room creation process for your company. When you create a room template, you select all the task list templates associated with that type of room. This ensures that every time someone creates a room, the correct task lists are associated with it.

If you want to create room templates for specific offices or regions, make sure you select
them so members at those locations can see them.

Note: You need Manage room
templates permission to create and manage room templates. If you don't have this
permission, you won't see the Room Templates option in company
settings. In addition, users need permission to apply a room template to a room.

title: Document Management in Docusign Rooms
text:
Read about all the actions you can take on documents in Docusign Rooms.

Add your documents to store and manage them in Rooms. You can then instantly share them with
other members within Rooms or email them to individuals who do not yet have an account.
Document sharing is explicit, but your admin might have set up automatic document sharing for
certain roles in your company.

title: Edit or Rename a Room Detail Field
heading_path: Edit or Rename a Room Detail Field
text:
1. Log in to your Docusign Rooms account.
2. Go to Settings >  Company >  Room Details.
3. Expand each section and select any of the following that apply to the fields within:

   - Visible to all: When selected,
     people in the room with external roles can see the field.
   - Required to create: Agents must
     provide this information on the Create New Room page when they create a room.
   - Required to close: The field must be completed before a room
     can be submitted for review and approval.
4. Select ![3-dot-people-icon](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/3dotpeopleicon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0NzMsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.KDeQM--3CgGLQnpgdzlbc7MSCN_s9xhgBuJiXNvxeVM&_LANG=enus "3-dot-people-icon"), then choose Edit Field next to a field to change the
   field label.

   You might want to edit a field label to reflect your company naming structure.
   However, for data mapping reasons, it is important not to change the meaning of a field
   when you edit the label. Upon saving, the new label displays on all new and existing
   rooms.

title: Use Form Templates To Pre-Fill Association Forms
heading_path: Use Form Templates To Pre-Fill Association Forms
text:
Learn how to create and apply form templates. Form templates prevent you from having to
fill in the same information on a form each time.

If your forms contain some of the same information for each transaction (such as your name),
try creating templates to save time. Your form templates are only visible to you and
cannot be shared with others.

If you complete a form in a couple of different ways (for example, cash deal vs. finance
deal), you can create multiple templates for the same form. However, template names must
be unique.

title: Upload the CSV File
text:
Lastly, upload the updated CSV file to import the changes.

1. Go to Settings >  COMPANY >  Task List Templates.
2. Select BULK UPDATE.
3. In the Upload CSV File section, drag and drop the CSV file to the designated
   area. Alternatively, click UPLOAD to navigate to the
   file.

   The CSV file name displays in the upload area.

   ![rooms-bulk-upload-modal-upload](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsbulkuploadmodalupload.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0NTcsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.f-r2pg_YQSe_XK5ajalsZKs5JlROSWoY6S--W7yfdi0&_LANG=enus "rooms-bulk-upload-modal-upload")
4. Select SUBMIT.

The update process might take a few minutes, depending on how many
tasks you updated. When the update is complete and you refresh the page, you will see a
notification at the top of the screen in Settings >  Task List Templates. Click the View results link to view a summary of
the updates or download a detailed report.

![rooms-bulk-upload-success](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsbulkuploadsuccess.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0NTcsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.f-r2pg_YQSe_XK5ajalsZKs5JlROSWoY6S--W7yfdi0&_LANG=enus "rooms-bulk-upload-success")

title: Use Your My Docs Folder To Store Private Documents
heading_path: Use Your My Docs Folder To Store Private Documents
text:
Read about the My Docs folder in Docusign Rooms and how you can use it to create your
own document library.

My Docs is your own document library. Each member has one and no one else in your company can see or access it.

Create a folder within My Docs by clicking the ADD folder button in the upper right corner. You can also add documents to My Docs by clicking the ADD document button to the right of the ADD folder button. Add documents from your computer or cloud storage. Cloud storage integrations can be linked in your Settings.

There are many ways you can take action on a document, such as right-clicking on a document in the list or using the icons at the top of the My Docs tab. Additionally, you can open and view documents and then use the Document Actions menu and icons.

In the upper left, the Document Finder lets you search My Docs for a document by its name. Next to the Document Finder is a drop down menu that lets you filter the document list.

title: Send an Email Conversation to Docusign Rooms as a PDF Document
heading_path: Send an Email Conversation to Docusign Rooms as a PDF Document
text:
Learn how to save an email conversation as a PDF file by sending it to your Docusign Rooms email address.

To save an important email conversation, send the email
message to your Docusign Rooms email address with a special code in the subject line.
Docusign Rooms converts it to a PDF file and sends it to a room or your inbox.

Tip: To verify your Docusign Rooms inbound email address, select your profile
photo or initials in the Rooms header, then select Preferences >  Inbox Details.

1. Open your email application and start an email message.
2. In the To line, type your Docusign Rooms email
   address.
3. In the Subject line, type #room-ID
   #pdf, where room-ID is the room ID number
   displayed at the top of the room.

   To send the email conversation to your Docusign Rooms Inbox, exclude the room ID.
4. To add a title to the document, type a subject after #room-ID
   #pdf. For example, #152219 #pdf Disclosure
   Agreement.

   Important: Spaces are required between the
   #room-ID, #pdf, and the subject.

   ![rooms-email-convo](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsemailconvo.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3MzgsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.krFPY_Vn0RBUaWuVAdbA9cba2S9mBijwZ45zm8VQZhw&_LANG=enus "rooms-email-convo")
5. Send the email.

   After a few moments, the PDF displays in the room
   DOCUMENTS tab or
   Inbox.

title: Give a Member Access to Your Real Estate Forms Anytime You Are Both in a Room
heading_path: Give a Member Access to Your Real Estate Forms Anytime You Are Both in a Room
text:
Before you begin, you need the Share form
access permission enabled on your company role.

Use these steps to give a team member access to your forms
anytime you are both in a room.

1. Select your profile photo or initials in the upper-right corner of the Rooms
   header, then select Preferences.

   ![rooms-preferences-select](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomspreferencesselect.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3OTQsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.C41iKPb_8fYc_E8pCqRE-mWaYgN1hY0rYSwJgct-Hfg&_LANG=enus "rooms-preferences-select")
2. Select Integrations in the left menu.
3. In the Docusign Forms Settings section, select the
   Shared link.

   ![rooms-preferences-form-settings-shared-link](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomspreferencesformsettingssharedlink.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3OTQsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.C41iKPb_8fYc_E8pCqRE-mWaYgN1hY0rYSwJgct-Hfg&_LANG=enus "rooms-preferences-form-settings-shared-link")
4. Select the team member's name.

   ![rooms-preferences-share-form-access](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomspreferencesshareformaccess.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3OTQsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.C41iKPb_8fYc_E8pCqRE-mWaYgN1hY0rYSwJgct-Hfg&_LANG=enus "rooms-preferences-share-form-access")

   Note:
   - ALL ROOMS is automatically selected in the
     drop-down list and is the only available option when sharing new
     access with a member.
   - You can change access for other (selected) members by choosing
     No Rooms or All
     Rooms from the drop-down list.
   - When you see LIMITED ROOMS, you gave this
     member access to your forms in specific rooms from the
     PEOPLE tab.
   - You can't grant access to specific rooms from this page (only
     No Rooms or All
     Rooms).
5. Select SHARE.

title: Add a Detail Field to Company Rooms
heading_path: Add a Detail Field to Company Rooms
text:
To show a new detail field in rooms, add it from the
field library. The library contains all fields you aren't currently using. To add a
field, first expand the section you'd like to display it in, then select ADD
FIELD at the bottom of the section.

1. Log in to your Rooms account.
2. Go to Settings >  Company >  Room Details.
3. Expand the section where to add the field.
4. Select ADD FIELD.

   ![rooms-detail-admin-add-field](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsdetailadminaddfield.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0NzYsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.E0DPCP0_XSBzEZLer--VfzKh0u7YrjL1xigfa7Hq98I&_LANG=enus "rooms-detail-admin-add-field")
5. Select the field to add.

   ![rooms-details-admin-add-2](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsdetailsadminadd2.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0NzYsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.E0DPCP0_XSBzEZLer--VfzKh0u7YrjL1xigfa7Hq98I&_LANG=enus "rooms-details-admin-add-2")
6. Select ADD.

title: Lock a Member Account To Prevent Them From Logging in Temporarily
heading_path: Lock a Member Account To Prevent Them From Logging in Temporarily
text:
You need at least one of the following permissions enabled
on your company role:

- Manage members with lower access level
- Manage members with the same access level

Lock an account when you want to prevent a member from logging into Docusign Rooms
temporarily. When the member tries to log in, they see the message "Your account is
currently locked." All of their rooms, room documents, and documents in their My
Docs and Inbox folders remain as-is.

Note:

Locking an account in Rooms only prevents the member from logging into Rooms.
They can continue to log in to their eSignature account.

1. Log in to your Docusign Rooms account.
2. Select Settings in the Rooms header.
3. On the MEMBERS tab, select the account to lock.
4. Type a reason for locking the account in the Locked
   Reason field.

   A reason is required.
5. Select LOCK ACCOUNT.

Members with locked accounts display Locked
in the STATUS column.

![rooms-locked-member](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomslockedmember.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE1NTAsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.yuJ9FZxl6Be_PzfZrZWvnnT7o3fUY0fKv_g8wrvbTx0&_LANG=enus "rooms-locked-member")

title: Stop Receiving Message Notifications
text:
You receive an email notification each time someone posts a new message. If you don't want
to receive email notifications for room messages, you can opt-out.

title: Stop Receiving Message Notifications
text:
1. In the Docusign Rooms header, select your profile picture or initials.
2. Select Preferences.
3. Select Notifications.
4. Clear the Someone sends a message in a topic where you are a
   participant check box.
5. Select SAVE CHANGES.

title: Stop Receiving Message Notifications
heading_path: Mute notifications for a single topic
text:
1. Open the room.
2. Select the MESSAGES tab.
3. Select the drop-down arrow next to the topic to mute.
4. Select Mute topic.

If you want to start receiving notifications again, select the drop-down arrow next to the
topic, then select Unmute topic.

title: Export Your Task List Templates
text:
First, export your task list templates to a CSV file.

1. Log in to your Rooms account.
2. Select Settings in the Rooms header.
3. Select the COMPANY tab.
