4. Select Task List Templates.
5. Select BULK UPDATE.

   ![rooms-task-bulk-update](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstaskbulkupdate.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0NTAsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.X42H6_3C8ULoXljnR4CFPk5jQnxu87ZWQVLR7kYUIZg&_LANG=enus "rooms-task-bulk-update")
6. Under Task list templates:

   - Select the template to export from the drop-down list or select All Task List
     Templates to export all templates.
   - Choose whether to export Only tasks with people or All
     tasks.

     Tip: Since you can only update task roles and responsibilities
     in the export file, you only need to export tasks with people.
     Exporting all tasks might be helpful if you want to see all tasks
     together.

   ![rooms-tasks-bulk-update-modal](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstasksbulkupdatemodal.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0NTAsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.X42H6_3C8ULoXljnR4CFPk5jQnxu87ZWQVLR7kYUIZg&_LANG=enus "rooms-tasks-bulk-update-modal")
7. Select EXPORT.

Your browser downloads the CSV file to your download
folder.

title: Change a Member's Access Level, Office, Region, or eSignature Permission Profile
heading_path: Change a Member's Access Level, Office, Region, or eSignature Permission Profile
text:
You need a company role with at least one of the following
permissions enabled:

- Manage members with lower access level
- Manage members with the same access level

1. Log in to your Docusign Rooms account.
2. Select Settings in the Rooms header.
3. On the MEMBERS tab, select the member whose information
   you are changing.
4. On the Member Information tab, update the member's
   access level, offices, regions, or eSign permission profile.
5. Select SAVE.

title: Add Trusted URLs for Docusign Rooms Redirects
heading_path: Add Trusted URLs for Docusign Rooms Redirects
text:
When the Manage integration settings permission has been enabled on a
role, users with that role see the Integration settings
option in company settings.

![rooms-admin-integration-settings](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsadminintegrationsettings.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0OTIsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.Zp1TIcpG77lgdWZJOMZOqAtYSRoXx0kvzYMV2j00bXk&_LANG=enus "rooms-admin-integration-settings")

Here, you can build a trusted URL list that Rooms will use for redirect after member
activation.

To add URLs:

1. In your Rooms account, go to Settings >  COMPANY >  Integration Settings.
2. Select ADD URL.
3. Type the trusted URL.

   Rooms verifies that the URL is valid.
4. Select SAVE.

The URL is added to the list. Select Add
URL to add additional URLs or select Edit or
Delete to manage existing URLs.

![rooms-admin-trusted-url](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsadmintrustedurl.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0OTIsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.Zp1TIcpG77lgdWZJOMZOqAtYSRoXx0kvzYMV2j00bXk&_LANG=enus "rooms-admin-trusted-url")

title: Use In-App Help To Access Resources
heading_path: Use In-App Help To Access Resources
text:
Learn how to use in-app help to access walk-thrus, written articles, videos, and
information about new features. Onboarding resources are also provided for getting started
with Docusign Rooms.

Use in-app help to access walk-thrus, written articles, videos,
and information about new features. Onboarding resources are also provided for getting
started with Docusign Rooms.

Note: In-app help and
new feature notifications for Docusign Rooms are enabled or disabled on your
Profile page in
Preferences.

![rooms-help-disable](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomshelpdisable.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE1ODIsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.4qU6O6xqcrjScmvAVm-mLmGV47hnXqMqxWDM2WB_uEY&_LANG=enus "rooms-help-disable")

1. Log in to your Rooms account.
2. Select the question mark icon in the application header.

   ![Question mark icon in the Rooms application header.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomshelpicon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE1ODIsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.4qU6O6xqcrjScmvAVm-mLmGV47hnXqMqxWDM2WB_uEY&_LANG=enus "Question mark icon in the Rooms application header.")

   The help menu opens. If the help menu doesn't open, make sure you have
   In App Help enabled on your
   Profile page.
3. Search or navigate the help menu to find resources.

   ![A menu that reads "how can we help you?" with options to access walk-thrus, articles, videos, new features, and contact support.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomswalkmemenu.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE1ODIsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.4qU6O6xqcrjScmvAVm-mLmGV47hnXqMqxWDM2WB_uEY&_LANG=enus "A menu that reads \"how can we help you?\" with options to access walk-thrus, articles, videos, new features, and contact support.")

   To search all resources, start typing in the search field.

   In the Help menu, click any of the following sections
   to browse content by type:

   - Walk-thrus guide you through a step-by-step
     process within Rooms.
   - Articles link you to written articles on the
     Docusign Support Center.
   - Videos takes you to a list of online videos.
   - New Features links to you the Rooms release
     notes, which describe recent updates and how to use new features.
   - Contact Support gives you quick access to the
     Docusign support email address and phone number.

   The Getting Started tab links to resources for new
   users, such as walk-thrus and videos. What you see here depends on your user
   role in Rooms. The Getting Started menu tracks your progress and marks the items
   you have completed.

title: Customize Your Docusign Rooms Email Address
heading_path: Customize Your Docusign Rooms Email Address
text:
Docusign Rooms issues you an auto-generated inbound email address so you can send
documents directly to your account. Learn how to personalize the email address so it's easier to
remember.

Docusign Rooms issues you an inbound email address so
can send documents directly to your Rooms account. This email address is usually part of your
name, followed by numbers. You might want to personalize the email address so it's easier to
remember.

1. Log in to your Rooms account.
2. Select your profile picture or initials in the upper right, then select
   Preferences.
3. Select Inbox Details.
4. Type inside the Inbound Email field to modify the email
   address.

   If the email address already exists, the system prompts you to create a different
   address.
5. Select SAVE CHANGES.

title: View the Status or Results of a Member's Room Access Update
heading_path: View the Status or Results of a Member's Room Access Update
text:
You need a company role with at least one of the following
permissions enabled:

- Manage members with lower access level
- Manage members with the same access level

1. In Docusign Rooms, go to Settings > MEMBERS.
2. Select the member.
3. Select Bulk Updates.

   ![rooms-bulk-updates-success](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsbulkupdatessuccess.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE1NDYsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.hg_d_oM_LYgJmvvJgxUEERdMaCY9xbX03NcCO3IRKqw&_LANG=enus "rooms-bulk-updates-success")

   This page lists activity within the last 90 days. The
   Status column lists the status of each job:
   scheduled, running, or completed.
4. Select VIEW to read a summary of the results (for
   completed jobs only).
5. Select RESULTS DETAIL REPORT to download a CSV file that
   lists the rooms to which the member was added or removed.

   ![rooms-bulk-update-detail-rpt](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsbulkupdatedetailrpt.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE1NDYsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.hg_d_oM_LYgJmvvJgxUEERdMaCY9xbX03NcCO3IRKqw&_LANG=enus "rooms-bulk-update-detail-rpt")

title: Remove a Detail Field From Company Rooms
heading_path: Remove a Detail Field From Company Rooms
text:
Remove detail fields that your company doesn't use. Removing unused fields places
them in the library. This reduces clutter and makes it easier for users to find the
information they need.

Important: When you remove a field in Room
Details settings, you are removing it from all rooms. If the field is in use, you
can still remove it, and Rooms will retain any data that users might have added. If
you add the field back in later, users will see their data again.

To remove a detail field:

1. Log in to your Rooms account.
2. Go to Settings >  Company >  Room Details.
3. Select ![3-dot-people-icon](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/3dotpeopleicon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0ODEsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.OzgLyNRGZnzsaU_KpNL6P8sN5ZWJznW619iV56M1Vf0&_LANG=enus "3-dot-people-icon") for the field to remove.
4. Select Remove from details.

   ![room-details-admin-remove-field](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomdetailsadminremovefield.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0ODEsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.OzgLyNRGZnzsaU_KpNL6P8sN5ZWJznW619iV56M1Vf0&_LANG=enus "room-details-admin-remove-field")
5. Select REMOVE to confirm.

title: Add a New Member Account
text:
You need a company role with at least one of the following
permissions enabled:

- Add members with lower access level
- Add members with the same access level

Note: Also see the video [How to Add Member Accounts](https://support.docusign.com/s/articles/DocuSign-Rooms-Add-Members-v6?language=en_US).

1. Log in to your Docusign Rooms account.
2. Select Settings in the Rooms header.
3. On the MEMBERS tab, select ADD
   MEMBER.
4. Type the new member's first name, last name, and email address.
5. Select a role for the member.

   Each role is defined with specific permissions that enable or disable features in
   Rooms.
6. Select an access level.

   A member's access level determines *what they can see*, and their permissions
   determine *what they can do* in a room. For example, someone with Company level
   access can see all rooms in their company, but if they don't have Add
   documents to rooms permission, they can't add documents to those
   rooms.

   The access level options are:

   - Company - Members have access to rooms across all regions and
     offices, and if they have permission to manage members, they have access to members
     across the entire company. What they can do in the rooms and what they can do with
     members depends on their individual permissions.
   - Region - Members have access to rooms in the selected
     region(s), and if they have permission to manage members, they have access to members
     across their regions.
   - Office - Members have access to rooms in the selected
     office(s), and if they have permission to manage members, they have access to members
     across their offices.
   - Contributor - Members have access only to rooms they create
     and those they are invited into, and can't manage members because they don't oversee
     other members. However, contributors can belong to multiple offices.
7. If you selected a role that has Automatically added to new rooms
   permission, you will see an auto-add setting, Add to open
   rooms.

   - Leave this option cleared if you only want the member auto-added to new rooms going
     forward.
   - Select this option to add the member to open rooms in their offices. Rooms will
     schedule a room access update upon saving the new member.
8. Select an eSign permission profile.

   Your company eSignature admin can configure custom eSign permission profiles in eSign.
   This list contains the default eSign permission profiles, which are DS Admin, DS Sender,
   and DS Viewer, plus any custom eSign permission profiles that your company eSignature
   admin set up.
9. Select SAVE.

An invitation email is sent to the person you added. The member appears in the member list
with a paper airplane icon and a pending status.

![Sent invitation with paper airplane icon.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/addedmember.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE1MjksInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.BDLIAAe0Vhk6KMwk5vdx1iTvr0WcejwCF0M3bq-nUUI&_LANG=enus "Sent invitation with paper airplane icon.")

The member must follow the instructions in the email to activate their Rooms account. After
they activate their account, the icon is updated to the default person icon or the member's
photo (if they upload one).

Note: You can re-invite an unactivated
member at any time by selecting the user, selecting Resend Invite,
and then selecting SEND INVITATION. You cannot change the name and
email here because that information is managed through eSignature Admin.

You can change
some information before you re-invite the member, such as access level and
role.

title: Assign Offices to a Form Library or Packet
heading_path: Assign Offices to a Form Library or Packet
text:
- This feature must be enabled on your company account. Contact your Account Team
  to enable this functionality for you.
- You need the following permissions enabled in your company role:
  - Manage form packets
  - Manage form libraries

Use this procedure when starting with the form library or packet. You can assign multiple
offices to a library or packet this way.

1. Log in to your Docusign Rooms account.
2. Select Settings in the header.
3. Select the FORMS tab.
4. Use the filters at the top of the page to show Libraries
   only, packets only, or
   Libraries and packets.
5. Select ![3-dot-people-icon](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/3dotpeopleicon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE1MDMsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.kwQDZA_EwneeMqgnBd25cSUQqwdXQgBFBCtIDB4-iAQ&_LANG=enus "3-dot-people-icon") next to a form library or packet in the list.
6. Select Edit offices.

   ![rooms-forms-admin-edit-offices](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsformsadmineditoffices.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE1MDMsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.kwQDZA_EwneeMqgnBd25cSUQqwdXQgBFBCtIDB4-iAQ&_LANG=enus "rooms-forms-admin-edit-offices")
7. Select Edit.
8. Select the offices to map to the packet or library.
9. Select USE SELECTED.
10. Select SAVE.

Users see the filtered form lists immediately.

title: Email Documents Directly to a Room
heading_path: Email Documents Directly to a Room
text:
Learn how to send an email attachment directly to the Documents tab of a room. Storing
transaction documents in Docusign Rooms helps you stay organized and prevents you from
emailing files back and forth.

You can send an email attachment directly to the
Documents tab of a room by including the room ID in the email
subject line. Storing transaction documents in Docusign Rooms helps you stay organized
and prevents you from emailing files back and forth.

Tip: To verify your Docusign Rooms inbound email address, select your profile
photo or initials in the Rooms header, then select Preferences >  Inbox Details.

1. Log in to Docusign Rooms.
2. Select the Rooms tab in the header.
3. Right-click the room you are sending documents to, then select Copy
   Room ID.

   ![rooms-copy-room-ID](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomscopyroomID.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3MzEsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.iw1huXbGXK43S_8qc-rMWJuYIer7NcmcqALz3zTGDyg&_LANG=enus "rooms-copy-room-ID")
4. Open your email application and start an email message.
5. In the To line, type your Docusign Rooms email
   address.
6. Attach the documents.
7. Press Ctrl + V in the email
   subject line to paste the room number.
8. Type # before the room number, as shown in the example
   below.

   ![rooms-attach-document-for-email](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsattachdocumentforemail.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3MzEsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.iw1huXbGXK43S_8qc-rMWJuYIer7NcmcqALz3zTGDyg&_LANG=enus "rooms-attach-document-for-email")
9. Send the email.

After a few moments, the documents display in the
Documents tab of the room.

title: View Which Real Estate Forms You Are Sharing
heading_path: View Which Real Estate Forms You Are Sharing
text:
Use the Preferences >  Integrations page to see who can access your forms, or has shared their form
access with you.

1. Select your profile photo or initials in the upper-right corner of the Rooms
   header, then select Preferences.
2. Select Integrations in the left menu.
3. Review the sharing information in the Docusign Forms
   Settings section.

   If you share forms within a listed form provider (you are sharing forms, or
   forms are shared with you), the shared icon ![rooms-preferences-shared-icon](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomspreferencessharedicon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3OTcsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.fODVuYxRVOSol09rUQWexPkzgY6WVzzi0bgovShvi9A&_LANG=enus "rooms-preferences-shared-icon") displays in the Sharing column.

   ![rooms-preferences-form-settings](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomspreferencesformsettings.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3OTcsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.fODVuYxRVOSol09rUQWexPkzgY6WVzzi0bgovShvi9A&_LANG=enus "rooms-preferences-form-settings")
4. Select ![rooms-preferences-right-arrow](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomspreferencesrightarrow.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3OTcsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.fODVuYxRVOSol09rUQWexPkzgY6WVzzi0bgovShvi9A&_LANG=enus "rooms-preferences-right-arrow") for a form provider.

   The Sharing Status column displays how the forms are
   shared.

   ![rooms-preferences-shared-forms-settings](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomspreferencessharedformssettings.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3OTcsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.fODVuYxRVOSol09rUQWexPkzgY6WVzzi0bgovShvi9A&_LANG=enus "rooms-preferences-shared-forms-settings")

title: Use Room History To Review the Audit Trail for a Transaction
heading_path: Use Room History To Review the Audit Trail for a Transaction
text:
Learn how to see what has happened in a transaction over time (who, what, when) in
Docusign Rooms.

The room HISTORY tab details what has
happened in the room over time (who, what, when, etc.). This is the audit trail of all actions
taken within the room.

Tip: You can also view the
history of many items in a room (such as documents and envelopes) by opening the item and
going to history.

1. Log in to your Docusign Rooms account.
2. Open the room.
3. Select the History tab.

The room history displays. Use ACTIONS >  Export Room Summary to export the list to a PDF or CSV file.

title: Review Individual Tasks
text:
You will receive an email notification when a task requires review. Follow these steps to
review individual tasks.

Note: You don't need special permission to review tasks; any reviewer on a task can
review it. Some people at your company might have permission to review any task,
even if they aren't added as a reviewer.

1. Open the task(s) to review, using one of the methods below.
   - To review tasks one at a time: On your TASKS dashboard or TASKS
     tab in a room, click ![rooms-task-approve](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstaskapprove.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE4NDEsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.S6UfUyfcNeQdP9oHEgfu-qSXGvEVx2FHc7FgM6v21K8&_LANG=enus "rooms-task-approve") for a task to approve or ![rooms-task-decline](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstaskdecline.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE4NDEsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.S6UfUyfcNeQdP9oHEgfu-qSXGvEVx2FHc7FgM6v21K8&_LANG=enus "rooms-task-decline") to decline.
   - To review multiple tasks: In the room TASKS tab, select the
     circle next to the task(s) to review, then choose ![rooms-tasks-review-icon](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstasksreviewicon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE4NDEsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.S6UfUyfcNeQdP9oHEgfu-qSXGvEVx2FHc7FgM6v21K8&_LANG=enus "rooms-tasks-review-icon") in the toolbar.

   The task review page opens with the first task displayed.

   ![rooms-tasks-review-full-page](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstasksreviewfullpage.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE4NDEsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.S6UfUyfcNeQdP9oHEgfu-qSXGvEVx2FHc7FgM6v21K8&_LANG=enus "rooms-tasks-review-full-page")
2. At Select One, choose whether to
   Approve or Decline the
   task.

   Note: If you are reviewing multiple tasks and would like to skip one, click
   SKIP to jump to the next task.
3. If you selected Decline, select who you'd like to send
   the task back to using the Return task to field (the
   assignee or a previous review level).
4. Add comments.

   If you are declining the task, comments are required.
5. Click SAVE AND NEXT to move to the next task, or
   SAVE AND COMPLETE to finish reviewing the final task
   and close the page.

title: Share Your Real Estate Form Access With a Room Member
heading_path: Share Your Real Estate Form Access With a Room Member
text:
Before you begin, you need the Share form
access permission enabled on your room role.

Use these steps to share your form access within the
context of a room. You have the option to share forms in the current room only or all
rooms you are in.

1. In Docusign Rooms for Real Estate, open the room where you'd like to share
   forms.
2. Select the PEOPLE tab.
3. Locate the member you'd like to share forms with, then select ![3-dot-people-icon](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/3dotpeopleicon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3OTIsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.nu5EEwS60uPOT88JuRErYKbva0xorjh2lutQeRAIJr0&_LANG=enus "3-dot-people-icon") > Share form access on their card.

   ![rooms-share-form-access](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsshareformaccess.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3OTIsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.nu5EEwS60uPOT88JuRErYKbva0xorjh2lutQeRAIJr0&_LANG=enus "rooms-share-form-access")
4. Choose the range of access you'd like to give this person.

   Only this room lets the member access your forms *in
   this room only.*

   Any room lets this person access your forms *in any
   room where you are a room member.*

   ![rooms-share-form-access-rooms](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsshareformaccessrooms.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3OTIsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.nu5EEwS60uPOT88JuRErYKbva0xorjh2lutQeRAIJr0&_LANG=enus "rooms-share-form-access-rooms")
5. Select SAVE.

The FORM ACCESS badge displays for
people in the room who have access to your forms.

![rooms-share-form-access-badge](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsshareformaccessbadge.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3OTIsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.nu5EEwS60uPOT88JuRErYKbva0xorjh2lutQeRAIJr0&_LANG=enus "rooms-share-form-access-badge")

A Docusign Forms Access Shared entry is also
added to the room HISTORY tab.

Tip: To change someone's access to your
forms, select ![3-dot-people-icon](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/3dotpeopleicon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3OTIsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.nu5EEwS60uPOT88JuRErYKbva0xorjh2lutQeRAIJr0&_LANG=enus "3-dot-people-icon") > Change form access on their card. You can
change their access to No access, Only this
room, or Any room.

title: Download Your Messages To Save a Local Copy
heading_path: Download Your Messages To Save a Local Copy
text:
To export all messages within a single topic, select the drop-down arrow next to the VIEW
button for the topic you want to export, then select Export
topic.

![Drop-down menu for a topic with "Export topic" option highlighted in menu](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsexporttopic.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2NTEsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9._XMUTTGPNNX7bsqKcLjtYNrRXXp1wcBHXNoqP5OEdoI&_LANG=enus "Drop-down menu for a topic with \"Export topic\" option highlighted in menu")

title: Use Folders To Organize Room Documents
heading_path: Use Folders To Organize Room Documents
text:
Learn how to create document folders so you can quickly sort, find, and manage your
transaction documents.

Create document folders so you can quickly sort, find, and manage your transaction
documents.

title: Combine Documents
text:
Learn how to combine multiple documents in Docusign Rooms into a single
document.

1. In Docusign Rooms, select the documents to combine.
2. Right-click and select Combine.

   ![rooms-combine-docs](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomscombinedocs.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3MjQsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.qLEzX95aRTCQ5QUyGJ7ArcFV6oeaoP-BA9pl13G-QSE&_LANG=enus "rooms-combine-docs")
3. Type a name for the new document.
4. Select SAVE.

title: Considerations When Disabling Roles Already in Use
heading_path: Considerations When Disabling Roles Already in Use
text:
When disabling a role *already in use* at your company:

- If company members are assigned the role, Rooms will notify you that the role is in
  use. You will have the opportunity to choose a new role for these members to replace
  them all at once or jump to a list of members so you can edit their roles
  individually.
- Users can keep using the role in existing rooms. For example, users can select the
  role when inviting someone to a room or changing someone's room role.
- The role will not be available in new rooms.
- If you have task list templates that use the role, you don't have to update these
  templates right away. You can keep using them, but the next time you edit the
  template, Rooms will ask you to replace the disabled role with an enabled one.

title: Redirect Members After They Activate Their Docusign Rooms Account
heading_path: Redirect Members After They Activate Their Docusign Rooms Account
text:
If your company leverages the Rooms API to invite members to Docusign Rooms, learn how
administrators can automatically redirect members to your company site after they finish
activating their account.

If you leverage the Rooms API to invite members to your company Rooms account, you can
automatically redirect members to your company site after they finish activating their
account.

title: Redirect Members After They Activate Their Docusign Rooms Account
heading_path: Redirect Members After They Activate Their Docusign Rooms Account
text:
Below are the high-level steps to set up this feature.

1. In Rooms, enable the Manage integration settings permission for
   administrators at your company who will be setting up this feature. This gives
   access to the Integration Settings page in Rooms company
   settings.
2. In Settings >  COMPANY >  Integration Settings, add one or more of your site's URLs to the trusted URL list. The
   URLs you add here are the only URLs Rooms will allow for redirect. See [Add Trusted URLs for Docusign Rooms Redirects](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=clr1643042075783&topicId=fxd1588601606110.html&_LANG=enus) below for steps.
3. In the InviteUser endpoint of the Rooms API, enter a trusted URL
   (that you added in step 2) to the redirectUrl parameter.
   Rooms will direct members to that URL after activation.
4. Members receive Rooms invitations and register as they usually would, but Rooms
   now redirects them to your site after activation.

title: Create Templates To Split PDF Documents
heading_path: Create Templates To Split PDF Documents
text:
If your users regularly split the same PDF documents, learn how to create PDF split
templates. When users apply the template, their document is split for them, but they can
adjust if needed.

title: Create Templates To Split PDF Documents
heading_path: Create Templates To Split PDF Documents
text:
Before you begin, you need a company role with
Manage PDF Split Templates permission.

If you regularly split the same PDF documents, consider creating PDF split templates
for your company. These templates simplify the splitting process and save data entry
time for users. To create a PDF split template, upload the original PDF (that
requires splitting) and specify the split settings. When users apply the template,
their document is split for them, but they can adjust if needed.

1. Log in to your Rooms account.
2. Select Settings in the Rooms header.
3. Select the COMPANY tab.
4. Select PDF Split Templates.
5. Select ADD TEMPLATE.

   The Add PDF Split Template page displays. Here, you will upload the PDF you
   want to use on the template.
6. Name the template.

   It's a good idea to name the template the same as (or similar to) the document you are
   splitting. This helps users find the template they need.
7. Select UPLOAD DOCUMENT to browse and open the PDF
   document.

   The window loads the PDF document and shows each page as a thumbnail. To get a
   closer look, hover your mouse over the thumbnail and it will magnify the view
   for you.

   ![A PDF document with each page displaying as a thumbnail.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomspdfsplittemplate.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0NTksInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.M6LRGE8pHYnMyL6J2OQVTe1Mw4ZtzdhyxyjDUEkPPlY&_LANG=enus "A PDF document with each page displaying as a thumbnail.")
8. Select + to add a line for each new document that will
   be created as a result of the split.
9. Type a name and page range for each split document.

   You don't have to designate every page to a new file. Any leftover pages will not be
   included in the new documents.
10. Under Enable for, select the regions or offices that
    will have visibility to this template.

    If you make no selections here, the template will be visible to
    everyone.
11. Select SAVE.

title: Add an Office Location
text:
Learn how to add an office location in Docusign Rooms. Offices and regions determine
what members can access in your company account.

title: Add an Office Location
text:
You need the Manage company offices
permission enabled on your company role to complete these steps.

One default office is provided initially, but
administrators can rename and re-purpose it. If you added regions, offices can belong to a
region, or stand alone.

1. Select Settings in the Rooms header.
2. Select the COMPANY tab.
3. Select Offices.
4. Select ADD OFFICE.
5. Type the office name.
6. Select the region the office is associated with from the drop-down menu.
7. Enter the office contact information.
8. Select SAVE.

title: Create a Folder
text:
Learn how to create document folders in Docusign Rooms. Create as many folders as you
find useful, but they can only be one level deep. For example, add folders to separate
documents that need digital and wet signatures.

Create as many folders as you find helpful, but they
can only be one level deep. For example, add folders to separate documents that need
digital or wet signatures.

1. Open the room.
2. Click the DOCUMENTS tab.
3. Click ACTIONS > Add
   folder.
4. In the Folder Name field, type a descriptive name for
   the new folder.
5. Click CREATE.

The new folder displays in the DOCUMENTS
tab. Everyone in the room can see the new folder. Access to documents within the folder
depends on how the individual documents are shared.

title: Review a Task List
text:
You will receive an email notification when a list is ready for review.

Note: Reviewing task lists requires a room role
with permission.

1. On the room TASKS tab, choose ACTIONS >  Review task list.
2. If there are multiple task lists in the room, select the task list you'd like
   to review.
3. Select Approve or Correction
   Required to decline the task list.

   If you decline the task list, you are required to add a comment.

Declined task lists display a red icon next to the name:
![rooms-task-list-declined](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstasklistdeclined.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE4NDYsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.64lzZBd_T2jZxF9ACdB17j0EqSs_NNvzjO3DVIZZ1OI&_LANG=enus "rooms-task-list-declined").

Approved task lists display a green icon next to the name: ![rooms-task-list-approved](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstasklistapproved.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE4NDYsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.64lzZBd_T2jZxF9ACdB17j0EqSs_NNvzjO3DVIZZ1OI&_LANG=enus "rooms-task-list-approved")

title: Email Documents From Your Docusign Rooms Account
heading_path: Email Documents From Your Docusign Rooms Account
text:
Learn how to send documents in Docusign Rooms to an email recipient. Email is a fast way
to share documents with people who don't have a Docusign Rooms account.

Email is a fast way to share documents with people who
don't have a Docusign Rooms account. You can email documents from the Rooms
Dashboard or the Documents tab of a
room. You can also email documents stored in
My Docs or your
Inbox.

1. Log on to your Docusign Rooms account.
2. Locate and select the document or documents.
3. Right-click and select Email.
4. Type the recipient's email address in the Email
   field.
5. Type your message in the Email Message field.
6. Select SEND EMAIL.

The recipient receives an email containing your personalized message and a link to download
the documents. The download link is valid for 7 days.

Tip:

Email activity is recorded in the document history. Open the document and select
![rooms-document-history-icon](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsdocumenthistoryicon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3MzUsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.iICNH2OvmlpemtryAqMEmui6NCNwShuXl9qpyd54UVE&_LANG=enus "rooms-document-history-icon") in the toolbar to view document history.

title: Assign Form Libraries or Packets to an Office
heading_path: Assign Form Libraries or Packets to an Office
text:
- This feature must be enabled on your company account. Contact your Account Team
  to enable this functionality for you.
- You need the following permissions enabled in your company role:
  - Manage form packets
  - Manage form libraries

Use this procedure when starting with an office. You can assign multiple form libraries or
packets to an office this way.

1. Log in to your Docusign Rooms account.
2. Select Settings in the header.
3. Select the FORMS tab.
4. Select Add > Assign Office.
5. Click SELECT, then select the office you would like to
   work with.
6. In the Libraries field, select
   EDIT, then choose the libraries to assign to the
   office.
7. Select ADD.

Users see the filtered form lists immediately.

title: Split a PDF Document Using a Template
heading_path: Split a PDF Document Using a Template
text:
Learn how to use your company split templates to divide PDF files in Docusign Rooms.

If your company provides templates for splitting PDF
files, you'll see a list of templates when splitting documents. You can make adjustments
after the split.

1. In Docusign Rooms, right-click the PDF file and select
   Split.
2. Select APPLY TEMPLATE.

   The Apply PDF Split Template window displays.

   ![rooms-apply-pdf-split-template](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsapplypdfsplittemplate.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3MjAsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.njt0VYC10FtU3S4dUHlKfIPxB8d3pgmNK7gZD-oahrE&_LANG=enus "rooms-apply-pdf-split-template")
3. Choose the template.
4. Select APPLY.

   The settings from the template are applied to the document.
5. Make any adjustments as needed. For example, you can rename the split
   documents, adjust the page ranges, or add another document.
6. Select SAVE.

title: Copy a Room To Create a New, Similar Room
heading_path: Copy a Room To Create a New, Similar Room
text:
Learn how to copy a room to pre-populate a new room with the same transaction details
as the original room.

Copying a room creates a new room with the same details as the original room. For example, if an offer falls through and you have to create a
new room for the same property, copy the original room to pre-populate a new room with the
property and seller information.

You can copy a room in any status (Active, In Review, or Closed).

1. In your Rooms account, select the ROOMS tab at the top of the
   page.
2. Right-click the room you want to copy, then select Copy
   Room.
3. Type a name for the new room in the Name field.
4. Select COPY.

title: Attach a Task List to a Room
heading_path: Attach a Task List to a Room
text:
A task list is a group of related tasks predefined by your company. For example, your company
can create a task list that contains documents and activities commonly needed for
commercial transactions. Defining task lists, and attaching them to rooms, ensures
process consistency across the company.

Depending on your company setup, task lists might auto-populate to rooms. All rooms include a
General task list where users can add individual
tasks.

Once attached to a room, task lists display on the TASKS tab in collapsible sections that show
the task name, assignee, and due date. If a document is assigned to the task, the
document name is included.

![rooms-task-list](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstasklist.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE4MjUsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.3lWWf70C6MKpT7ZRk64D7mu-K64tUGREBAA2xEKIM6E&_LANG=enus "rooms-task-list")

To attach a task list, you need a room role with permission.

1. Open the room.
2. Click the TASKS tab.
3. Click ACTIONS >  Attach task list.
4. Choose the task list.
5. Click ATTACH.

Note: To remove a task list, click ACTIONS >  Remove task list. A permission controls the ability to remove task lists.

title: Use the Docusign Rooms Directory To Find Members of Your Company
heading_path: Use the Docusign Rooms Directory To Find Members of Your Company
text:
Read about how the company directory is useful when locating coworker information in
Docusign Rooms, such as inviting someone to a room or adding an envelope recipient.

The directory is a read-only list of all the members of your company. To access the
directory, select your profile photo, then select Contacts > Directory.

![Directory tab.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/Directory.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE4NTMsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.Ne8SmI7ImWxUh8RCHoSWJxZOa3nt9lRbQMGN-C8X1ag&_LANG=enus "Directory tab.")

Select VIEW to view a member's name, role, and contact
information.

The directory is helpful in other areas of Rooms when you want to find a company member. For
example, when inviting someone to a room or adding an envelope recipient, click ![select contact icon.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/selectcontacticon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE4NTMsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.Ne8SmI7ImWxUh8RCHoSWJxZOa3nt9lRbQMGN-C8X1ag&_LANG=enus "select contact icon.") to open the directory and search members. You don't have to update the directory
since members manage this information for themselves.

title: Split a PDF Document
text:
Learn how to divide a PDF file into multiple files in Docusign Rooms.

1. In Docusign Rooms, right-click the document and select
   Split.

   The window loads the PDF document and displays each page as a thumbnail. Hover
   your mouse over the thumbnail and it will magnify the view for you.

   ![rooms-split-pdf](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomssplitpdf.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3MTcsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.eG1s6xCfgD6g39plGCQ8k2nl7NZwtJ8LO0wQXy7t7fE&_LANG=enus "rooms-split-pdf")
2. Select Add a Document to add a line for each new
   document that will be created as a result of the split.

   You don't have to designate every page to a new file. Leftover pages will not
   be included in your new document.
3. Type a name and page range for each new split document.
4. Select SAVE.

The DOCUMENTS tab displays your newly
split PDF as well as your original file.

title: Add Docusign Forms to a Room
heading_path: Add Docusign Forms to a Room
text:
Learn how to add documents from your association form libraries to a room in Docusign
Rooms. When you add pre-tagged forms to a room, the forms populate automatically with data from
the room DETAILS tab.

If your company uses Docusign forms, you can add standard association forms to a room. When
you add pre-tagged forms to a room, the forms populate automatically with data from the room
DETAILS tab.

Your company administrator can give you access to form packets, making these documents easy
to find from the room DOCUMENTS tab.

Depending on the associations or form service providers you use, you might be prompted for
membership information when you add forms to a room. If you provide this information once
and your membership is validated, you won't be prompted for the information again unless
you've changed your membership. Rooms stores your membership information in Preferences >  Integrations.

To add a form document to a room:

1. Open the room.
2. Select the DOCUMENTS tab.
3. Select ADD >  Docusign Forms.
4. Select the name of the form provider.

   The National Association of REALTORS® icon accesses the form
   libraries for your supported local and state associations.

   ![rooms-forms-providers](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/Rooms-form-providers.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3ODIsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.LWHC93Lvrj9HW-EuQHn5bBvRmzt12LP6_xygkVEeTPs&_LANG=enus "rooms-forms-providers")

   Note: If your company has
   company-provided forms, you'll see a Continue to Company Forms without
   validation link, which allows you to skip the validation process and go
   directly to your company forms. If your company uses association-provided forms, you
   might not have access to all forms if you skip validation.
5. Enter your membership information, then select VALIDATE.

   For example, to validate your NAR membership, enter your NRDS ID and select any
   association where you are a member.
6. If other people have shared their form access with you, select a member's name in the
   Forms from field to access their form libraries. Otherwise, leave
   your name selected to access your libraries.

   ![rooms-share-forms-select-owner](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsshareformsselectowner.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3ODIsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.LWHC93Lvrj9HW-EuQHn5bBvRmzt12LP6_xygkVEeTPs&_LANG=enus "rooms-share-forms-select-owner")
7. Select the form library or packet from the left navigation pane.

   The right pane refreshes to show forms within the selected library or
   packet.
8. Select the form(s) to add to the room.
9. If a form template is associated with a selected form, a drop-down menu displays next
   to the form name. To use a template, select the template from the drop-down menu.

   ![rooms-form-template-in-row](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsformtemplateinrow.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3ODIsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.LWHC93Lvrj9HW-EuQHn5bBvRmzt12LP6_xygkVEeTPs&_LANG=enus "rooms-form-template-in-row")
10. Select ADD SELECTED.

title: Delete a Room To Remove It Permanently
heading_path: Delete a Room To Remove It Permanently
text:
Learn how to delete a room if you no longer need it. Deleting a room removes it
permanently and all of the room documents.

You can delete a room if you no longer need it. Deleting a room deletes it permanently. A
common reason for deleting a room is if you accidentally created a duplicate.

If you delete a room, you also delete all your documents in the room. Rooms won't
allow you to delete a room if other people own documents in the room or if there are
open tasks or envelopes.

Tip: Instead of deleting a room,
consider closing it instead. Closing a room retains documents, and you can reopen it
later if needed.

You need permission to delete rooms. The permission(s) you have determines when you
can delete a room.

- The Delete owned rooms permission lets you delete only
  rooms you own.
- The Delete rooms permission lets you delete any room
  where you are a room member with an internal role (including rooms you
  own).

To delete a room:

1. In your Rooms account, open the room you want to delete.
2. Click ACTIONS > Delete room.

   ![rooms-delete-room](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsdeleteroom.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2NzMsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.N8BA1TIpokLFu53qSKS_GgVQCnZXRXwN7EQUJRkx_cQ&_LANG=enus "rooms-delete-room")
3. Click DELETE to confirm.

title: Understand Roles and Permissions in Docusign Rooms
heading_path: Understand Roles and Permissions in Docusign Rooms
text:
Read about roles in Docusign Rooms and how they allow administrators to assign sets of
permissions to members based on their job responsibilities.

Permissions determine what members can do in Docusign Rooms. For example, individual
permissions control whether members can create rooms, add documents, or update company
settings. Rather than assign individual permissions directly to each member, Rooms groups
permissions into *roles*.

Assign each member a role when you add them to your company account. The permissions
enabled for that role determine their access within the account.

For example, a member's role controls the following:

- The administrative features they can access
- The actions they can take in a room
- Whether they need to provide a security code when entering a room

Roles are entirely custom in Docusign Rooms. Create as many roles as you need, with any
combination of permissions that make sense for your company.

People can have different roles based on the rooms to which they are added. For example, an
Agent at your company can be added to a room with a
Transaction Coordinator role with fewer permissions to assist with
a transaction. What someone can do in a room is entirely controlled by their role in that
room.

title: Configure Your Company Settings
text:
Learn how to set up your Docusign Rooms company contact information, logo, currency,
privacy, and security settings. Administrators should complete this information as soon as your
company account is active.

title: Configure Your Company Settings
text:
Before you begin, you need these permissions enabled on your
company role:

- Manage company account settings
- Manage company logo

As the company Rooms administrator, set up your basic company settings as soon as your
account is active.

1. Log in to your Rooms account.
2. Select Settings in the Rooms header.
3. Select the COMPANY tab.
4. Update your company information on the Company settings
   page.

   |  |  |
   | --- | --- |
   | Contact Information | Add your company name, website, support email address, and physical address. This information is visible to your users and the Docusign support team. |
   | Branding | Upload your logo to add your company branding to Rooms. Your logo replaces the Docusign logo in the upper right corner of the application. The logo also displays in other areas, such as email notification messages. |
   | Currency | Select the primary currency for your company. |
   | Privacy & Security Hide contents of room messages in email notifications | When this option is selected, message content does not display in room message email notifications. Users need to click a link to see the message in Rooms. |
5. Use the options in left navigation menu to continue setting up your company. Your
   access to these options depends on your permissions.

title: Use Templates in Docusign Rooms To Automate and Simplify Processes
heading_path: Use Templates in Docusign Rooms To Automate and Simplify Processes
text:
Read about the different templates administrators can create in Docusign Rooms to
streamline processes for company members.

title: Update Your Name, Email Address, or Profile Photo
heading_path: Update Your Name, Email Address, or Profile Photo
text:
Manage your personal information in your Docusign Profile. Here you can update the information related to your Docusign account, such as
your login credentials, profile photo, name, signatures, and more.

1. Log in to your Rooms account.
2. In the upper right, select your profile picture or initials.
3. Select Manage Profile from the drop-down menu.

   ![rooms-manage-profile-crop](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsmanageprofilecrop.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE1OTgsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.yFA2UWuaVRyoPzO3pCZaHjhTQk303RYK9TdTmcRxVHw&_LANG=enus "rooms-manage-profile-crop")
4. On the My Profile Information page, select the information to update.

   For example, to update your profile photo, select the profile picture area. Or, to update
   your email address, select Email Address.

   ![rooms-my-profile](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsmyprofile.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE1OTgsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.yFA2UWuaVRyoPzO3pCZaHjhTQk303RYK9TdTmcRxVHw&_LANG=enus "rooms-my-profile")
5. Follow the prompts to update the information.

title: Update Your Email Notification Preferences
text:
Learn how to enable or disable email notification messages from Docusign Rooms.
Reviewing these settings helps you limit notifications to only those you want to
receive.

You receive an email notification when activities occur within your transactions in
Docusign Rooms. If you don't want to receive certain information, you can turn them off.

Note:

- Rooms sends some notifications automatically based on your role or responsibilities,
  such as when a task list is declined or a room is rejected. Because these items require
  your attention, you can't turn off notifications for them.
- As of September 2024, Rooms no longer sends notifications for completed and voided
  envelopes.

1. Log in to your Rooms account.
2. Select your profile picture or initials in the upper right, then select
   Preferences.
3. Select Notifications.
4. Enable or disable your Daily Digest email.

   This email summarizes the activity in all your rooms over the last 24 hours and gives
   you a preview of upcoming tasks and due dates. If no activity occurs in any of your rooms,
   you don't receive a Daily Digest email.
5. Select the check box next to the remaining notifications you want to receive.
6. Select SAVE CHANGES.

title: Configure Detail Fields for Company Rooms
heading_path: Configure Detail Fields for Company Rooms
text:
As the Docusign Rooms administrator, read about the different ways you can configure
the fields that display in company transaction rooms.

Every room has a Details tab, which contains all the important information associated with the transaction, such as property information, closing details, and contact information for involved parties. Some fields trigger due dates and reminders for task lists.

As the company admin, you are responsible for configuring the Details tab. This includes:

- Deciding which fields to display in rooms
- Establishing which fields are required
- Configuring room statuses, which reflect the stages of a transaction
- Renaming field labels to reflect your company naming structure

title: Set Up Your Rooms for Real Estate Company Account
heading_path: Set Up Your Rooms for Real Estate Company Account
text:
Read about setting up your Docusign Rooms for Real Estate company account and how you
can use the account to manage transactions comprehensively.

title: Create Task List Templates to Group Common Transaction Activities
heading_path: Create Task List Templates to Group Common Transaction Activities
text:
You need the Manage task templates
permission enabled on your company role. This permission lets you create and edit task list
templates for the offices and regions you manage.

Tip: If you already have a template similar to the one you want to create, click
the drop-down menu next to that template and choose Copy.

Note: If you create a task list template and
share it with multiple offices or regions, other members cannot edit that template, even if
they have Manage task templates permission. (Only the template
creator can edit templates they enable for multiple offices or regions.)

1. Select Settings in the Rooms header.
2. Select the COMPANY tab.
3. Select Task List Templates.
4. Select NEW TEMPLATE.
5. In the Name field, type a name for the template.
6. To enable this template for specific offices or regions, select these options in the
   Enabled in field.
7. Select ADD TASK to begin adding tasks to the template.
8. For each task, add the [details](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=clr1643042075783&topicId=aks1572968392261.html&_LANG=enus), [documents](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=clr1643042075783&topicId=osx1572968392511.html&_LANG=enus), [people](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=clr1643042075783&topicId=pli1572968392747.html&_LANG=enus), and [reminders](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=clr1643042075783&topicId=byb1572968392935.html&_LANG=enus) related to the
   task, then select SAVE.

   When you are finished, tasks display under the TASKS section of the template. Select
   EDIT to make additional updates on a task or select ![rooms-drop-down-arrow](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsdropdownarrow.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0NDIsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.5Z-KjMxPVE7lFzomDaTphQd4wuzvw1DMiPKkrMlwNss&_LANG=enus "rooms-drop-down-arrow") then Delete to remove a task.

   ![rooms-task-list-template](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstasklisttemplate.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0NDIsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.5Z-KjMxPVE7lFzomDaTphQd4wuzvw1DMiPKkrMlwNss&_LANG=enus "rooms-task-list-template")

   Note: You can change the order by
   typing a new number next to a task. In a room, tasks display in this order by default,
   but users can sort them differently.
9. Select SAVE.

title: Create a Role to Group Member Permissions
heading_path: Create a Role to Group Member Permissions
text:
Learn how administrators create roles in Docusign Rooms. A member's role determines
what they can do in the application.

title: Create a Role to Group Member Permissions
heading_path: Create a Role to Group Member Permissions
text:
Before you begin, you need the Manage roles and
permissions permission enabled on your company role.

Create custom roles in Docusign Rooms with the permissions you need. A role is a group of
permissions that determines the actions and features available for a member. Role
permissions are available for specific administrative functions, and most actions users can
take in a room.

Tip:

If you already have a role similar to the one you want to create, select the drop-down
menu next to that role and select Copy.

1. Log in to your Rooms account.
2. Select Settings in the Rooms header.
3. Select the COMPANY tab.
4. Select Roles and permissions.
5. Select ADD ROLE.
6. Under Name, type a unique, descriptive name for the role.

   Company members can see the name of their role, as well as other room members' roles.
   When inviting others into a room, members use the role name to determine which role to
   assign the invitee. They can also view the detailed permissions for each role before
   sending the invite.
7. If you want users to begin using the role immediately, select
   Enable.

   Otherwise, leave it disabled to keep the role hidden.
8. If the role is external, select This role is external to your
   company to provide a subset of available permissions for external
   roles.

   Note: Users see EXT next to external role names.
9. Select Require two-step verification to access rooms to prompt
   members with this role to verify a security code when entering a room.

   Note: Users are prompted for a
   security code when accessing rooms through the user interface but not through the Rooms
   API.
10. Choose a View Option for the role.

    The Default view provides the standard Rooms experience and
    allows people to work in rooms. The remaining views only allow access to the closing
    package. When users with the Closing collaborator,
    Signing agent, and Simplified views log
    in, they see their tailored view of the closing package.
11. Under Permission Profile, expand each section and select the
    permissions to give this role.
12. Select SAVE.

title: Check Your Company Role Permissions
text:
Learn how to check your company role and its permissions in Docusign Rooms. Reviewing
these permissions helps members understand what they are permitted to do in the
application.

Your Docusign Rooms administrator assigned you a company role when giving you access to the
system. Your company role determines what you can do in Docusign Rooms and is your
default role when you are invited to rooms.

Review your company role and permissions in your Rooms profile to understand what you
are permitted to do in Docusign Rooms.

You view the following information within your Rooms profile:

- Your role name
- The permissions associated with your role
- The history of changes to your role

Note: You can have a different role in a room than your
company role, and therefore, fewer permissions in that room.

1. Log in to your Rooms account.
2. In the upper right, select your initials or profile picture.
3. Select Preferences from the drop-down menu.

   ![rooms-preferences-select](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomspreferencesselect.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2MDEsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.CjJ0caCFbnPEdi8CzXm4wbT9kUCtj8wdoRC1u327ZQo&_LANG=enus "rooms-preferences-select")

   The Profile tab displays.
4. Select VIEW INFO next to your role name in the
   Role field.

   The Role Information modal displays.
5. Select a section title to display the permissions enabled for your role.

   ![Full list of permissions for a user's role.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsroleinformation.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2MDEsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.CjJ0caCFbnPEdi8CzXm4wbT9kUCtj8wdoRC1u327ZQo&_LANG=enus "Full list of permissions for a user's role.")

   Your permissions display a green checkmark. Permissions you do not have
   are missing a green checkmark.
6. Select HISTORY to view changes made to your role.

title: Submit a Task List for Review
heading_path: Submit a Task List for Review
text:
When all tasks in a task list are Complete or In
Review, submit the task list for review. All task lists in a room
need to be approved before the room can be approved.

Note: To submit task lists for review, you need a
room role with permission. If your room role has Auto-submit task
lists permission, task lists are automatically submitted for review
when you submit the room for review.

To submit a task list for review:

1. Click the TASKS tab in the room.
2. Click ACTIONS >  Submit task list.
3. Add comments if needed.
4. Click SUBMIT.

Task lists in review display a blue icon next to the name:
![rooms-task-list-in-review](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstasklistinreview.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE4MzQsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.OsgqQuw9ZYcE956G0wi4_-umxj7RfNC2K2XJWOD0Oe8&_LANG=enus "rooms-task-list-in-review") Members in the room who have permission to review task lists receive a
notification with a link to the room.

title: Use Tasks To Keep Track of Transaction Activities and Due Dates
heading_path: Use Tasks To Keep Track of Transaction Activities and Due Dates
text:
Read about how tasks keep your organized by tracking what items must be completed
before you can close a transaction.

Tasks help you keep organized. They keep track of the documents and activities you must
complete before you can close a transaction.

Select the TASKS tab within a room to view tasks applied to the
transaction.

![rooms-tasks-tab](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstaskstab.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE4MTQsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.GBudLjcNg06n0VyuwC1J8DLyHkE93okpOdsSaRQOEBo&_LANG=enus "rooms-tasks-tab")

If you created a new room and already see tasks in the TASKS tab, your company uses templates
to pre-populate rooms with tasks.

Each task has an action that is required by the assignee. If a task requires review, it's
sent to the reviewer(s) when the assignee marks it complete.

Your responsibility on the task and your room role determine what you can do with tasks. For
example, an assignee can only edit a task if their room role has permission.

Tip: To check your permissions in a room, go to the
PEOPLE tab, click ![3-dot-people-icon](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/3dotpeopleicon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE4MTQsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.GBudLjcNg06n0VyuwC1J8DLyHkE93okpOdsSaRQOEBo&_LANG=enus "3-dot-people-icon") on your card, then choose Room role information. Expand the
Tasks section to view your task permissions.

title: Enable Two-Step Verification for a Role
heading_path: Enable Two-Step Verification for a Role
text:
When you enable two-step verification for a role, the
updates take effect immediately. Users with that room role are prompted for a security
code the next time they attempt to access the room.

1. Log in to your Docusign Rooms account.
2. Select Settings in the Rooms header.
3. Select the COMPANY tab.
4. Select Roles and Permissions.
5. Select EDIT next to the role for which you'd like to
   enable two-step verification.
6. Enable Require two-step verification to access rooms.
7. Select SAVE.

Tip: When inviting someone to a room, you can
check the role's verification settings by selecting VIEW
PERMISSIONS, then expanding the Role Settings section.

title: Move Documents Between Folders
text:
Learn how to organize documents in Docusign Rooms by moving them to different
folders.

Adding a document to a room initially places it in the ROOM DOCS folder. You can leave
your documents there or move them to different folders to organize them.

title: Move Documents Between Folders
heading_path: Move documents to a folder in the same room
text:
Use drag and drop when moving documents between folders *in the same room*.

Drag documents into different folders or even onto task lists. If you drop a new
document into a task placeholder that already has a document, the new document
replaces the original one. The old document that's being replaced moves back to its
previous location, either in a folder or the ROOM DOCS folder.

title: Move Documents Between Folders
heading_path: Move documents to a different room
text:
If a document belongs to a different transaction, move it to the other room. The document is
placed in the ROOM DOCS folder of the new room.

1. In the room DOCUMENTS tab, select the document(s) you want to
   move.
2. Click ![rooms-move-document-icon](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsmovedocumenticon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3MDMsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.SOlMHkqkxgmfTBihIdLhgGktCkfekSZbhHwIpE2I1ZI&_LANG=enus "rooms-move-document-icon") in the toolbar.
3. Select a destination folder from the drop-down list. You can choose folders in the current
   room or a different room.

   ![rooms-move-document](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsmovedocument.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3MDMsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.SOlMHkqkxgmfTBihIdLhgGktCkfekSZbhHwIpE2I1ZI&_LANG=enus "rooms-move-document")
4. Click MOVE.

title: Switch Between eSignature and Rooms
text:
You use one set of credentials to access both eSignature and Rooms. Once logged in, you can switch back and forth between accounts easily.

1. Log in to either your eSignature or Rooms account.
2. In the upper right, click your profile picture.
3. Click Switch to eSignature or Switch to
   Rooms.

   ![rooms-switch-to-esign](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsswitchtoesign.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE1OTQsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.yrsrHv_E7Dy-ou2TNvS2VVU7Sm0Qm2c3WOrShcuv-hI&_LANG=enus "rooms-switch-to-esign")

title: Manage Room Detail Fields That Capture Contact Information
heading_path: Manage Room Detail Fields That Capture Contact Information
text:
Contact fields display at the bottom of the Room Details settings page in a
CONTACTS section. Each contact type (Buyer, Agent, Service
Provider, etc.) has its own group of fields that allow your members to capture contact
information (name, phone, email, etc).

Contact fields are added differently than other detail fields. To add a new contact field,
select ADD NEW >  Contact Field.

![room-detail-admin-contact](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomdetailadmincontact.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0ODUsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.840XrGxIJs4Pb8vUavMMnYBtKxeTtkTr5FHdrQRQ8dg&_LANG=enus "room-detail-admin-contact")

Select the Contact Field Type and the display name for the field. Then,
select SAVE to add it to room details.

![room-details-contact-type](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomdetailscontacttype.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0ODUsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.840XrGxIJs4Pb8vUavMMnYBtKxeTtkTr5FHdrQRQ8dg&_LANG=enus "room-details-contact-type")

title: Add Documents in Docusign Rooms
text:
Read about the different ways you can add documents to Docusign Rooms, depending on
whether you want to share them with others or keep them private.

There are two ways you can add documents in Docusign Rooms:

- *In a room* when the document pertains to a specific transaction. Your room role
  requires Add documents to rooms permission to add documents to the
  room.
- *In My Docs* when you want to keep the document in your personal document library.
  You don't need special permissions to add or manage documents in My Docs.

After you add documents, you can perform various actions on them, such as fax, email, move or
copy. The maximum file size is 35MB.

Note:

All documents imported into Rooms are copies of the original file. Updates to a document
stored on a cloud service will not automatically update the copy stored in Rooms.

title: Disable a Room Template To Hide It From Members
heading_path: Disable a Room Template To Hide It From Members
text:
You need the Manage room templates
permission enabled on your company role.

Enable and disable room templates to control which templates are visible to your company. For
example, if you are working on a new template, you can disable it so it's hidden
from users when they create rooms.

1. In Docusign Rooms, go to Settings > COMPANY > Room templates.
2. Select the down arrow next to the template to disable.

   ![rooms-room-templates](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsroomtemplates.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0NjgsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.v6lnkJt5W4bwdUMj7_0j70qe7ZnFBP9mamiPJgPoXfA&_LANG=enus "rooms-room-templates")
3. Select Disable.

The Disabled indicator displays next
to the template.

title: Correct an Envelope in Docusign Rooms
heading_path: Correct an Envelope in Docusign Rooms
text:
Learn how to correct the details of in-process envelopes that you sent or are shared
with you, including the recipient, envelope, and document information.

In Docusign Rooms, you can correct the details of in-process envelopes that you sent
or are shared with you, including the recipient, envelope, and document
information.

Note: Completed (signed), declined, and voided envelopes
can't be corrected. However, you can copy the envelope to create a new one with the
same uploaded files, recipients, and signing fields.

You can correct the following information in an envelope:

- Envelope name, email message to recipients: These can be
  changed at any time within the life cycle of the envelope before
  completion.
- Documents: Add or reorder documents if none of the
  recipients have taken their action (signed, viewed, etc.). If a recipient has
  taken their action, the documents that were part of the original envelope will
  be locked.
- Recipients:
  - Adding, reordering, private messages, editing the recipient's contact
    information and responsibility are all available if none of the
    recipients have taken their action. If a recipient has taken their
    action, that recipient would be locked.
  - You can add a recipient back into the signing order again if that
    recipient needs to take another action on the envelope.
- Signing fields: You can add or adjust any of the
  recipient tags within the tagging page. You can't adjust tags for recipients who
  have already taken their action.

1. On the room ENVELOPES tab, right-click the envelope and
   select Correct.

   ![rooms-envelope-correct](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsenvelopecorrect.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2MzksInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.VIwfE8oeYt0YM8SwEq7-k0CWORd7ySxSbxvfLpoaBR8&_LANG=enus "rooms-envelope-correct")
2. The Envelope Details page appears with the status
   Correcting at the top of the page. Edit the documents
   and recipient fields as needed.
3. Select SEND.

   To edit the fields on the document, select EDIT SIGNING
   FIELDS. Delete, modify, or add fields as needed, select
   CONTINUE, and then SEND to
   reissue the document to your outstanding recipients whose turn it is to
   sign.

In-process recipients receive a new email notification, which contains a new link to the
envelope.

title: Schedule an Overnight Process to Bulk Update a Member's Room Access
heading_path: Schedule an Overnight Process to Bulk Update a Member's Room Access
text:
You need a company role with at least one of the following
permissions enabled:

- Manage members with lower access level
- Manage members with the same access level

Follow these steps to update a member's room access in bulk. Each member can only have one
update scheduled at a time.

1. In Docusign Rooms, go to Settings >  MEMBERS.
2. Select the member.
3. Select Bulk Updates.
4. Select UPDATE ROOM ACCESS.

   ![rooms-bulk-member-updates](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsbulkmemberupdatesselected.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE1NDMsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.elZvOrb6MLd2xtXwHTOFmnptQoMMurB6qo183OvOi24&_LANG=enus "rooms-bulk-member-updates")
5. Choose one or both options:

   - Add the member to rooms (created by peers or subordinates) in their
     offices
   - Remove the member from rooms (to which they were previously auto-added)
     in offices they no longer belong to
6. Select UPDATE.

The update displays in the event list with the status
Job scheduled.

![rooms-bulk-updates-job-scheduled](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsbulkupdatesjobscheduled.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE1NDMsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.elZvOrb6MLd2xtXwHTOFmnptQoMMurB6qo183OvOi24&_LANG=enus "rooms-bulk-updates-job-scheduled")

title: Access Your Real Estate Forms From Your Docusign Rooms Account
heading_path: Access Your Real Estate Forms From Your Docusign Rooms Account
text:
If your company is provisioned for form access in Docusign Rooms, learn how to set up
your account to access the form libraries you subscribe to.

title: Access Your Real Estate Forms From Your Docusign Rooms Account
heading_path: Access Your Real Estate Forms From Your Docusign Rooms Account
text:
Before you begin, your company must be provisioned for access to
Docusign forms.

Note:

If you don't see options to add a form provider to your account, or the form
libraries you are trying to access are not available, contact the Docusign Rooms
administrator at your company to request the form access you need. Your Docusign
Rooms administrator can contact your Docusign sales representative, account
manager, or support to enable form access.

If your company is provisioned for form access in Docusign Rooms for Real Estate, you can set
up your account to access the form libraries you subscribe to. To do this, you must
add the form provider on your Integrations page and provide your membership
credentials. Once your membership is validated, you can access the provider's form
libraries when adding documents to a room.

Note: Many libraries are available for validation through National
Association of REALTORS® (NAR). If you validate using the NAR
form provider, you will be validated for the libraries you have access to based on
your credentials. Some libraries are only available by validating with credentials
for that specific library.

1. Log in to your Docusign Rooms account.
2. In the upper right, select your profile picture or initials.
3. Select Preferences from the drop-down menu.
4. Select Integrations.
5. In the Docusign Forms Settings section, select
   ADD PROVIDER.

   ![rooms-forms-add-provider](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsformsaddprovider.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3NzgsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.PANsLiE_M_ocmccbdfXfjYCEW27WualZvdg1czXmb-M&_LANG=enus "rooms-forms-add-provider")
