6. Select the form provider to add.

   ![rooms-forms-providers](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/Rooms-form-providers.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3NzgsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.PANsLiE_M_ocmccbdfXfjYCEW27WualZvdg1czXmb-M&_LANG=enus "rooms-forms-providers")
7. Enter your membership or form license credentials.

   If you are prompted for your last name, use the name on your real estate license. Docusign
   Rooms might pre-fill the name from your Docusign profile, but the form provider
   needs the name on your license to validate your membership.
8. Select VALIDATE.
9. If a license agreement displays, review the information, then select
   AGREE.

You can now access the provider's form library when
selecting ADD >  Docusign Forms in the Documents tab of a room.

title: Change the Transaction Side of a Room Owner
heading_path: Change the Transaction Side of a Room Owner
text:
Learn how to change the room owner's transaction side (list, buy, or list and buy),
which also changes the side of the room.

title: Change the Transaction Side of a Room Owner
heading_path: Change the Transaction Side of a Room Owner
text:
Before you begin, you need the Edit room
side permission enabled on your room role.

These steps change the transaction side of a room owner. By changing a room owner's side, you
also change the side of the room.

1. Open the PEOPLE tab in the room.
2. Select
   ![3-dot-people-icon](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/3dotpeopleicon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2MTAsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.AWLnnxGMXcyiPd-RPoYKNsBGvL3M7UkArLAiVDu0NGQ&_LANG=enus "3-dot-people-icon")
    >  Side and room role.

   ![rooms-side-people](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomssidepeople.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2MTAsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.AWLnnxGMXcyiPd-RPoYKNsBGvL3M7UkArLAiVDu0NGQ&_LANG=enus "rooms-side-people")
3. Change the side in the Transaction side field.
4. Select CONFIRM.
5. Select SAVE.

title: Change the Transaction Side of a Room
heading_path: Change the Transaction Side of a Room
text:
If you accidentally chose the wrong transaction side (list, buy, or list and buy) when
you created a room, learn how to easily change it.

title: Change the Transaction Side of a Room
heading_path: Change the Transaction Side of a Room
text:
Before you begin, you need the Edit room
side permission enabled on your room role.

If you accidentally chose the wrong transaction side when you created a room, you can
easily change it.

When you change the room side, you also change the transaction side for all the room
owners. If there are room detail fields specific to the current side of the
transaction, those won't be visible after you switch sides.

Note: Room ownership doesn't control whether you can edit the room
side. Any room member with the required permissions can change this
information.

1. Open the room Details tab.
2. Select EDIT.
3. Change the side in the Side field.

   ![rooms-room-side](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsroomside.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2MDgsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.n5GLah4IeEaa4ky4OfRaSsW68aWd_-U8eC6OZwyTxus&_LANG=enus "rooms-room-side")
4. Select CONFIRM.
5. Select SAVE.

title: Review Tasks and Task Lists
text:
Read about reviewing tasks and task lists in Docusign Rooms for Real Estate and how you
can approve individual tasks and entire task lists.

There are two types of task reviews:

- Task review. If an individual task requires review, a reviewer on the
  task needs to approve it.
- Task list review. Once all tasks on a task list are approved, the
  entire task list is submitted for review. All task lists in the room need to be
  approved before the room can reviewed.

If you are the reviewer on a task or task list, you will receive an email notification
when an item needs your review. You can begin your review from the TASKS dashboard or
room TASKS tab.

title: A “New Version” Notification Displays When I Apply a Form Template
heading_path: A “New Version” Notification Displays When I Apply a Form Template
text:
I see the message "There's a new version of <form name> available. You can update the
template in My Docs" when I try to apply a form template.

Docusign Rooms displays this message when a new version of a form is published,
and therefore, the form and template versions do not match. When you see this
message, review your form template to see if updates are required. You can use
the form template, but you will continue to see the message until you open and
save the template. Saving the template updates the template version to match the
form.

title: A “New Version” Notification Displays When I Apply a Form Template
heading_path: A “New Version” Notification Displays When I Apply a Form Template
Open your form template, then save it
text:
1. Log in to Docusign Rooms.
2. Select My Docs in the application header.
3. Select the FORM TEMPLATES tab.
4. Select EDIT next to the template that is causing
   the message.
5. Select SAVE & CLOSE.

title: Task documents
text:
If the task requires someone to complete a document, type the document name in the
DOCUMENTS tab.

![rooms-task-document](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstaskdocument.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE4NjAsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.lcO8q6YFsWApzYJVaOtolwGMd0DyAItqBW8pBezJAso&_LANG=enus "rooms-task-document")

Adding a document name creates a placeholder on the DOCUMENTS tab,
so users know which document to provide.

![rooms-task-placeholder-appraisal](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstaskplaceholderappraisal.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE4NjAsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.lcO8q6YFsWApzYJVaOtolwGMd0DyAItqBW8pBezJAso&_LANG=enus "rooms-task-placeholder-appraisal")

Users can apply more than one document to a placeholder. Therefore, you can create one task
to upload multiple related documents.

title: Docusign Rooms System Requirements
text:
Read about the minimum system requirements for using Docusign Rooms. Meeting these
requirements ensures you have the best experience when using the application.

It is important to meet system requirements to obtain the best experience in Docusign Rooms. If requirements are not met, you may experience performance issues such as
lag time or features that do not work as expected. Docusign Rooms does not develop
or test in unsupported environments.

title: Docusign Rooms System Requirements
text:
Docusign Rooms was designed to work best with a high-speed Internet connection of at
least a DSL or cable modem connection. You can use Docusign Rooms with slower
connections, but you will naturally experience slower load times.

title: Docusign Rooms System Requirements
text:
Docusign Rooms makes every effort to test and support the most recent versions of
these browsers.

- **Microsoft Edge**: [Latest version](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/microsoft-edge) released by Microsoft
- **Google Chrome**: [Latest
  version](https://www.google.com/chrome/) released by Google
- **Safari**: [Latest version](https://www.apple.com/safari/) released by Apple
- **Mozilla Firefox**: [Latest version](https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/releases/) released by Mozilla
- **Adobe Acrobat Reader** or similar software is required to view PDF files.
  Most computers today come with this free software from Adobe installed. Need to
  install it? [Download a free copy from Adobe](https://get.adobe.com/reader/).

title: Docusign Rooms System Requirements
text: - 1024 x 768 recommended

title: Connect Your Docusign Rooms Account to Dropbox, Google Drive, or Box
heading_path: Connect Your Docusign Rooms Account to Dropbox, Google Drive, or Box
text:
If your company uses Dropbox, Google Drive, or Box, enable
these integrations on your account so you can add documents from these cloud storage services
to Docusign Rooms.

1. Log in to your Rooms account.
2. Select your profile picture or initials in the upper right, then select
   Preferences.
3. Select Integrations.
4. Enable the cloud storage services to make available when adding documents to Docusign Rooms.

   ![rooms-cloud-integrations](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomscloudintegrations.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE1ODcsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.-XdN287MqpDXj-SKVK34UAwLs3cllY_hLY8kRnND6uQ&_LANG=enus "rooms-cloud-integrations")

Any cloud storage providers you enabled now display when adding
documents.

![rooms-add-document-cloud](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsadddocumentcloud.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE1ODcsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.-XdN287MqpDXj-SKVK34UAwLs3cllY_hLY8kRnND6uQ&_LANG=enus "rooms-add-document-cloud")

You will be prompted for your login credentials for each service the first
time you select it.

title: Create Rooms To Collaborate on Transactions
heading_path: Create Rooms To Collaborate on Transactions
text:
A room is a safe and secure location where you can store all of the documents related to a particular transaction. Create one room for each of your transactions to keep tasks, documents, people, envelopes, and messages organized and in one place. Those involved in a transaction have access to this virtual room and can collaborate with you.

As the transaction progresses, return to the room to monitor and keep track of the tasks and documents you need to complete to finalize the transaction.

If you have permission to create rooms, follow these steps to create a new room:

1. In your Rooms account, select Rooms at the top of the
   page.
2. Select NEW.
3. Under Room name, type the name you want to give the room.

   You can use anything that's meaningful to you. For example, use "Bryant Family" to
   organize transactions by customer name.

   Optionally leave this field blank and select Use
   property location for room name to auto fill the room name with the property
   street address.
4. In the Room owner field:

   - If you are the room owner, leave your name as the room owner.
   - If you have permission to create a room on behalf of someone else, you can select another person as the room owner.
5. Choose the office.

   The office determines the visibility of the room to other members of your
   company.
6. If your company uses room templates, choose a template from the drop-down list.

   Room templates save time by auto-populating the room with task lists.
7. Select the room owner's role in the room.
8. Select the room owner's side of the transaction. Options are: List, Buy, List
   & Buy, and Refinance.
9. Complete the property location fields.
10. Select UPLOAD to upload a photo for the room, such as the photo of the property.
11. Select SAVE.

    Your new room appears on your Rooms page. If you selected a room template, any task
    lists associated with that template are applied to the newly-created room.

title: Task people
text:
Designate the roles involved with the task on the PEOPLE tab.

![rooms-task-people](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstaskpeople.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE4NjUsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.ZLzdixLyXqHBAp5wnCOS6TwMB8dK5_5uaV5bejwbODo&_LANG=enus)

title: Task people
text:
Task responsibilities are: assignee, reviewer, and watcher. Assign role(s) to each of these
responsibilities. You can add multiple roles with the same responsibility if members with
any of those roles own that responsibility.

Select ADD under each responsibility (ADD ASSIGNEE/ADD REVIEWER/ADD
WATCHER) to assign roles. See the table below for an overview of task responsibilities.

Note: The person's room role also determines what they can do
with tasks. For example, a member with any of these responsibilities can edit the task if
their room role has Edit tasks permission (for editable tasks) or
Edit any task permission (for all tasks).

| Responsibility | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Assignee | Responsible for completing the task.  The assignee receives notifications when they are initially added to a task, task reminders, due dates, and action is taken on the task. |
| Reviewer | Responsible for approving or declining the task.  If you designate a reviewer, the task is set to Requires Review. Reviewers in the first review level receive a notification when the assignee completes the task.  Only the reviewer roles you specify on the task can review it. If some roles in your company should review any task, give those roles the Review any task permission.  To create an approval chain, where one level must approve the task before it moves to the next level, add review levels. |
| Watcher | Receives notifications when the task is completed or approved. |

Tip: You can assign a role as both the assignee and
the reviewer. For example, you might want a transaction coordinator to complete a task on
behalf of an agent, and be the reviewer on the task.

title: Task people
text:
You can add review levels to a task. Review levels are beneficial if your company needs to
approve tasks or documents through an approval chain. For example, when a member uploads a
document, you might want an office manager to approve the document first, then send it to
legal.

![rooms-task-review-levels](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstaskreviewlevels.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE4NjUsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.ZLzdixLyXqHBAp5wnCOS6TwMB8dK5_5uaV5bejwbODo&_LANG=enus)

In the Reviewer(s) section, select ADD REVIEW LEVEL to add up to
five review levels. At each level, someone with that room role must approve the task. Adding
multiple roles allows people with any of those roles to approve. A reviewer in level 1 must
approve the task before it can move to level 2, and so on.

When a task has multiple review levels, the current review level displays in the status
label (for example, In Review (level 2 of 2)).

![tasks-review-levels-2](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/tasksreviewlevels2.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE4NjUsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.ZLzdixLyXqHBAp5wnCOS6TwMB8dK5_5uaV5bejwbODo&_LANG=enus)

Reviewers see the current review level of the task in the Status
section.

![rooms-task-review-full-pane-status](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstaskreviewfullpanestatus.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE4NjUsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.ZLzdixLyXqHBAp5wnCOS6TwMB8dK5_5uaV5bejwbODo&_LANG=enus)

When a reviewer declines the task, they choose whether to send it back to the assignee or a
previous review level. When a reviewer approves the task, the task is sent to the next
review level, or it is marked Approved if it is the last review level.

title: Remove Yourself From a Message
text:
If you leave a message topic, it will be removed from your message list and you will stop
receiving topic notifications.

Note: You can't leave a topic if you created it.

1. Navigate to the room MESSAGES tab.
2. Select VIEW for a topic to open it.
3. Select ![gear icon](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsgearicon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2NjIsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9._LCcB6eUIAtcxYPHO8A-tMpGeX89SZQNbpBMJvCeuDs&_LANG=enus "gear icon").
4. Select Leave topic.
5. Select LEAVE.

title: Change a Member's Company Role
text:
You need a company role with at least one of the following
permissions enabled:

- Edit role for members with lower access level
- Edit role for members with the same access level

A member's company role determines what they can do in Docusign Rooms and is their default
role when creating rooms or being invited to rooms internally.

If you have permission to edit a member's role, you can change it anytime. All
changes are tracked in role history.

1. Log in to your Docusign Rooms account.
2. Select Settings in the Rooms header.
3. On the MEMBERS tab, select the member whose role you are
   changing.
4. Select Role Information.
5. Change the member's role in the Company role
   field.

   ![](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomschangecompanyrole.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE1MzQsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.tqOY9jlYA6pzMb_caTXcSZfUXxWP2EJ1SAX6w_PWb7A&_LANG=enus)
6. Select SAVE.

If the new role affects the member's access to new or existing
rooms, you will receive a confirmation message after selecting
SAVE.

title: Apply a Form Template
text:
When you apply a form template, it populates the form
with the pre-filled data from the template. If there is existing data on the form, the
information on the template will override that data.

A form template is tied to a
specific form. You cannot apply a form template to multiple forms.

Note: These steps show you how to apply a template when
adding the form to a room. To apply a template to a form that is already in the
room, right-click the form and choose Apply form
template.

1. Open the room.
2. Select the DOCUMENTS tab.
3. Select ADD >  DocuSign Forms.
4. Select the form library from the left navigation pane.

   The right pane refreshes to show forms within the selected
   library.
5. Select the forms to add.

   If a template is associated with a form, a drop-down menu displays next to the
   form name.

   ![rooms-form-template-add-form-select-template](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsformtemplateaddformselecttemplate.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE4MDcsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.wWLQxmkRvzf1eXCcmIyyxpj0rQBA0__B8654gjZuilE&_LANG=enus "rooms-form-template-add-form-select-template")
6. For each form, select the template from the drop-down menu.
7. Select ADD SELECTED.

Note: In the rare scenario where templates have conflicting
data, you are prompted to prioritize your templates and use the data from the higher
priority template.

title: Add Documents to Your Personal My Docs Library
heading_path: Add Documents to Your Personal My Docs Library
text:
Learn how to upload documents to a private location in Docusign Rooms that's only
visible to you. Adding documents to My Docs stores them in a secure, convenient area so you
can move or copy them to your transactions when you are ready.

You can upload documents to a private location in Docusign Rooms that's only visible to you.
Adding documents to My Docs stores them in a secure, convenient area so you can move
or copy them to your transactions when you are ready.

1. Select My Docs in the Rooms header.
2. Select ![rooms-mydocs-add](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsmydocsadd.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2OTYsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.KTrq8W2CJsBzJcdE0jRB5s5bvJ6W3E-1yWv2VkQJkXo&_LANG=enus "rooms-mydocs-add").
3. Select Computer or one of the cloud storage
   sources.

   When choosing a cloud storage source, you will be prompted to log in if you
   aren't currently logged into the service.
4. Navigate to and select the documents to add.

title: Share Form Access So Team Members Can Add or Edit Your Forms
heading_path: Share Form Access So Team Members Can Add or Edit Your Forms
text:
Read about how sharing your form access helps you collaborate with team members on a
transaction.

Share your form access to collaborate with team members on a transaction. For example, sharing
forms with non-licensed agent users, such as transaction coordinators, allows these
people to add or edit forms on your behalf without requiring your credentials.

Note: Document access and form permissions apply to
shared forms as they do with other documents. Sharing your form access only gives
someone the ability to access your form libraries. They still need a room role with
permission to take action on them.

title: Print Documents
text:
Learn how to print multiple documents in Docusign Rooms in one action using the bulk
print action.

In Docusign Rooms, you can print multiple documents in one action using the bulk print action.
The bulk print action allows you to generate required documents quickly and
efficiently.

1. In Docusign Rooms, navigate to the document.

   - If the document is in a room, open the room and click the
     DOCUMENTS tab.
2. For one or multiple documents, select the documents and select
   **Print**.![](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/Documents-tab.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3NDAsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.xoXI6VZgaiXTIaoYLCs9UTt0FVCVxqWGpA6qniSgEBk&_LANG=enus)
3. Select ![rooms-print-icon](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsprinticon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3NDAsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.xoXI6VZgaiXTIaoYLCs9UTt0FVCVxqWGpA6qniSgEBk&_LANG=enus "rooms-print-icon").
4. For one document, right-click the document and select **Print**.
5. Select ![rooms-print-icon](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsprinticon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3NDAsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.xoXI6VZgaiXTIaoYLCs9UTt0FVCVxqWGpA6qniSgEBk&_LANG=enus "rooms-print-icon").
6. Choose your print settings and select Save.

title: Add Completed Envelopes in Rooms
text:
Learn how to add completed envelopes in eSignature to a room in Rooms.

This guide shows how to add completed envelopes in Docusign eSignature to a room in Docusign Rooms.

1. Go to the room where you want to add the completed envelopes, and while in the
   desired room, go to Envelopes > Actions.![](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/01.jpg?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3NTIsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.D-oTmaxHzOYTJCI_IGSKfIvaNp1QPuCEpUkD23IDzjI&_LANG=enus)
2. While in **Actions,** click **Add Existing Envelopes**.![](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/02.jpg?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3NTIsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.D-oTmaxHzOYTJCI_IGSKfIvaNp1QPuCEpUkD23IDzjI&_LANG=enus)
3. While on the **Add Existing Envelope** screen, there will be an option to
   select a time frame and the option to search for the name of a specific
   envelope.
4. Choose the desired envelope and click **Add**. The envelope will then be
   added to the desired room.![](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/04.jpg?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3NTIsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.D-oTmaxHzOYTJCI_IGSKfIvaNp1QPuCEpUkD23IDzjI&_LANG=enus)

   Note: An error will occur when you add an envelope to a
   room multiple times and when you add an envelope to multiple rooms.
   - The following error appears when an envelope is added to a room
     multiple times.![](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/05.jpg?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3NTIsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.D-oTmaxHzOYTJCI_IGSKfIvaNp1QPuCEpUkD23IDzjI&_LANG=enus)
   - The following error will display when you add an envelope to
     multiple rooms.![](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/06.jpg?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3NTIsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.D-oTmaxHzOYTJCI_IGSKfIvaNp1QPuCEpUkD23IDzjI&_LANG=enus)

title: Copy a room template
text:
Copying a room template creates a new template with the same settings and task lists
as the original template. This saves time if you want to create a similar template
without having to re-key information.

1. In Rooms, go to Settings > COMPANY > Room Templates.
2. Select EDIT next to the template you want to copy, then
   select Copy.
3. Edit the template if necessary.

   For example, you might want to add or remove task list templates.
4. Select SAVE.

title: Add a Document to a Room To Share It With Others
heading_path: Add a Document to a Room To Share It With Others
text:
Learn how to upload documents to Docusign Rooms so people collaborating with you on a
transaction can access your files. Sharing documents in a central location saves time and
prevents you from emailing files back and forth.

title: Add a Document to a Room To Share It With Others
heading_path: Add a Document to a Room To Share It With Others
text:
Before you begin, you need a room role with Add
documents to rooms permission.

When you add documents to a room, they are added to the Room Docs
folder. You can copy or move them from there to another folder or task list, if
necessary.

1. Open the room.
2. Select the DOCUMENTS tab.
3. Select ADD.
4. Select Computer or one of the cloud storage
   sources.

   When choosing a cloud storage source, you will be prompted to log in if you aren't currently
   logged into the service.
5. Navigate to and select the documents to add.

Tip: You can view the history of a document by
opening the document and clicking ![rooms-document-history-icon](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsdocumenthistoryicon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2OTEsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.cNRinIVFXk8anKU9tBIgnRLu2dhmS74dMKE2EQ6o7BA&_LANG=enus "rooms-document-history-icon"). If you imported the document from cloud storage, the history log displays
where the file was added from.

title: Supported File Formats in Docusign Rooms
heading_path: Supported File Formats in Docusign Rooms
text:
Read about the types of documents you can add to Docusign Rooms.

Docusign Rooms supports the following file types:

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| DOCUMENT | .doc, .docx, .pdf, .rtf, .txt |
| IMAGE | .bmp, .gif, .jpg, .jpeg, .png, .tif, .tiff |
| PRESENTATION | .ppt, .pptx |
| SPREADSHEET | .csv, .xls, .xlsx |

Note: You can upload a file with password security
enabled, but you can't add it to an envelope. To send a file with password security,
remove the security setting before uploading the file. Password-protected documents also
cannot be viewed in the DOCUMENTS tab of a room.

title: Room Document Permissions, Ownership, and Sharing
heading_path: Room Document Permissions, Ownership, and Sharing
text:
Read about how document permissions, ownership, and shared settings determine what users
can see and do with documents in Docusign Rooms.

Docusign Rooms saves transaction documents in the room Documents tab. All users can
access the Documents tab, but what they can *see* and *do* with documents
depends on permissions, ownership, and shared settings.

Note: This information applies to room documents. Documents in your Inbox and My Docs folder
are only visible to you, so permissions and sharing don't apply to those
documents.

title: Room Document Permissions, Ownership, and Sharing
heading_path: Room Document Permissions, Ownership, and Sharing
text:
Permissions control what users can *do* with documents in a room. A few document
permissions are:

- Add documents to rooms
- Delete documents from rooms
- Share any document

For example, if your room role has Add documents to
rooms permission, you see an ADD button at
the top of the Documents tab.

Admins update role permissions in Settings >  COMPANY >  Roles and Permissions.

Note: You don’t need permission to take these actions on
documents (available from the document right-click menu):
Rename, Move,
Copy, Email,
Download, Print, and
Archive. The Create Envelope
option is also available if your eSignature permission profile allows you to send
envelopes.

title: Room Document Permissions, Ownership, and Sharing
heading_path: Room Document Permissions, Ownership, and Sharing
text:
You own the documents that you add to a room. When you own a document, you can share
it with other people.

The document owner's name displays with the document in the room
Documents tab.

![rooms-document-owner](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsdocumentowner.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2ODAsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.nBfuCYPUupjsN8itsbXyJVp7DqTNuXEEX0BN4_nfOQo&_LANG=enus "rooms-document-owner")

Only you can see your documents unless you explicitly share them with others.
However, there are exceptions. In these scenarios, documents are shared
automatically:

- There are multiple room owners.

  Documents are shared
  automatically between room owners. If one owner uploads a document, all
  other owners can see it.
- Your room role has any of the permissions below.
  - Automatically share documents in the room with users from the same
    office
  - Automatically add all peers from the office as document owners
  - Manage documents on any task (lets you see task documents in the room,
    even if those documents weren't shared with you)

title: Add Your Personal Contacts to Docusign Rooms
heading_path: Add Your Personal Contacts to Docusign Rooms
text:
Read about how to use the Docusign Rooms address book to manage your contacts outside
of the company.

Use the address book to manage your contacts outside of the company. To access the address
book, select your profile photo, then select Contacts > Address Book.

![Address Book tab.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/addressbook.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE4NTUsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.faE_sK0dtyT8TEMAJ_p13vA06-bXHMJssSmvAxD4D4E&_LANG=enus "Address Book tab.")

You have access to the address book when adding people to a room, so add contacts you work with regularly. You can add contacts here, but it might be easier to add new contacts to your address book when you add them to a room. When inviting someone new, you'll have a chance to save the person to your address book.

Note: Your Rooms and eSignature address books sync
contacts. When you update a contact in Rooms, it updates in eSignature, and vice versa.

title: Add Your Personal Contacts to Docusign Rooms
heading_path: Add Your Personal Contacts to Docusign Rooms
text:
When you share a contact in your address book, all members of your company can see the contact in their address books, but they can't edit it.

When adding a new contact, enable Shared Contact to share it.

![rooms-share-contact](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomssharecontact.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE4NTUsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.faE_sK0dtyT8TEMAJ_p13vA06-bXHMJssSmvAxD4D4E&_LANG=enus "rooms-share-contact")

To share an existing address book contact:

- In grid view, select ![3 dot icon.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/3dotpeopleicon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE4NTUsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.faE_sK0dtyT8TEMAJ_p13vA06-bXHMJssSmvAxD4D4E&_LANG=enus "3 dot icon.") under the person's name, then select Share or
  Unshare.
- In list view, select the drop-down menu next to EDIT, then select
  Share or Unshare.

title: What's the difference between a company role and a room role?
heading_path: What's the difference between a company role and a room role?
text:
You are assigned a *company role* when an admin adds you to your company account. This
role determines what you can do around your account. For example, your company role may
permit you to manage other members, company settings, or templates.

When you are invited to a room, the inviter assigns you a *room role*. Your room role
determines what you can do in that room. It might be the same as your company role, or
it could be a different role with fewer permissions.

When you are in a room, if your room role differs from your company role, you'll see a banner
at the top of the page. Click the role name link to check your permissions in the room.

![rooms-room-role-different](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsroomroledifferent.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2MTcsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.vNiFandI5_0t8X_0E8i6e_njc1JdhyuzOtptY_izF1U&_LANG=enus "rooms-room-role-different")

Tip: One of the most frequent questions we get from new
users is, "why can't I see this, or take this action, in a room?" Most of the time, the
user has a different role in a room and, therefore, different permissions. Check your
role in a room if you notice changes.

title: Use Messages To Communicate With Other People Working on a Transaction
heading_path: Use Messages To Communicate With Other People Working on a Transaction
text:
Learn how to send and manage in-app messages in Docusign Rooms. A transaction can have
several message threads active at once, allowing room members to connect on different
topics.

Room messages give you access to real-time conversations with room members. Start a message
when you want a single, continuous thread of discussion regarding a specific transaction. A
room can have several message threads active at once, allowing room members to connect on
different topics.

Find your messages in the room MESSAGES tab. Here, you see a list of
topics where you are a participant (you started the message or someone added you).

![](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roommessagesre.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2NDQsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.kRor2oleJZR8FRL5yaAtRCQgMcf9gJQuRXPuM-M0p2Q&_LANG=enus)

![rooms-messages-mortgage](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsmessagesmortgage.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2NDQsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.kRor2oleJZR8FRL5yaAtRCQgMcf9gJQuRXPuM-M0p2Q&_LANG=enus "rooms-messages-mortgage")

Note: Messages are private to the message
participants only. However, room members with permission to View all messages in
the room can read all messages.

title: Use Task List Templates To Standardize Tasks
heading_path: Use Task List Templates To Standardize Tasks
text:
Read about how task list templates help users keep track of documents and activities in
a room.

Task lists are checklists that help users keep track of documents and activities in a
room. Task list templates contain common transaction documents and activities and ensure
process consistency across the company.

Your company can use [room templates](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=clr1643042075783&topicId=doz1572968393138.html&_LANG=enus) to populate
new rooms with task lists automatically. Otherwise, users with permission to add task
lists to rooms can do so manually by selecting ACTIONS >  Attach task list on the room TASKS tab.

title: Add Regions and Offices To Define Your Company Structure
heading_path: Add Regions and Offices To Define Your Company Structure
text:
Read about how administrators can add regions and offices to define your company
hierarchy in Docusign Rooms. When you add members, you select their access level and their
associated offices or regions, limiting their visibility to transactions outside their
areas.

Optionally add regions and offices to your company Rooms account to define a company
structure.

Regions are not required, but they add another layer to your company hierarchy. Regions give
you more granular control over groups of offices so people can belong to or oversee entire
regions.

Rooms provides one default office initially. You can rename this office or re-purpose it. If
you added regions, offices can belong to a region, or stand alone.

When you add members, you select their access level and their associated offices or regions.
For example, if you add a member with Region access level, you specify
the region(s) they will oversee. Members can belong to multiple offices or entire regions.

Note: Once you have added members to regions or
offices, you can't delete them. If you want to delete a region or office, you first need to
reassign members to a new region or office.

title: Considerations When Inviting External People to a Room
heading_path: Considerations When Inviting External People to a Room
text:
Read about the importance of assigning external roles to people outside of your company
when inviting them to a room in Docusign Rooms.

When you invite someone to a room who does not belong to your company account, you need to give
that person an *external role*. People with external roles have limited permissions
and don't have access to administrative functions.

People with external roles display the EXT badge on their people
card.

![rooms-external-badge](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsexternalbadge.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2MjUsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.2xvUHX6GWIOT0SDAyRhC3_DPyJQW__au2riWEbIIp1A&_LANG=enus "rooms-external-badge")

External roles also display the EXT badge in the role selection list.
When inviting people with external roles, you can choose a role that is equal to or
lower than your own role permissions.

![rooms-invite-external](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsinviteexternal.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2MjUsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.2xvUHX6GWIOT0SDAyRhC3_DPyJQW__au2riWEbIIp1A&_LANG=enus "rooms-invite-external")

![rooms-invite-external-mortgage](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsinviteexternalmortgage.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2MjUsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.2xvUHX6GWIOT0SDAyRhC3_DPyJQW__au2riWEbIIp1A&_LANG=enus "rooms-invite-external-mortgage")

Note: External users with permission to add users to rooms can only select from a list of
external roles that are equal or lower to their role.

title: Create a Form Template
text:
Before you begin, you need a company role with Create
form templates permission.

1. Log in to your Rooms account.
2. Select My Documents in the Rooms header.
3. Select the FORMS tab.
4. Scroll to the My Forms section.
5. Select NEW TEMPLATE.
6. Find the form you are creating a template for.
   1. In the first drop-down list, select whether to find the form in a
      DocuSign Form Library or a
      DocuSign Form Packet. (The options you see
      here depend on your permissions for adding forms.)
   2. In the second drop-down list, select the packet or library that
      contains the form.

      A form list displays after you make a selection.
   3. Select the form, then select USE.
7. On the form, fill in or select the fields that will be the same for every
   transaction, such as your name.
8. Select SAVE & CLOSE.

After you save the template, it is available in the My
Forms section. Select Templates to view templates associated with a form or the
Forms and templates filter to view all templates. Use the options in the
Actions column to edit, copy, or delete the template.

Note: Deleting a template only deletes the template. It does not remove your access to
the form.

title: Assign Form Libraries and Packets to Specific Offices To Limit Form Visibility
heading_path: Assign Form Libraries and Packets to Specific Offices To Limit Form Visibility
text:
Read about how administrators at your company can assign association form libraries to
the offices that use them. If your company offices are under the same Docusign Rooms account
but run independently, assigning forms to offices ensures users only see the libraries that
apply to them.

If your company's offices are under the same Docusign Rooms for Real Estate account but
run independently, we recommend mapping your association form libraries to the offices
that use them. Contact your Account Team to enable this functionality for you.

Once this feature is enabled, a forms administrator at your company needs to map form
libraries to your offices manually. Users can't see forms until you map them.

When form libraries are mapped to offices, working with forms is easier for
administrators and Rooms users.

Benefits for administrators:

- When creating form packets, administrators only see libraries that apply to the offices they
  manage. This prevents them from having to page through potentially hundreds of
  libraries to find the forms they need.
- Administrators can only create form packets for the specific offices they belong to.

Benefits for users:

- When adding forms to a room, users only see libraries and packets for their offices.
- When viewing forms in My Docs, users only see libraries and packets for their offices.

title: Use Your Docusign Rooms Inbox
text:
As a Docusign Rooms member, you have an inbox that nobody else in your company can see
or access. Read about the features of this inbox.

As a Rooms member, you have an inbox that nobody else in your company can see or access. You have an assigned email address for inbound emails to your inbox.

The Inbox tab displays a red circle with the number of new documents
in your inbox.

![Inbox tab.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsinbox.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3NDcsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.mmPk0m96rQhzXV2rYevN0uCy4ErwzTyO8F7o8AoWhwM&_LANG=enus "Inbox tab.")

Tip: You can customize your Inbox email address in Preferences > Inbox Details.

Documents can be sent to your inbox and then moved or copied elsewhere. In the upper left,
the Document Finder lets you search the inbox for a document by its name. Next to the Document
Finder is a drop-down menu that lets you filter documents.

Right-click a document to take action on it, such as edit, move, copy, or download. You can
also click a document to view or take action on it.

Note: Document permissions do not apply in your
inbox. Permissions only apply to documents in a room.

title: Work With Real Estate Forms in Docusign Rooms
text: # Work With Real Estate Forms in Docusign Rooms

title: Why Do I See a “Sample” Watermark on My Association Forms?
heading_path: Why Do I See a “Sample” Watermark on My Association Forms?
text:
Learn why some pre-tagged real estate association forms within Docusign Rooms are
protected with a sample watermark.

Some pre-tagged real estate association forms within Docusign Rooms are protected with a
"Sample" watermark, and you cannot download them when they are blank. Certain
associations require that we display their forms this way.

This watermark doesn't display on in-progress or completed forms. Once you begin filling
the form, the watermark disappears.

Note: After you add data to a form, then save and close it, the watermark might still
display on the document thumbnail. Refresh your browser, and the watermark will
disappear.

![rooms-sample-form](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomssampleform.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3ODcsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.3nNQVS8PEgAJbVLa5iSqdQGTnNRK48zrklTcNd2KNpE&_LANG=enus "rooms-sample-form")

title: Populate Room Details to Capture Transaction Data and Pre-Fill Forms
heading_path: Populate Room Details to Capture Transaction Data and Pre-Fill Forms
text:
Learn how to save time by completing the room detail fields for a transaction. Once
completed, these fields can pre-fill forms, trigger due dates, and send reminders for your
tasks.

title: Populate Room Details to Capture Transaction Data and Pre-Fill Forms
heading_path: Populate Room Details to Capture Transaction Data and Pre-Fill Forms
text:
Before you begin, you need a room role with Edit room
details permission.

Every room has a Details tab, which is like a cover sheet for the transaction. Your
administrator has configured fields that display on the Details tab, and these fields
display on every room created in your company. You can, and in some cases, must complete
these fields before a transaction can be closed.

It's a good idea to fill in the room details upon creating a room because some fields
pre-populate forms, trigger due dates, and send reminders for task lists. You can then
continue to complete these fields throughout transaction lifecycle as needed.

1. Open the room.
2. Select the DETAILS tab.
3. Select EDIT.
4. Edit the fields as needed. Some fields may be read-only.
5. Select SAVE.

Tip: If a contact is in your address book
or company directory, you don't have to add their information manually into the contact
fields on this page. Select ![rooms-details-add-contact](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsdetailsaddcontact.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2MTMsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.pJWLEwm-OpcTxPIW5OB0FtZdSg95EUf-quwjK5Ci4Rc&_LANG=enus "rooms-details-add-contact") to find the contact and populate their data onto the details page.

title: Start a New Message To Connect With Room Members
heading_path: Start a New Message To Connect With Room Members
text:
1. Open the room.
2. Select ![rooms-new-message-icon](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsnewmessageicon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2NTUsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.7Qs2oa3P1NpFnx6xM8uUDBanWBAsHi5x05PqL84O3hI&_LANG=enus "rooms-new-message-icon").
3. Click inside the Recipients field to select the room members
   you'd like to message.
4. Type the subject of your message in the Topic field.
5. Type your message.
6. Select Send.

The participants receive an email notification (unless they've turned off notifications for
messages). They always, however, see the message in the New Messages
section of the Rooms dashboard.

Tip: Want to add comments to yourself that nobody else can see? Start a new topic
and choose yourself as the only participant.

title: Bulk Update Roles on Task List Templates
heading_path: Bulk Update Roles on Task List Templates
text:
Learn how to use bulk update tools to make sweeping changes to roles on task list
templates. These tools allow administrators to update all roles at once rather than edit
each template individually.

When you update company roles, you might also need to update task list templates to reflect the
changes. For example, adding or removing manager roles might require updates to task
reviewer roles on your templates.

Use the bulk update feature to make sweeping changes to task roles. This feature lets you
export your task list templates to a CSV file, update task roles and responsibilities
within the file, and then upload it back into Rooms to update your templates.

To bulk update task roles, follow this 3-step process:

- Step 1: Export your task list templates
- Step 2: Update roles in the CSV file
- Step 3: Upload the CSV file

title: Designate Other People As Room Owners To Share Document Access
heading_path: Designate Other People As Room Owners To Share Document Access
text:
If you are a room owner, learn how to designate other people as room owners to share
documents with them.

If you are the owner of a room and have permission to manage room owners, you can designate
other people at your company as room owners. This is useful if you are working with someone
on a transaction and share responsibilities. Room owners share document ownership.
Otherwise, the person's room role determines what else they can do in a room.

Keep these considerations in mind when adding co-owners:

- There is no limit to the number owners you can have in a room.
- Co-owners must be members of the same company account.
- For real estate, co-owners must be on the same side of the transaction (buy or list
  side).
- Room owners can change other owners back to participants. If an owner is reverted to a
  participant, they no longer have access to anything in the room that wasn't explicitly
  shared with them.

To make someone a room co-owner:

1. Open the room.
2. Click the PEOPLE tab.
3. Do one of the following:
   - In grid view, click ![3 dot icon.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/3dotpeopleicon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2MzQsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.541sLu03dkfvOYR1NuGjYiSTLJes0_D4ZywEMymDWtg&_LANG=enus "3 dot icon.") under the person's name, then click Access.
   - In list view, click Actions in the person's row, then click
     Access.

   ![The Access option on the people card menu.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomspeoplemenuaccess.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2MzQsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.541sLu03dkfvOYR1NuGjYiSTLJes0_D4ZywEMymDWtg&_LANG=enus "The Access option on the people card menu.")
4. In the Access Level drop-down list, choose
   Owner.

   ![Choosing the Owner option from the Access Level drop-down list.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomspeopleaccesslevel.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2MzQsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.541sLu03dkfvOYR1NuGjYiSTLJes0_D4ZywEMymDWtg&_LANG=enus "Choosing the Owner option from the Access Level drop-down list.")
5. Click SAVE.

A ROOM OWNER badge displays on the new
co-owner's people card.
![A room member's tile showing a ROOM OWNER badge.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsownerbadge.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2MzQsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.541sLu03dkfvOYR1NuGjYiSTLJes0_D4ZywEMymDWtg&_LANG=enus "A room member's tile showing a ROOM OWNER badge.")

title: Get Started With Rooms
text:
Read about getting started with transaction rooms in Docusign Rooms for Real Estate and
how you can create a room for a new listing or purchase, add relevant information, and monitor
transactions.

Rooms are where you will spend most of your time in Docusign Rooms. After you create a
room, you add tasks, documents, people, and envelopes with documents to be sent to
recipients. As the transaction progresses, you return to the room to monitor the state of
the transaction and keep track of the tasks and documents you need to complete and finalize
the transaction.

The Rooms tab lists all the rooms you created or have been invited to join. Depending on
your role and permissions, you may be automatically added to rooms. If you oversee offices
or regions, you'll see rooms for those locations.

![](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsre.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjEzNDAsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.hrCGR2CwwArPrw718bBvZQ0llMgvU5Kll8NAAGWODYI&_LANG=enus)

Rooms are organized within tabs based on whether they are: Active,
in Review, or Closed. Click a room to open it.
If you have permission to create rooms, click NEW to create a new
room.

What you can do in a room is based on your room role and that role’s permissions. Your room
role was assigned to you when you were invited into the room or created the room.

Depending on your role, you might see the following tabs within a room: Details, Tasks,
Documents, People, Envelopes, Messages, and History.

![](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsroomtabs.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjEzNDAsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.hrCGR2CwwArPrw718bBvZQ0llMgvU5Kll8NAAGWODYI&_LANG=enus)

Check the ACTIONS menu for a list of some of the actions you can
take in the room. The options available in this menu depend on your permissions and which
tab you are working in.

title: Invite Someone to a Room to Collaborate on a Transaction
heading_path: Invite Someone to a Room to Collaborate on a Transaction
text:
Learn how to add someone to a room to share documents, messages, and tasks with them in
Docusign Rooms. You can invite both internal and external people to collaborate in transaction
rooms.

title: Invite Someone to a Room to Collaborate on a Transaction
heading_path: Invite Someone to a Room to Collaborate on a Transaction
text:
Before you begin, you need a room role with Add users
to rooms permission.

In a room, the PEOPLE tab displays
everyone who has access to the room. If you want to collaborate with someone who isn't already
in the room, you need to invite them in with an appropriate role. Their room role gives them
the features they need to work within the room and can be different than their company
role.

Note: Some people at your company may be
added to rooms automatically based on their role permissions.

These steps show you how to invite someone from the
PEOPLE tab of a room. You can also invite someone by clicking the
Invite link in the closing package.

1. Open the room.
2. Select the PEOPLE tab.
3. Select INVITE.

   The Invite to Room modal displays.

   ![Invite to Room.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/invitetoroom.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2MjAsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.tseWKQl0UG-HQmxlOb7j07XwM19lbu40wG7PdcGKeTs&_LANG=enus "Invite to Room.")

   ![](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/invitetoroomRE.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2MjAsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.tseWKQl0UG-HQmxlOb7j07XwM19lbu40wG7PdcGKeTs&_LANG=enus)
4. Locate or add the contact by doing one of the following:
   - Begin typing the person's email address in the Email field.
     Suggested contacts from the address book and directory display as you type.
   - If a contact isn't found, Invite the person to the room or
     Invite & Save to save the contact to your address book
     after you send the invite.
   - Select ![](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/selectcontacticon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2MjAsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.tseWKQl0UG-HQmxlOb7j07XwM19lbu40wG7PdcGKeTs&_LANG=enus) to look up the person in your address book or the company
     directory.
5. Select the contact's Transaction side in the room.
6. For internal people, the person's company role displays in the Room
   Role field. Select a different role to give the person a different role in
   the room.

   Note: See the important considerations
   below when choosing a room role.
   - Select VIEW PERMISSIONS to review the detailed permissions
     the person will have in the room.
   - If you give someone a role other than their company role, they might have fewer
     permissions. They will see a banner at the top of the room, notifying them that
     their role is different.
   - For internal roles, you can select an equal or lower role than the invitee's
     company role.
   - Assign external roles to users outside of your company. These roles display
     EXT in the role selection list.
   - The badges SIMPLIFIED,
     COLLABORATE, or SIGNING display next
     to roles that can access the closing package with a unique view.
7. Select INVITE to send the email invitation.

title: Read Your Messages
text:
Find all your unread messages in the New Messages section of the Rooms
dashboard.

![rooms-dashboard-new-messages](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsdashboardnewmessages.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2NDgsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.t3I2XnqGftv2X_lEzpsPyJmKHU2DhPN1EOcRSgXObNs&_LANG=enus "rooms-dashboard-new-messages")

Select a message to read it, or select View All to open a new page with
all your recent messages.

In a room, select the MESSAGES tab to access messages in that room.

If you have permission to read all messages in the room, you see ![rooms-messages-read-only-icon](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsmessagesreadonlyicon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2NDgsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.t3I2XnqGftv2X_lEzpsPyJmKHU2DhPN1EOcRSgXObNs&_LANG=enus "rooms-messages-read-only-icon") for topics you aren't participating in. These topics are read-only.

![rooms-messages-tab-read-only-crop](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsmessagestabreadonlycrop.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2NDgsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.t3I2XnqGftv2X_lEzpsPyJmKHU2DhPN1EOcRSgXObNs&_LANG=enus "rooms-messages-tab-read-only-crop")

title: Resend a Room Invitation
text:
You may need to resend a room invitation, or edit part of the invitation, such as the person's name.

1. Open the room.
2. Select the PEOPLE tab.
3. Do one of the following:

   - In grid view, select ![3 dot icon.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/3dotpeopleicon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2MjksInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.8TBg84RCL7DXc1AnCUs80BF1Is0_VMt_DLKfwD14tmQ&_LANG=enus "3 dot icon.") under the person's name, then select Contact
     info.
   - In list view, select Actions in the person's row, then select
     Contact info.
4. Select Resend Invite.
5. Make changes as needed, then select SEND INVITATION.

title: Role Permissions List
text:
Reference a list of user role permissions available in DocusignRooms. Role
permissions let administrators control access to administrative functions and most actions
users can take in a room.

Below is a list of all permissions available in DocusignRooms. Some permissions may
not be available, depending on the role settings. For example, you cannot enable
company setting permissions to external roles.

title: Role Permissions List
text:
| Permission | Definition |
| --- | --- |
| Create rooms | Users see the NEW button on the Rooms tab and can create a room. |
| Create room on behalf of others | Users can choose someone else (peers or contributors they oversee) as the room owner when creating a room. |
| Export room's history, details, and people | Users see the option in the room ACTIONS menu to export the room’s details, people, and history to a PDF or CSV file. |
| View all messages in the room | Users have read-only access to all message topics they aren't participating in. |
| Add users to rooms | Users see the INVITE button on the room's People tab and can invite people into a room. |
| Manage room owners | Users can designate people from your company as room owners, which automatically shares ownership of room documents. Note: Users with this permission do not have to be the room owner to designate people as room owners. |
| Submit rooms for review | Users can submit rooms for review that are owned by them or someone they manage. |
| Review and close rooms | Users can review and close rooms that are owned by them or someone they manage. |
| Re-open rooms | Users can re-open rooms that are owned by them or someone they manage. |
| Delete owned rooms | Users can delete rooms they own. |
| Delete rooms | Users can delete any room if they are a member of that room with an internal role. |
| Automatically added to new rooms | Auto-adds people to new rooms that their peers or subordinates create or join. This permission doesn't consider office locations when adding people to new rooms.  Note: Disabling this permission does not remove people from rooms. Once someone is added to a room (whether they are added automatically or not), removing their room access is a manual step [within the room](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=clr1643042075783&topicId=xep1572968406638.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to control someone's access to a room in Docusign Rooms.") or through a scheduled [bulk update](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=clr1643042075783&topicId=zyf1600976408469.html&_LANG=enus). |
| Automatically added to new rooms in their offices only | Auto-adds people to new rooms that their peers or subordinates create or join, but only within office locations they share.  Note: Disabling this permission does not remove people from rooms. Once someone is added to a room (whether they are added automatically or not), removing their room access is a manual step [within the room](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=clr1643042075783&topicId=xep1572968406638.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to control someone's access to a room in Docusign Rooms.") or through a scheduled [bulk update](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=clr1643042075783&topicId=zyf1600976408469.html&_LANG=enus). |
| Is hidden in rooms | Users are not visible on the People tab in rooms. |
| Copy room details | Users see a Copy room option in the room ACTIONS menu, which copies the room detail information to populate a new room. |
| Edit any user's room role | Users can change any room member's role. |
| Edit invited user's room role | Users can change the room role for people they have invited. |
| Edit room side | Users can change the side of the room. Note: This permission enables the EDIT button on the room Details tab, but users can only edit the Side field. |
| Manage any user's room access | Users can remove or restore any room member's access. |
| Manage invited user's room access | Users can remove or restore room access for people they've invited. |
| Can prepare and execute closing | Users can access and build closing packages for transactions. A CLOSING PACKAGE button is visible in the header of each room. |
| Send and retrieve documents from Mortgage Cadence Collaboration Center | This permission displays for internal roles if your company has the Mortgage Cadence integration enabled. Select this permission to allow users to add documents from Collaboration Center to a room and send room documents back to Collaboration Center. |
| Send and retrieve documents from Encompass | This permission displays for internal roles if your company has the Encompass integration enabled. Select this permission to allow users to add documents from Encompass to a room and send room documents back to Encompass. |

title: Role Permissions List
text:
If both room details permissions are disabled, users do not see the room Details
tab.

| Permission | Definition |
| --- | --- |
| View room details | Users see the Details tab (view only) and see all detail fields that the company admin has set to Use. |
| Edit room details | Users see the EDIT button on the room's Details tab and can update any details field. Users with this permission also have permission to View room details. |
| Send room details to Lone Wolf | This permission displays if your company has the Lone Wolf integration enabled. Select this permission to allow users to send room details data to Lone Wolf. Note: Make sure the role also has the View room details and Edit room details permissions selected. These permissions allow members to see and edit the room DETAILS tab, where the Lone Wolf fields are located. |

title: Role Permissions List
text:
Viewing documents in a room is not controlled by a permission. Everyone in the room
can see the Documents tab, but they need access to each document to see it.

When setting permissions for forms, keep in mind there are
two types of form users:

- Users who manage forms (typically admin and
  manager roles)
- Users who add forms to rooms

Users who manage forms require the Manage form
packets or Manage form libraries permission
to access the Forms tab in Settings. These permissions are in
the Company Settings section. For all other roles, assign permissions based on how
these users will be working with forms. If no form permissions are enabled for these
roles, users cannot add forms to rooms.

| Permission | Definition |
| --- | --- |
| Add documents to rooms | Users see the ADD button on the Documents tab and can add documents to the room, which they can share with people in the room. |
| Automatically share documents in the room with other users from the same office | When a user with this permission adds a document to an open room, the document is automatically shared with people who have access to the room and are in the user's office. |
| Automatically add all peers from the office as document owners | Peers are others in the same office or region who have the same access level as the user. When a user with this permission adds a document to an open room, the document is automatically owned by people who are peers of that user and have access to the room. |
| Add documents from form packets to rooms | Users see the ADD >  Docusign Forms option in a room's Documents tab, where they can add forms using form packets.  Note: This permission does not require Add documents to rooms permission to be enabled. |
| Add documents from form libraries to rooms | Users see the ADD >  Docusign Forms option in a room's Documents tab, where they can add forms using form libraries.  Note: This permission does not require Add documents to rooms permission to be enabled. |
| Delete signed documents | Users can delete signed documents from rooms. The user or a member they manage must own the documents. |
| Delete unsigned documents | Users can delete unsigned documents from rooms. The user or a member they manage must own the documents. |
| Share any document | Users can share documents they do not own (someone else shared with them). |
| Auto split documents | Users can auto split a document in the room Documents tab. Enabling this permission adds the Auto split option to the document right-click menu. |
| Share form access | Users can share access to their form libraries, allowing other members to add and edit their forms. |
| Create form templates | Users can create form templates in My Docs >  Form Templates, which can be used to pre-fill association forms. |

title: Role Permissions List
text:
There are two types of task users:

- Users who manage task list templates (typically admin and manager roles)
- Users who use tasks within rooms

Users who manage task list templates require the Manage task
templates permission to access Settings >  COMPANY >  Task list templates. This permission is in the Company Settings
section. For all other roles, assign permissions based on how these users will be
working with tasks within rooms.

| Permission | Definition |
| --- | --- |
| Add tasks to rooms | Users can add ad hoc tasks to a room's General task list. |
| Add tasks to task lists | Users can add tasks to task lists that were created by others. |
| Edit tasks | Users can edit editable tasks. |
| Edit any task | Users can edit tasks in rooms (even if the task owner has not marked the task as editable). |
| Delete tasks | Users can delete deletable tasks. |
| Delete any task | Users can delete tasks (even if the task owner has not marked the task as deletable). |
| Review any task | Users can approve or decline any task on any task list (even if they aren't a reviewer on the task). |
| Manage documents on any task | Users can add or remove documents from any task. |
| Attach task lists to rooms | Users see the Attach Task List option in the room ACTIONS menu. |
| Remove task lists from rooms | Users can use the Remove Task List option in the room ACTIONS menu to remove task lists owned by others. (Users can already remove task lists they own.) |
| Submit task lists for review | Users can use the Submit Task List option in the room ACTIONS menu to submit task lists for review. |
| Auto-submit task lists | When users submit a room for review, task lists also submit for review if all tasks in the lists are complete. |
| Review task lists | Users can approve or decline task lists. Anyone with this permission can see all tasks on the task list but would need other permissions for tasks (like edit or delete) to take those actions. |
| Auto-approve task lists | When a room is approved, task lists auto-approve if all tasks in the lists are approved. |
| Apply room templates | Users can apply a room template when they create a room. |

title: Role Permissions List
text:
| Permission | Definition |
| --- | --- |
| Add members with lower access level | Users can add members with a lower access level than theirs and set those members' roles (in offices or regions they oversee). |
| Add members with the same access level | Users can add members with the same access level as theirs and set those members' roles (in offices or regions they oversee or belong to). |
| Edit role for members with lower access level | Users can change the role of a member with a lower access level than theirs (in offices or regions they oversee). |
| Edit role for members with the same access level | Users can change the role of a member with the same access level as theirs (in offices or regions they oversee or belong to). |
| Manage members with lower access level | Users can change the access level, office or region, and eSignature permission set for members with lower access levels than theirs. |
| Manage members with the same access level | Users can change the access level, office or region, and eSignature permission set for members with the same access level as theirs. |
| Remove members with lower access level | Users can close the accounts of members with a lower access level than theirs (in offices or regions they oversee). |
| Remove members with the same access level | Users can close the accounts of members with the same access level as theirs (in offices or regions they oversee or belong to). |

title: Role Permissions List
text:
When setting permissions for forms, keep in mind there are
two types of form users:

- Users who manage forms (typically admin and manager
  roles)
- Users who add forms to rooms

Users who manage forms require either the
Manage form packets or Manage form
libraries permission to access the Forms tab
in Settings. For all other roles, assign permissions (in the
Documents & Forms section) based on how these users
will be working with forms. If no form permissions are enabled for these roles,
users cannot add forms to rooms.

| Permission | Definition |
| --- | --- |
| Manage company account settings | Gives users access to Settings >  COMPANY >  Company settings to change the company name, contact information, logo, and other settings. |
| Manage company logo | Gives users access to Settings >  COMPANY >  Company settings to change the company logo only. |
| Manage roles and permissions | Gives users access to Settings >  COMPANY >  Roles and permissions to create, edit, and manage user roles that your company uses in Rooms. |
| Manage company regions | Gives users access to Settings >  COMPANY >  Regions to add, edit, and delete any company regions. (Only unused regions can be deleted.) |
| Manage company offices | Gives users access to Settings >  COMPANY >  Offices to add, edit, and delete any company offices. (Only unused offices can be deleted.) |
| Manage room templates | Gives users access to Settings >  COMPANY >  Room templates to add, edit, and delete room templates. |
| Manage task templates | Gives users access to Settings >  COMPANY >  Task list templates to create, edit, and delete task list templates for the regions and offices they manage. |
| Manage PDF split templates | Gives users access to Settings >  COMPANY >  PDF split templates to manage templates used when splitting PDF documents. |
| Manage room details | Gives users access to Settings >  COMPANY >  Room details to configure room detail fields. They can also add contact fields. |
| Manage integration settings | Gives users access to Settings >  COMPANY >  Integration Settings to manage your company integrations. |
| Manage email invite templates | Gives users access to Settings >  COMPANY >  Email invite templates to manage email templates for room invitations. |
| Manage split document rules | Gives users access to Settings >  COMPANY >  Split document rules to create rules for automatically splitting a loan package into individual documents. |
| Manage form packets | This option is available if your company uses Docusign forms. It gives users access to Settings >  Forms to manage form packets. |
| Manage form libraries | This option is available if your company uses Docusign forms. It gives users access to Settings >  Forms to manage form libraries, such as assigning libraries to offices. |

title: Require Two-Step Verification To Access a Room
heading_path: Require Two-Step Verification To Access a Room
text:
Learn how administrators can require two-step verification to access a room. This added
layer of security requires people with certain roles to provide a security code after
logging in.

You can require two-step verification to access a room. This added layer of security requires
people with certain roles to provide a security code after logging in with their email
and password. Once they enter the code, they are directed to the room. They can keep
working in the room until their session expires.

Note: Two-step verification is not supported through the Rooms API. If you set up a role for
two-step verification, people with that role will be prompted for a security code when
accessing a room through the user interface, but not through the API.

title: Group Real Estate Forms and Make Them Visible to Offices
heading_path: Group Real Estate Forms and Make Them Visible to Offices
text:
Learn how to create form packets, so agents know which forms to add to rooms based on
the type of transaction they are working on. Once form administrators create packets, they can
make them required, ensuring compliance.

title: Group Real Estate Forms and Make Them Visible to Offices
heading_path: Group Real Estate Forms and Make Them Visible to Offices
text:
Before you begin, you need a company role with Manage
form packets permission.

Form administrators at your company are responsible for managing association forms for your
agents. With the appropriate permissions, form administrators can create form packets so
agents know which forms to add to rooms based on the type of transaction they are working
on. When creating packets, administrators can make certain forms required, ensuring
compliance.

If you don't create packets, agents will have to choose forms they need from a list of
association forms.

1. Log in to your Rooms account.
2. Select Settings in the Rooms header.
3. Select the FORMS tab.

   The Forms page displays folders for each of your form libraries and packets. Expand a
   folder to view the forms within the library or packet.
4. Select ADD > ADD PACKET.
5. Give the packet a name.

   Name the packet so agents can identify which forms are inside.
6. Select the offices that should see this form packet.

   Click inside the offices' text area to display a drop-down list of offices you can
   manage, then select the offices.
7. Select ADD.

Once you have added the packet, select ADD FORMS within the packet
to add forms from your form libraries.

To manage the form packet you created, select![](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/3dotpeopleicon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE0OTcsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.Wck39aiQmLfru9dzpYVKGhr4F-f3Jo4mBcqI41hc6yE&_LANG=enus) to the right of the packet name,
then choose an option from the menu.

title: Unlock a Member Account
text:
You need at least one of the following permissions enabled
on your company role:

- Manage members with lower access level
- Manage members with the same access level

If an administrator locked a member's Docusign Rooms
account, unlock the account to allow them to access the application.

1. Log in to your Docusign Rooms account.
2. Select Settings in the Rooms header.
3. On the MEMBERS tab, select the account you want to
   unlock.

   Tip: To filter
   the member list to display only locked accounts, select the
   Locked Account filter.
4. On the Member Information page, select UNLOCK
   ACCOUNT.
