title: Create Room Detail Fields To Track the Different Stages of a Room
heading_path: Create Room Detail Fields To Track the Different Stages of a Room
text:
Use the Company room status field in the ROOM
INFORMATION section of room details to define the different stages of a room.
For example, different statuses of a room might be New
Listing, Offer Made, Offer Received, Under Contract, and In Escrow. Users can change
the status throughout the transaction lifecycle.

Users see these statuses in:

- A drop-down menu on the room Details tab when setting the status of a room
- Search filters on the Rooms tab when searching rooms by status
- In the borrower's view to indicate the status of a
  loan

title: Share a Document To Make It Visible to Other Room Members
heading_path: Share a Document To Make It Visible to Other Room Members
text:
Learn how to give other room members access to your documents. Only you can see your
documents in Docusign Rooms unless you explicitly share them with others.

title: Share a Document To Make It Visible to Other Room Members
heading_path: Share a Document To Make It Visible to Other Room Members
text:
Before you begin, you must own the document you want to
share or have a room role with Share any document
permission.

Note: Only you can see the documents you add to a room unless you explicitly share them
with others. However, there are exceptions. Documents are shared automatically
between room owners. Also, you might have a room role that shares documents with
other people automatically.

1. Open the room.
2. Select the DOCUMENTS tab.
3. Select the document to open it.
4. Select ![rooms-document-share-icon](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsdocumentshareicon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3MDgsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.pKCSHqEE9jnM6O3IfvmQkUnTdGJTmqKMbTp908UnFFg&_LANG=enus "rooms-document-share-icon") in the toolbar.
5. Select the room member(s) to share the document with.

   ![rooms-document-share](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsdocumentshare.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE3MDgsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.pKCSHqEE9jnM6O3IfvmQkUnTdGJTmqKMbTp908UnFFg&_LANG=enus "rooms-document-share")

   Note: To revoke someone's
   access, clear the blue checkmark next to their name. If you see a gray
   checkmark next to someone's name, you can't remove their access because it
   was given to them by someone else.
6. Select DONE.

title: Remove or Restore Someone's Room Access
heading_path: Remove or Restore Someone's Room Access
text: Learn how to control someone's access to a room in Docusign Rooms.

title: Remove or Restore Someone's Room Access
heading_path: Remove or Restore Someone's Room Access
text:
Before you begin, you need a room role with at least one of
these permissions enabled:

- Manage any user's room access
- Manage invited user's room access

You might need to remove someone from a room if they shouldn't have access to it anymore.
When you remove a person's room access, you are only preventing them from entering the room.
The audit trail and all documents are preserved in their current status.

Tip: Use the Show removed
users filter on the People tab to show or hide removed people.

1. Open the room.
2. Select the PEOPLE tab.
3. Do one of the following:
   - In grid view, select ![3 dot icon.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/3dotpeopleicon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE2MzIsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.T3iFe4Rj-kC_9MVPWSiUPoDoKe7Ih4jiUJYRE0-h4Wo&_LANG=enus "3 dot icon.") under the person's name, then select Remove room access
     or Restore room access.
   - In list view, select Actions in the person's row, then
     select Remove room access or Restore room
     access.
4. Select REMOVE to confirm.

If you have the Show removed users filter enabled on the People tab,
removed people are grayed out and display a REMOVED badge.

title: Email Documents to Your Docusign Rooms Inbox
heading_path: Email Documents to Your Docusign Rooms Inbox
text:
Learn how to send email attachments to your Docusign Rooms inbox. Once they arrive, you
can move them to rooms to share them with others.

You can send email attachments to your Docusign Rooms inbox. Once they arrive, move
them to rooms to share them with others.

Tip: Verify your Rooms inbound email address by
clicking your profile photo in the Rooms header, then selecting Preferences >  Inbox Details.

1. Open your email application and start an email message.
2. In the To line, type your Docusign Rooms email
   address.
3. Attach the documents.
4. Send the email.

After a few moments, the documents display in your
inbox.

title: Hide a User Role To Prevent Members From Selecting It
heading_path: Hide a User Role To Prevent Members From Selecting It
text:
Administrators can enable or disable user roles to control which roles are visible to
the company. Disabling a role hides it and prevents members from using it, such as when
inviting someone to a room.

You can enable and disable user roles to control which roles are visible to your company.
Disable roles to hide them. For example, if you are working on a new role, you can
disable it so it is hidden from users.

An Enabled or Disabled indicator displays for
each role.

![rooms-role-list-admin](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsrolelistadmin.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjEzODcsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.yjrVDEWehK4Xpn0SJpcadtPhX8WBnRK9inOIMj4FUiU&_LANG=enus "rooms-role-list-admin")

Enable or disable roles when creating or editing them or by using the drop-down menu in the
list of company roles.

title: Manage Member Accounts
text:
Read about managing member accounts in Docusign Rooms and how you can add new accounts,
make updates, and lock or close accounts.

title: Close a Member Account To Delete It Permanently
heading_path: Close a Member Account To Delete It Permanently
text:
Learn how to close a member account in Docusign Rooms. You can use
these steps to close and permanently delete a member account.

When you close a member's account, you delete it irreversibly. Before you can close the
account, you are prompted to transfer all the member's owned rooms.

Documents in the member's Inbox and My Docs folders are permanently deleted after account
closure, so they might want to transfer them beforehand.

Important:

When you close a member's Rooms account, it doesn't automatically close their
eSignature account. It depends on where the account was created or closed: in
Rooms or eSignature. If you create an eSignature account and have Rooms
provisioned, a Rooms user account isn't created automatically. However, if you
create a new user in Rooms, it will automatically create an eSignature
account.

Note: There isn't a "reopen" option after closing an
account. If you must re-add a member, you must add them again with a new account.
You can use the same name or email, but it's a brand-new account.

1. Log in to your Docusign Rooms account.
2. Select Settings in the Rooms header.
3. On the MEMBERS tab, select the account to close.
4. Select Close Account in the left navigation pane.

   Any rooms that require transfer are displayed. These are rooms the member owns or rooms
   that contain documents that transfer to new document owners.

   ![Rooms close account modal.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomscloseaccount.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE1NTgsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.pwPZBXB3K8DSbU4ZlcEhUDLwWOyhk6kBX_EzBI4qBac&_LANG=enus "Rooms close account modal.")
5. For each room, select a new owner from the Select Member
   drop-down list. Use the drop-down list at the top of the page or at the office
   level to transfer multiple rooms to the same person.
6. Select CLOSE ACCOUNT.
7. Select CLOSE ACCOUNT to confirm.

title: Complete a Task
text:
If you are the assignee of a task, you are responsible for completing it.

If the task doesn't require a document, mark it complete when you are
done. On the TASKS tab, select the circle next to the task(s), then click ![rooms-tasks-mark-complete-icon](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstasksmarkcompleteicon.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE4MTgsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.GPvUvtwiffcqeyP0RFtePtqI83AyU17izLWc75GKM-E&_LANG=enus "rooms-tasks-mark-complete-icon") in the toolbar.

If the task requires documents, you need to assign documents to the
task. The task will be marked complete automatically after you assign all the
necessary documents from the TASKS or DOCUMENTS tab.

- On the DOCUMENTS tab, first [add the
  document](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=clr1643042075783&topicId=rqf1600180642906.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to upload documents to Docusign Rooms so people collaborating with you on a transaction can access your files. Sharing documents in a central location saves time and prevents you from emailing files back and forth.") to the room. Then, drag the document from the ROOM DOCS
  folder to the document's placeholder in the task list.
- On the TASKS tab, click the task to open it. Click the document placeholder
  under the Documents section, then choose the room
  document to assign to the task or upload a new document.

Completed tasks display a green checkmark.

![rooms-task-completed](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstaskcompleted.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE4MTgsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.GPvUvtwiffcqeyP0RFtePtqI83AyU17izLWc75GKM-E&_LANG=enus "rooms-task-completed")

Completed tasks that require review change to In Review status
and move to the reviewer(s).

![rooms-task-in-review](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomstaskinreview.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE4MTgsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.GPvUvtwiffcqeyP0RFtePtqI83AyU17izLWc75GKM-E&_LANG=enus "rooms-task-in-review")

title: Disable a Role To Hide It From Users
heading_path: Disable a Role To Hide It From Users
text:
Disabling a role hides it from users.

Note: You cannot disable the Default Admin role.

1. Log in to your Docusign Rooms account.
2. Select Settings in the Rooms header.
3. Select the COMPANY tab.
4. Select Roles and Permissions.
5. Select ![rooms-drop-down-arrow](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsdropdownarrow.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjEzOTIsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.VaKKy95xB4FC3XPSzHlyip4_3mM0pKEPshJ2CLjaHl4&_LANG=enus "rooms-drop-down-arrow") next to the role to disable.
6. Select Disable.

   ![rooms-disable-role](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomsdisablerole.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjEzOTIsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.VaKKy95xB4FC3XPSzHlyip4_3mM0pKEPshJ2CLjaHl4&_LANG=enus "rooms-disable-role")
7. If you *do not* have company members with this role, Rooms allows you to
   disable it. Select Disable to confirm.

   If you *do* have company members with this role, Rooms notifies you that you need to
   assign these members a new role before you can disable it. Select
   Edit members in this role to view the list of members
   so you can change their roles.

title: Manage Your Docusign Rooms Contacts
text:
Read about how you can use the directory and address book in Docusign Rooms to quickly
access information for your internal and external contacts.

Access and manage your contacts directly within Rooms by selecting your profile photo, then
selecting Contacts.

![Contacts option in profile drop-down menu.](https://docusign-be-prod.zoominsoftware.io/api/bundle/clr1643042075783/page/images/roomscontactsmenu.png?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJjdXN0b21lciI6ImRvY3VzaWduX3Byb2R1Y3Rpb24iLCJleHAiOjE3ODE4MjE4NTAsInNoZWFmIjoiY2xyMTY0MzA0MjA3NTc4MyJ9.-QkQNDpISZa0fFYC8DxRQR_O7zJdQWwJ_pPKV6uTUfM&_LANG=enus "Contacts option in profile drop-down menu.")

Two tools are available: Directory and Address
Book.

title: Make Bulk Changes to a Member's Room Access
heading_path: Make Bulk Changes to a Member's Room Access
text:
If you have permission to manage members, you can schedule an update to add or remove a member
from rooms in bulk. This prevents you from adding or removing a member manually from
individual rooms when the member changes.

For example, you might want to schedule a room access update when:

- a member's region or office location changes
- a member now manages multiple offices, regions, or the entire company, and you want to give
  them visibility to transactions in these areas
- a member has a new role that auto-adds them to new rooms, and you also want to add them to
  open rooms

title: Make Bulk Changes to a Member's Room Access
heading_path: Make Bulk Changes to a Member's Room Access
How does the bulk update work?
text:
Bulk updates run on a *per-member* basis. The update runs overnight and only
adds or removes the member from active rooms. (The update does not add or remove the
member from closed rooms.)

When adding the member to rooms, the update adds the member to rooms created by their
peers or subordinates in their new office locations.

When removing the member from rooms, the update removes the member from rooms they no longer
belong to or were previously auto-added.

The bulk update never removes members from rooms they've been invited to.

Tip: If you have permission to manage
members' room access, you can [remove members from
rooms](https://support.docusign.com/s/document-item?bundleId=clr1643042075783&topicId=xep1572968406638.html&_LANG=enus "Learn how to control someone's access to a room in Docusign Rooms.") on a per-room basis (including rooms they've been invited
to).
